data.jd_text:
**Solution Consultant – MENA (ONESOURCE Tax & E-Invoicing Solutions)**
Location: Dubai, UAE (covering Middle East & North Africa region)
  
  
Department: Pre-Sales / Solution Consulting
  
  
Reports to: Regional Sales Director – Tax & E-Invoicing Solutions
  
  
We’re seeking a dynamic and customer-focused
**Solution Consultant**
to partner with our Sales team in driving growth across the MENA region. You’ll lead the technical and functional positioning of ONESOURCE Tax Solutions and Pagero E-Invoicing solutions. This role blends tax domain expertise with technology consulting – ideal for professionals who thrive at the intersection of compliance, ERP systems, and digital transformation.
  
  
**About The Role**
As an
**Solution Consultant**
with Thomson Reuters, you will:
  
  

* Engage with CFOs, Tax, and IT leaders to understand their indirect tax and e-invoicing needs.
* Deliver compelling product demonstrations, workshops, and value-based presentations tailored to customer challenges.
* Translate business requirements into end-to-end solution architectures leveraging ONESOURCE and Pagero capabilities.
* Support RFP/RFI processes with detailed functional and technical responses.
* Collaborate with Sales, Product, and Partner teams to develop go-to-market strategies and proof-of-concept implementations.
* Stay informed about evolving VAT/e-Invoicing regulations across GCC & MENA markets.
* Provide thought leadership through webinars, events, and customer advisory sessions.

**About You**
You’re a fit for the role of
**Solution Consultant**
if your background includes:
  
  

* 6–10 years of experience in Solution Consulting or Pre-Sales for enterprise tax, ERP, or compliance solutions.
* Strong understanding of VAT/GST, E-Invoicing mandates, and global indirect tax processes.
* Hands-on experience with one or more ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics) is strongly preferred.
* Prior exposure to ONESOURCE, Pagero, or similar tax automation solutions is an advantage.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to manage complex solution cycles across multi-country deals.
* Arabic speaking skills would be an added advantage.
* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, IT, or related field; MBA or equivalent is a plus

**What’s in it For You?**

* Hybrid Work Model: We’ve adopted a flexible hybrid working environment (2-3 days a week in the office depending on the role) for our office-based roles while delivering a seamless experience that is digitally and physically connected.
* Flexibility & Work-Life Balance: Flex My Way is a set of supportive workplace policies designed to help manage personal and professional responsibilities, whether caring for family, giving back to the community, or finding time to refresh and reset. This builds upon our flexible work arrangements, including work from anywhere for up to 8 weeks per year, empowering employees to achieve a better work-life balance.
* Career Development and Growth: By fostering a culture of continuous learning and skill development, we prepare our talent to tackle tomorrow’s challenges and deliver real-world solutions. Our Grow My Way programming and skills-first approach ensures you have the tools and knowledge to grow, lead, and thrive in an AI-enabled future.
* Industry Competitive Benefits: We offer comprehensive benefit plans to include flexible vacation, two company-wide Mental Health Days off, access to the Headspace app, retirement savings, tuition reimbursement, employee incentive programs, and resources for mental, physical, and financial wellbeing.
* Culture: Globally recognized, award-winning reputation for inclusion and belonging, flexibility, work-life balance, and more. We live by our values: Obsess over our Customers, Compete to Win, Challenge (Y)our Thinking, Act Fast / Learn Fast, and Stronger Together.
* Social Impact: Make an impact in your community with our Social Impact Institute. We offer employees two paid volunteer days off annually and opportunities to get involved with pro-bono consulting projects and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) initiatives.
* Making a Real-World Impact: We are one of the few companies globally that helps its customers pursue justice, truth, and transparency. Together, with the professionals and institutions we serve, we help uphold the rule of law, turn the wheels of commerce, catch bad actors, report the facts, and provide trusted, unbiased information to people all over the world.

**About Us**
Thomson Reuters informs the way forward by bringing together the trusted content and technology that people and organizations need to make the right decisions. We serve professionals across legal, tax, accounting, compliance, government, and media. Our products combine highly specialized software and insights to empower professionals with the data, intelligence, and solutions needed to make informed decisions, and to help institutions in their pursuit of justice, truth, and transparency. Reuters, part of Thomson Reuters, is a world leading provider of trusted journalism and news.
  
  
We are powered by the talents of 26,000 employees across more than 70 countries, where everyone has a chance to contribute and grow professionally in flexible work environments. At a time when objectivity, accuracy, fairness, and transparency are under attack, we consider it our duty to pursue them. Sound exciting? Join us and help shape the industries that move society forward.
  
  
As a global business, we rely on the unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences of all employees to deliver on our business goals. To ensure we can do that, we seek talented, qualified employees in all our operations around the world regardless of race, color, sex/gender, including pregnancy, gender identity and expression, national origin, religion, sexual orientation, disability, age, marital status, citizen status, veteran status, or any other protected classification under applicable law. Thomson Reuters is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer providing a drug-free workplace.
  
  
We also make reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and for sincerely held religious beliefs in accordance with applicable law. More information on requesting an accommodation here.
  
  
Learn more on how to protect yourself from fraudulent job postings here.
  
  
More information about Thomson Reuters can be found on thomsonreuters.com.

* **Business Developme
data.jd_text:
This is a high ownership role and you will be responsible for overseeing the P&L, strategy, sales, operations, compliance and general management of the operations in the UAE reporting directly to the Group Chief Operating Officer or as delegated by them.

**Responsibilities**

* **Business Development:**
  Identify and pursue new business opportunities, partnerships and channels to expand market presence and increase revenue.
* **Financial Management:**
  Oversee the country's financial performance, including budgeting, forecasting and financial reporting. Ensure financial objectives are met by implementing cost-control measures and optimizing resource allocation.
* **Sales and Marketing:**
* **Sales Leadership:**
  Drive the country's sales performance by setting sales targets, strategies, and implementing best practices to achieve them.
* **Marketing Strategy:**
  Collaborate with the global and in-country marketing teams to develop and implement effective marketing strategies that enhance brand visibility and product adoption in the local market.
* **Customer Relationship Management:**
  Maintain strong relationships with key clients and partners, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction and retention.
* **Operations Management:**
* **Operational Efficiency:**
  Ensure operational processes are optimized for efficiency and compliance with company standards and local regulations.
* **Technology Infrastructure:**
  Ensure the local office's technology infrastructure supports the company's operations effectively and securely.
* **Team Leadership and Development:**
* **Team Management:**
  Lead and motivate the local team, ensuring high performance, employee satisfaction and professional development.
* **Recruitment and Training:**
  Oversee the recruitment of new staff and provide training and development programs to enhance their skills and knowledge.
* **Culture and Values:**
  Foster a positive work culture that reflects the company’s values and promotes diversity and inclusion.
* **Regulatory Compliance and Risk Management:**
* **Legal Compliance:**
  Ensure all operations comply with local laws and regulations, including labour laws, tax requirements, and industry-specific regulations.
* **Risk Management:**
  Identify and manage business risks, including market, financial, and operational risks and implement strategies to mitigate them.
* **Stakeholder Engagement:**
* **Stakeholder Communication:**
  Act as the primary liaison between the country operations and the company’s global headquarters. Keep stakeholders informed about performance, challenges and strategic direction.
* **Public Relations:**
  Lead engagements with the Ministry of Finance and any other government or quasi-government agency.
* **Market Intelligence:**
* **Competitive Analysis:**
  Continuously monitor the competitive landscape, industry trends and market conditions to adapt strategies accordingly.
* **Customer Insights:**
  Gather insights on customer needs and preferences to inform product development and customer service strategies

**Qualifications**

* Proven Executive Leadership Experience 7+ years in senior leadership, including P&L ownership, preferably as a Country Manager, Managing Director, or General Manager. Track record of scaling a business, especially in fintech, regtech, digital taxation, or public-sector B2B SaaS in the UAE.
* Knowledge of UAE Taxation & Regulatory Landscape Expertise in with Tax policies and/or VAT compliance regimes. Demonstrated ability to navigate public-private partnerships, government contracts or digital transformation initiatives with ministries or tax authorities.
* Digital Transformation & Tech Fluency Strong understanding of digital platforms, APIs and SaaS business models. Familiarity with digital systems, e-filing, or electronic invoicing frameworks is a plus.

AED 40,000/-

data.raw_snippet:
**About the Company**

We are launching a premium longevity center in the UAE, operating at the intersection of advanced wellness, healthcare, and luxury services.

The center is built around a highly personalized, data-driven approach to preventive health, exceptional client experience, and a stron
data.jd_text:
**About the Company**

We are launching a premium longevity center in the UAE, operating at the intersection of advanced wellness, healthcare, and luxury services.

The center is built around a highly personalized, data-driven approach to preventive health, exceptional client experience, and a strong, niche brand positioning within the longevity space.

**About the Role**

We are looking for a senior, hands-on Head of Marketing to build and own the marketing function from the ground up ahead of launch.

This is a launch-stage role requiring both strategic thinking and execution. You will shape the brand, define the go-to-market strategy, and lead marketing through a combination of personal involvement and external partners (agencies, consultants, freelancers).

You will work closely with senior leadership and play a key role in preparing the business for launch and early growth.

**Key Responsibilities**

***Marketing & Brand Strategy***

* Define and own the end-to-end marketing strategy and brand positioning
* Translate business goals into a clear narrative and go-to-market approach
* Build and execute a practical launch roadmap

***Brand, PR & Communications***

* Lead brand positioning and ensure consistency across all touchpoints
* Define and drive PR, media relations, and thought leadership
* Oversee messaging, press materials, and external communications

***Digital, Content & Campaigns***

* Define direction for digital, content, and social media
* Lead launch campaigns, events, and brand activations
* Ensure high-quality execution aligned with premium positioning

***Partner & Resource Management***

* Manage agencies, freelancers, and external partners
* Set clear objectives, timelines, and quality standards
* Act as a central coordination point across teams

***Healthcare Compliance***

* Ensure all marketing aligns with UAE healthcare regulations
* Balance brand storytelling with medical credibility

**Who This Role Is For**

* A senior marketer who enjoys building brands from scratch
* Someone comfortable being hands-on in a launch environment
* A professional who combines strategy with execution
* A leader who understands premium positioning and trust-driven communication

**Qualifications**

* 8–12+ years in marketing
* Experience launching brands or business units
* Background in premium, healthcare, wellness, hospitality or luxury sectors
* Strong experience working with agencies and external partners
* Comfortable operating in fast-moving, early-stage environments

We’re hiring a
**Director of Data & Analytics**
to rebuild and scale a data function
**from the ground up**
within a high-growth consumer business in Dubai. You’ll transform a manual, under-leveraged setup into a production-grade platform, while embedding analytics directly into Product, Growth, and
data.jd_text:
We’re hiring a
**Director of Data & Analytics**
to rebuild and scale a data function
**from the ground up**
within a high-growth consumer business in Dubai. You’ll transform a manual, under-leveraged setup into a production-grade platform, while embedding analytics directly into Product, Growth, and Commercial teams.

This is a
**hands-on builder role**
, owning architecture, deploying an embedded analytics model, and ensuring data drives real business decisions.

**Responsibilities:**

**1) Build the Data Foundation**

* Architect production-grade pipelines, data models, and infrastructure
* Establish governance, quality, and tooling standards
* Move from manual reporting → scalable, reliable platform
* Build with future AI / ML use cases in mind

**2) Build an Embedded Analytics Model (Core to the Role)**

* Design and implement a distributed analytics function
* Partner with Product, Commercial, Growth, Finance & Customer Care to define needs
* Train centrally → deploy into business units
* Maintain shared standards, tooling, and a strong community of practice

**3) Drive Commercial Impact**

* Act as a true business partner, not a support function
* Work closely with Product, Growth & Commercial leadership
* Ensure data drives decisions, not just dashboards

**What we are looking for:**

* 12+ years’ experience across data, analytics, or data engineering, including 3+ years leading a data function
* Demonstrated ability to build data platforms from the ground up in high-growth, fast-moving environments, not just oversee, but actively deliver
* Strong experience implementing decentralised analytics models, enabling business units while maintaining consistency in data standards and infrastructure
* Deep technical capability across modern data ecosystems, comfortable owning architecture decisions, reviewing engineering work, and shaping data models
* Practical experience with leading tools and platforms such as Databricks, dbt, workflow orchestration tools, and cloud-based data warehouses (ideally AWS)
* Hands-on experience developing and managing experimentation frameworks, including A/B testing and performance measurement
* Prior exposure to consumer-facing, marketplace, or subscription-driven businesses, with a solid understanding of user behaviour, conversion funnels, cohort trends, and revenue drivers

data.title: Head of Revenue Analytics
data.raw_snippet:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.
  
  
Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the heart o
data.jd_text:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.
  
  
Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the heart of everything we do, our hard-working team has successfully delivered on an unprecedented growth and transformation journey, and we are now represented by over circa 13,000 employees across 112 offices worldwide.Your career with us should reflect your energy and passion.
  
  
That’s why, at Apex Group, we will do more than simply ‘empower’ you. We will work to supercharge your unique skills and experience.
  
  
Take the lead and we’ll give you the support you need to be at the top of your game. And we offer you the freedom to be a positive disrupter and turn big ideas into bold, industry-changing realities.
  
  
For our business, for clients, and for you
  
  
**Head of Revenue Analytics**
**Role Purpose**
The Head of Revenue Analytics is responsible for building, owning, and governing Apex Group’s global commercial analytics capability, ensuring trusted, actionable, and forward-looking insights drive revenue predictability and growth.
  
  
This role owns the
**revenue analytics layer**
across Salesforce and the enterprise data platform, while working in close partnership with
**Apex’s Global Analytics function and AI teams**
to integrate broader data sources, advanced analytics, and predictive insights into the commercial operating model.
  
  
The role requires a leader who is
**technically credible**
,
**commercially fluent**
, and able to bridge enterprise data strategy with frontline sales execution—ensuring analytics move from reporting to
**decisioning and action**
.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Revenue Analytics Ownership & Architecture
* Own the end-to-end revenue analytics domain, including data models, metrics, dashboards, and insight delivery for Sales and CRM.
* Lead the design of scalable revenue data models across pipeline, forecasting, bookings, and performance.
* Own the semantic layer and metric definitions that power executive reporting and operational decision-making.
* Partner with IT and Data Engineering to ensure performance, security, and scalability of the revenue analytics stack.
* Partnership with Global Analytics Function
* Act as the commercial analytics lead interfacing with Apex’s global enterprise analytics team.
* Align revenue analytics requirements with enterprise data standards, tooling, and governance.
* Leverage central analytics capabilities (data science, advanced modeling, data engineering) while retaining clear ownership of revenue-specific outputs.
* Ensure consistency between enterprise-wide analytics initiatives and commercial reporting.
* Advanced & Predictive Analytics
* Lead the evolution from descriptive and diagnostic reporting to predictive and prescriptive analytics.
* Develop models to forecast pipeline risk, deal slippage, win probability, and revenue confidence.
* Partner with AI and data science teams to:

+ Embed predictive insights into Salesforce and commercial workflows
+ Enable next-best-action recommendations for Sales and CRM
+ Surface risks and opportunities proactively, not reactively

* Champion experimentation and iterative improvement of analytical models.
* Data Integration & External Data Enablement
* Drive the integration of additional internal and third-party data sources, including:

+ Market and industry data
+ Client and fund-level intelligence
+ Benchmarking and competitive insights
+ Alternative and external signals relevant to revenue generation

* Ensure third-party data is mapped, governed, and made actionable within commercial tools.
* Work with AI and product teams to operationalise insights rather than leaving them in dashboards.
* Analytics Build & Insight Delivery
* Lead the build of executive dashboards and scorecards for:

+ Forecast accuracy and confidence
+ Pipeline health and conversion
+ Sales productivity and performance
+ Regional, product, and segment trends

* Ensure insights are intuitive, timely, and aligned to commercial decision points.
* Support QBRs, MBRs, and board-level reporting with defensible, consistent analytics.
* Data Governance, Quality & Trust
* Own revenue data governance, including definitions, standards, lineage, and documentation.
* Establish monitoring and controls for data quality, completeness, and integrity.
* Partner with Sales Ops, Deal Desk, and CRM to drive upstream data discipline.
* Serve as the escalation point for revenue data discrepancies across regions.
* Leadership & Capability Development
* Build and lead a high-performing Revenue Analytics team.
* Set standards for analytical rigor, documentation, and technical excellence.
* Develop talent capable of operating confidently across data, AI, and commercial stakeholders.

**Required Experience & Profile**
**Must-Have**

* 10–15+ years in analytics, data, or revenue intelligence roles.
* Experience leading analytics in financial services, fund administration, fintech, or regulated B2B environments.
* Strong hands-on background in data modeling, SQL, analytics engineering, and BI.
* Proven experience working with enterprise analytics and AI/data science teams.
* Demonstrated success translating complex analytics into commercial action.

**Nice-to-Have**

* Experience operationalising AI or predictive insights in CRM or GTM tools.
* Exposure to third-party data integration and alternative data sources.
* Familiarity with long-cycle, complex B2B sales and forecasting models.

**Additional information:**
We are an equal opportunity employer and ensure that no applicant is subject to less favourable treatment on the grounds of gender, gender identity, marital status, race, colour, nationality, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, socio-economic, responsibilities for dependants, physical or mental disability. Any hiring decision are made on the basis of skills, qualifications and experiences.
  
  
We measure our success as a business, not only by delivering great products and services and continually increasing our assets under administration and market share, but also by how we positively impact people, society and the planet.
  
  
For more information on our commitment to Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) please visit https://theapexgroup.com/csr-policy/
  
  
Disclaimer: Unsolicited CVs sent to Apex (Talent Acquisition Team or Hiring Managers) by recruitment agencies will not be accepted for this position. Apex operates a direct sourcing model and where agency assistance is required, the Talent Acquisition team will engage directly with our exclusive recruitment partners.

**About noon**

We’re building an ecosystem of digital products and services that power everyday life across the Middle East—fast, scalable, and deeply customer-centric. Our mis
data.jd_text:
**Job title:**
Head of Marketing Technology

**Location:**
Dubai, United Arab Emirates

**Reporting to:**
General Manager

**About noon**

We’re building an ecosystem of digital products and services that power everyday life across the Middle East—fast, scalable, and deeply customer-centric. Our mission is to deliver to every door every day. We want to redefine what technology can do in this region, and we’re looking for a (add title) who can help us move even faster.

noon’s mission: Every door, every day.

**What you'll do:**

Team noon has some of the fastest, smartest, and hardest-working people we've encountered. With a young, aggressive, and talented team, we're driving major missions forward. We are looking for a rare blend of engineer and marketing strategist to lead our Marketing Technology function. As Head of MarTech, you will own the full stack of digital marketing infrastructure whilst designing, building and operating the systems that power how we acquire customers, engage creators, scale affiliate programs and launch data-driven campaigns at speed.

This is a hands-on leadership role. You will work at the intersection of product engineering, growth marketing, and AI, building and scaling proprietary tools for influencers, driving automation in campaign execution through advanced AI solutions and continuously elevating our marketing technology stack to ensure it remains best-in-class. You will partner closely with our Growth, Brand, and Data teams and will be expected to write code, review architecture, and set the technical direction.

**Marketing Technology Stack**

* Design, build, and continuously optimize our end-to-end MarTech architecture. Spanning CRM, digital marketing, influencers, attribution, marketing automation, and analytics platforms
* Own the integration layer between marketing tools and our core product/data infrastructure
* Evaluate, procure, and implement third-party platforms; sunset legacy tools where necessary

**Affiliate Technology & Program Infrastructure**

* Build or implement scalable affiliate tracking and management systems (e.g., Impact, PartnerStack, or custom-built solutions)
* Develop technical tooling to onboard, track, and optimize performance-based creator and affiliate partnerships
* Design commission modeling, payout automation, and fraud prevention systems

**Influencer Tools & Creator Technology**

* Build internal tools to enable the influencer team, from creator discovery and briefing to content performance tracking and ROI measurement
* Design APIs and dashboards that give influencers and affiliate partners real-time performance visibility
* Develop workflows that automate repetitive creator operations (briefs, contracting, reporting)

**Agentic AI for Marketing Campaigns**

* Lead the adoption and development of agentic AI systems across our digital marketing campaigns, from automated campaign launch logic to AI-assisted content personalization and media buying decisions
* Evaluate and implement LLM-based tools for campaign ideation, audience segmentation, copy generation, and A/B testing automation
* Build internal AI agents that can operate portions of the campaign lifecycle with minimal manual intervention

**Data, Attribution & Performance Engineering**

* Build and maintain robust marketing data pipelines that ensure clean, unified first-party data seamlessly flows from ads, affiliates, social, CRM, and product platforms into a single, reliable source of truth.
* Own marketing attribution modeling across channels (last-touch, data-driven, multi-touch)
* Build dashboards and reporting infrastructure that gives leadership real-time visibility into CAC, ROAS, LTV, and channel efficiency

**What you'll need:**

* 5+ years in a marketing technology, growth engineering, or full-stack role with direct marketing system ownership
* Engineering background is essential. You must have written production code (Python, JS, or similar) and be comfortable reviewing technical architecture
* Hands-on experience with affiliate marketing technology (tracking platforms, commission systems, partner portals)
* Experience building tools or systems for influencer/creator programs at scale
* Deep understanding of marketing data: attribution, funnels, cohort analysis, and martech integration
* Experience deploying or building agentic AI / LLM-powered marketing automation
* Track record in a high-growth consumer internet, e-commerce, or DTC company
* Familiarity with modern MarTech stack: Segment/RudderStack (CDP), Braze/Iterable (CRM), GA4, Meta/TikTok APIs, Looker/Tableau
* Experience with programmatic and paid media technology stacks
* Strong SQL skills; comfortable with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift)

**Who will excel?**

* We’re looking for people with high standards, who understand that hard work matters.
* You need to be relentlessly resourceful and operate with a deep bias for action.
* We need people with the courage to be fiercely original.
* noon is not for everyone; readiness to adapt, pivot, and learn is essential.

data.title: Executive Director, Digital Assets Risk(UAE, Hong Kong)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
This role could be based in UAE and Hong Kong. When you start the application process you will be presented with a drop down menu showing all countries, Please ensure that you select a country where the role is based.
  
  

* Act as the second line Subject Matter Expert for Digital
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
This role could be based in UAE and Hong Kong. When you start the application process you will be presented with a drop down menu showing all countries, Please ensure that you select a country where the role is based.
  
  

* Act as the second line Subject Matter Expert for Digital Assets (DA) as an asset class including advising across all relevant Risk Types (reputational risk, traded/market, treasury/capital and liquidity, operational, technology, cyber security, and credit risk).
* Lead provision of DA risk specific expertise to continuously enhance and maintain all elements of the DA Risk Management Approach (DARMA) which sets out the approach to risk management and the control framework within which risks are managed.
* Lead assessment of material risk types that the Group may be potentially exposed to arising from direct or indirect DA activities and direct Risk Framework Ownership to such risk types.
* Lead effectiveness reviews to assess relevant first and second line understand and accept their DA risk management responsibilities.
* Review and challenge that policies and standards are being adapted or created to address DA risks and training is available to staff (on a targeted basis).
* Review and challenge the assessment of DA Risk considerations in the Group’s Risk Appetite framework.
* Monitor that the Risk Framework Owners (RFOs) propose adequate risk appetite with DA risks evaluation for consideration and approval by the Board.
* Monitor Risk Type compliance to Board approved risk appetite with DA considerations using the risk information report covering all Risk Types; and highlight significant matters to the Group Chief Risk Officer (“GCRO”), senior management and senior risk committees.
* Review infrastructure to support DA reviews, and the monitoring of exposures and actions as required.
* Lead provision of regulatory interpretation for regulations classified as “Large-Scale” with Framework implications. This also includes working with countries to support their regulatory requirements.

**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategy**

* Influence the Group’s DA Strategy and activities, advising on alignment with specific Risk Type framework, policies, standards, risk registers and risk appetite.
* Actively engage thought leaders in the DA industries to improve risk understanding, innovation, exploration, and adoption of alternative risk models and data sources.
* Conduct regulatory interpretation and associated assessments for DA related initiatives with adherence to legal and regulatory requirements.
* Evaluate and advise on risks associated with DA projects, products and investments, including the assessment of blockchain technologies and tokenomics, to ensure robust risk mitigation strategies are in place.

**Business**

* Inform the strategic intent and collective agenda for the DA Risk Management Approach
* Influence stakeholders and DA Risk subject matter experts on thinking and approach for Digital Asset activities, including situations where the Group seeks to engage clients heavily exposed to DAs
* Advise Business on alignment of individual DA activities to the Group’s DA business strategy and execution within the risk framework and parameters.
* Direct the business to undertake appropriate evaluations with regards to DA stress scenarios with support from the Group Treasury and Group Stress Testing teams as required.
* Provide timely advice, support and challenge to enable compliance with all relevant laws and regulations and support pro-active and pre-emptive risk mitigation.

**Processes**

* The Candidate is responsible for discharging Policy Owner related responsibilities as defined in the ERMF:
* Ensuring that processes within the DA Risk Management central function are identified and defined by Process Owners, and ensuring the completeness and accuracy of these identified processes; and
* Reviewing, challenging, and providing oversight of the DA risk profile monitored bythe DA Risk Management Function process universe.

**People & Talent**

* Create a culture of continuous learning and development
* Foster an open environment to stimulate creativity and develop innovative solution to supports Group’s aspiration.
* Lead through example and build the appropriate culture and values.
* Set appropriate tone and expectations from the team and work in collaboration with risk and control partners.

**Risk Management**
**For DAs Initiatives, Lead Inter-alia**

* Oversight of development of the risk assessment approach (DARMA) for any planned business direct exposure to DAs and/or entities heavily exposed to DAs.
* Required DA risk reviews:
* Provide subject matter expertise on DA risks and their interactions to core banking Business risks (across CIB/WRB) including capital and liquidity impacts, and traded and credit risk limits
* Review and challenge enhanced DA Due Diligence reviews on Business DA clients, products, initiatives and investments to enable adherence to DARMA.
* Evaluate DA risk assessments for confirmation by existing Business authorities including evaluation of blockchains and tokens, DA key management and wallet management infrastructure, operations and partnerships with DA third parties e.g. DA custodians, exchanges, staking providers etc
* Direct and review notification requirements to relevant regulators
* Oversight and challenge for the Group’s DA Risk Profile and activities including development and implementation of appropriate infrastructure to support DA reviews, and the monitoring of exposures and actions as required.
* Direct DA considerations in Risk Appetite by relevant Risk Framework Owners.
* monitoring the approved metrics through the risk information reports on an ongoing basis and that incidents of breach are being escalated by the relevant Business and/or Risk Type to the respective Committees.

**Governance**

* Run and maintain a governance forum/committee structure to provide effective risk oversight of the DA Risk Profile across the Group.
* Conduct annual effectiveness reviews to identify improvement areas and implement necessary actions.
* Lead review and challenge of on-going compliance with and effectiveness of the risk control environment and overall exposure and risk levels to DAs
* Monitor top and emerging risks through forward looking indicators, taking into consideration to external events which may be material.
* Review and assess management action being taken to mitigate their impact.

**Regulatory & Business Conduct**

* Display exemplary conduct and live by the Group’s Values and Code of Conduct.
* Take personal responsibility for embedding the highest standards of ethics, including regulatory and business conduct, across Standard Chartered Bank. This includes understanding and ensuring compliance with, in letter and spirit, all applicable laws, regulations, guidelines and the Group Code of Conduct.
* Effectively and collaboratively identify, escalate, mitigate and resolve risk, conduct and compliance matters.

**Key stakeholders**
Internal
  
  
Digital Assets
  
  

* Members of the Group Management Team
* Digital Assets Centre of Excellence
* Business heads
* Group and Country Risk Framework Owners
* Digital Assets SMEs
* Group Head, Internal Audit

External
  
  

* Home and host regulators including Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) and Financial Conduct Authority (FCA)
* The Group's external auditors

**Skills And Experience**

* Traded Risk
* Digital Assets
* Credit
* Traded Risk
* Operational and Cyber Security
* Reputational
* Compliance
* Treasury

**Qualifications**

* Strong academic background
* >15 years of experience in banking / financial services specifically capital, liquidity risk, traded and credit risk.
* >15 years of experience in emerging Digital technology
* >5 years direct experience in Digital Asset technology working for a Digital Asset Service Provider
* Deep expertise (at least 5 years) of evaluating financial and non-financial risks associated with blockchains, tokens, CBDCs, stablecoins and cryptocurrencies.
* A clear understanding of novel risks in DA and how these risks manifest within relevant Risk Types such as Reputational, Traded/Market, Treasury/Capital and Liquidity, Operational, Technology and Cyber Security Risks, and Credit Risk.
* Broad experience across diverse business models within banking and Fintechs
* Strong expertise within risk management including governance and frameworks including proven verbal and written communication skills to the Board level.
* Thought leadership in digital-related risks (Digital-asset risk, technology risk, ICS risk, resilience)
* Strong understanding of Digital-assets and fintech industry trends / developments, risk implications and impacts on the financial sector
* Knowledge of key regulatory and supervisory frameworks. Ideal - direct experience of working closely with supervisors / regulators
* Strong stakeholder management, communication and influencing skills
* Excellent interpersonal skills, multicultural awareness and sensitivity
* Programme/project management
* Experience paper writing for senior level committees.
* Creativity and appetite for continuous improvement

**About Standard Chartered**
We're an international bank, nimble enough to act, big enough for impact. For more than 170 years, we've worked to make a positive difference for our clients, communities, and each other. We question the status quo, love a challenge and enjoy finding new opportunities to grow and do better than before. If you're looking for a career with purpose and you want to work for a bank making a difference, we want to hear from you. You can count on us to celebrate your unique talents and we can't wait to see the talents you can bring us.
  
  
Our purpose, to drive commerce and prosperity through our unique diversity, together with our brand promise, to be here for good are achieved by how we each live our valued behaviours. When you work with us, you'll see how we value difference and advocate inclusion.
  
  
**Together We**

* Do the right thing and are assertive, challenge one another, and live with integrity, while putting the client at the heart of what we do
* Never settle, continuously striving to improve and innovate, keeping things simple and learning from doing well, and not so well
* Are better together, we can be ourselves, be inclusive, see more good in others, and work collectively to build for the long term

**What We Offer**
**In line with our Fair Pay Charter,**
we offer a competitive salary and benefits to support your mental, physical, financial and social wellbeing.
  
  

* Core bank funding for retirement savings, medical and life insurance, with flexible and voluntary benefits available in some locations.
* Time-off including annual leave, parental/maternity (20 weeks), sabbatical (12 months maximum) and volunteering leave (3 days), along with minimum global standards for annual and public holiday, which is combined to 30 days minimum.
* Flexible working options based around home and office locations, with flexible working patterns.
* Proactive wellbeing support through Unmind, a market-leading digital wellbeing platform, development courses for resilience and other human skills, global Employee Assistance Programme, sick leave, mental health first-aiders and all sorts of self-help toolkits
* A continuous learning culture to support your growth, with opportunities to reskill and upskill and access to physical, virtual and digital learning.
* Being part of an inclusive and values driven organisation, one that embraces and celebrates our unique diversity, across our teams, business functions and geographies - everyone feels respected and can realise their full potential.

data.title: Head of Business Intelligence
data.raw_snippet:
The
**Head of Business Intelligence**
will own and lead the end-to-end BI strategy, architecture and insight delivery across the business. This role is responsible for transforming complex data into clear, actionable intelligence that enables leadership teams to make faster, smarter and more profita
data.jd_text:
The
**Head of Business Intelligence**
will own and lead the end-to-end BI strategy, architecture and insight delivery across the business. This role is responsible for transforming complex data into clear, actionable intelligence that enables leadership teams to make faster, smarter and more profitable decisions.

You will build and lead a high-performing BI function, establish best-in-class reporting standards, and partner closely with Commercial, Trading, Merchandising, Marketing, Finance, Supply Chain and senior leadership to drive measurable business impact.

This is a senior, hands-on leadership role requiring strong technical expertise, commercial acumen and the ability to translate data into decision-ready insight.

**Key Responsibilities**

**BI Strategy & Architecture**

* Define and own the group-wide BI roadmap across DTC and marketplace channels.
* Translate trading, pricing, merchandising, supply chain and finance requirements into scalable data models and reporting layers.
* Design and maintain a single source of truth across brands, regions and channels, despite fragmented upstream systems.
* Set clear ownership of raw data, transformed layers, business logic and reporting views.

**Data Integration & Pipelines**

* Lead the structuring and transformation of core data tables including orders, traffic, pricing, promotions, logistics, inventory and returns.
* Build and maintain robust pipelines to support daily, weekly and near real-time trading decisions.
* Partner closely with technology and data teams to improve data reliability, timeliness and accessibility, and to define new data fields or views where required.

**Reporting, Dashboards & Analytics**

* Design decision-first dashboards that drive action, not just visibility.
* Create standardised reporting frameworks while accommodating brand-level nuances.
* Enable self-serve analytics for trading, finance and senior leadership teams.

**Business Partnering & Decision Support**

* Act as a strategic BI partner to Trading and Commercial teams, proactively surfacing insights, risks and opportunities.
* Help evolve the organisation from reactive reporting to proactive and predictive insight.

**Data Governance & Quality**

* Define clear data definitions, metric logic and documentation to eliminate multiple versions of the truth.
* Implement data quality checks, alerts and reconciliation processes to ensure trust in reporting.

**What You’ll Bring**

* 12+ years’ experience in Business Intelligence, Analytics or Data, with at least 3–5 years in a senior leadership role.
* Strong background in e-commerce, fashion retail or consumer-facing brands.
* Expert-level SQL (BigQuery preferred) and deep understanding of modern data warehousing and modelling concepts.
* Advanced experience with BI tools such as Tableau or equivalent.
* Working knowledge of Python or similar for data analysis, automation or advanced analytics.
* Strong commercial mindset with a proven ability to influence senior stakeholders.
* Experience building and scaling BI teams in fast-growth, high-change environments.

data.title: Head of Restaurants & New Verticals Marketing (UAE Based)
data.raw_snippet:
**About The Team**
The Marketing Team is responsible for driving brand, customer and business growth across the UAE, KW and Qatar. We do this by developing marketing strategies and programs to build awareness, create demand, optimize traffic, and continually improve our brand experience customers to
data.jd_text:
**About The Team**
The Marketing Team is responsible for driving brand, customer and business growth across the UAE, KW and Qatar. We do this by developing marketing strategies and programs to build awareness, create demand, optimize traffic, and continually improve our brand experience customers to deliver growth for the business. We apply research, analyze performance metrics, and provide product and industry expertise and understanding of customer behavior to inform and refine the business’ marketing strategy and execution. We develop content, manage, and deliver targeted merchandising and promotional activities. We apply customer-centric methodologies to improve our brand experience for customers. We drive marketing excellence by measuring efficiency and effectiveness of activities. We deliver improvements in the process to scale delivery.
  
  
**About The Role**
We are looking for a Senior Marketing Manager/ Head of Marketing to lead our Restaurant and New Verticals marketing team across the Middle East. This newly created role will work closely and collaboratively with commercial teams, product teams, other global and local marketing leads/ teams and our Restaurant/ New Vertical partners to deliver best-in-class Joint Business Plans, co-marketing strategies and promotional programs to deliver business results.
  
  
**What You'll Be Doing**

* Restaurant and NV Marketing Strategy | Define the strategy for restaurant and NV marketing including how to support different segments of restaurants, groceries and retail partners to maximise customer and order volume growth. Lead the marketing conversations with internal stakeholders including our global counterparts and local commercial teams, and external stakeholders including partners and agencies.
* Restaurant and NV Marketing Program Development & Innovation | Plan and build an annual promotional program to drive value perception and incremental customers and orders, adapting from global playbooks and toolkits where applicable. Achieve execution excellence with meticulous program management skills, proven team leadership skills and attention to detail. Deliver high profile marketing innovation with partners. Develop best-in-class ‘painting the town teal’ visibility strategy across both physical and digital spaces.
* Campaign Performance Measurement | Design framework for new and existing program experimentation and tracking to increase the scale of success. Utilize data-driven decision making to improve the performance and scalability of our restaurant and new vertical marketing programs. Ability to navigate ambiguity and triangulate in the absence of data.
* Stakeholder & partner management/ influence | Be obsessed with our partners and their business, and get to know our key partners' businesses inside and out. Dive deep into the data and meet with key stakeholders to understand segments, needs, priorities and growth opportunities. Be the voice of restaurants, grocers and retailers in the business and within the marketing team, developing frameworks and processes to engage partners with Deliveroo marketing. Collaborate with the commercial teams to develop compelling marketing proposals as part of our pitch process for key account relationships.
* People management & Team growth | Develop immediate team and related teams, setting clear goals, plans resources and holding team members accountable for performance. Creates and communicates an inspiring vision for the team and related teams, establishing team culture that aligns with our company values.

**Requirements**

* 12+ years of career achievement in marketing (with demonstrated financial results and business impact), of which a minimum of the most recent 5+ years in B2B2C marketing involving multiple business partners and minimum of 3+ years in supervisory role in the Middle East
* Proven capability in multi-channel marketing strategies and deployment, data-informed decision making processes and performance-based marketing approach
* Highly collaborative and possesses excellent communication skills with a passion for building strong relationships. Proven experience to influence, motivate and manage external stakeholders as well as internal teams
* Entrepreneurial minded, able to articulate new ideas and influence others to gain support. Strong learning agility, comfortable dealing with fast paced environments, able to prioritize high impact activities and keep complicated projects moving forward.
* Self-starter, creative and analytical problem-solver with attention to details. Delivers results quickly and efficiently.
* In-depth knowledge of B2B2C marketing and good knowledge of Middles restaurant, grocery and online retail scene
* Good written & spoken English, Arabic language a plus
* Comfortable with advanced Google Sheets/ Excel, data dashboards and capable of data mining to perform analysis to develop/enhance marketing program
* Candidates with delivery APP and/ or restaurant/ grocery marketing experience will be prioritized.
* Experience in marketing for multi-vendor platforms (e.g. eComm sites, hotel booking sites, travel booking sites, payment platforms etc.), or other relevant categories a plus

**Why Deliveroo**
Our mission is to transform the way you shop and eat, bringing the neighbourhood to your door by connecting consumers, restaurants, shops and riders. We are transforming the way the world eats and shops by making access to food and products more convenient and enjoyable. We give people the opportunity to buy what they want, as they want it, when and where they want it.
  
  
We are a technology-driven company at the forefront of the most rapidly expanding industry in the world. We are still a small team, making a very large impact, looking to answer some of the most interesting questions out there. We move fast, value autonomy and ownership, and we are always looking for new ideas.
  
  
**Workplace & Benefits**
At Deliveroo we know that people are the heart of the business and we prioritise their welfare. Benefits differ by country, but we offer many benefits in areas including healthcare, well-being, parental leave, pensions, and generous annual leave allowances, including time off to support a charitable cause of your choice. Benefits are country-specific, please ask your recruiter for more information.
  
  
**Diversity**
At Deliveroo, we believe a great workplace is one that represents the world we live in and how beautifully diverse it can be. That means we have no judgement when it comes to any one of the things that make you who you are - your gender, race, sexuality, religion or a secret aversion to coriander. All you need is a passion for (most) food and a desire to be part of one of the fastest-growing businesses in a rapidly growing industry.
  
  
We are committed to diversity, equity and inclusion in all aspects of our hiring process. We recognise that some candidates may require adjustments to apply for a position or fairly participate in the interview process. If you require any adjustments, please don't hesitate to let us know. We will make every effort to provide the necessary adjustments to ensure you have an equitable opportunity to succeed.

Location: Dubai

data.title: Head of Digital
data.raw_snippet:
**Title -**
**Head - Digital Transformation & AI**

**Build the Operating System of the Firm -**
We are building a fundamentally different kind of financial services platform — one that is
**digital-first, AI-enabled, and designed for scale from day one**
. We are not looking for someone to improve
data.jd_text:
**Title -**
**Head - Digital Transformation & AI**

**Build the Operating System of the Firm -**
We are building a fundamentally different kind of financial services platform — one that is
**digital-first, AI-enabled, and designed for scale from day one**
. We are not looking for someone to improve processes. We are looking for someone to
**replace them**
.

As Head of Digital Transformation & AI, you will
**redefine how work gets done across the organisation**
— across fund administration, AIFM, capital markets, Risk, and Compliance and all support functions including Finance, Internal Operations.

You will design and build an operating model where:

* manual work is the exception, not the norm
* AI is embedded into daily workflows
* decisions are data-driven and real-time
* systems are integrated, not fragmented
* there is one integrated client/ intermediary platform to access all services

This is a
**build-and-transform role**
, not a maintenance role.

If you join, your mandate is simple:
**Rebuild how the company works — using AI, automation, and first-principles thinking.**

**What You Will Actually Do**

Re-architect how work gets done

* Break down existing workflows and rebuild them from scratch
* Eliminate unnecessary steps, approvals, and manual interventions
* Move the business to exception-based operations

Make AI part of daily work

* Embed AI into every function — not as a tool, but as a default workflow layer
* Define how teams use AI to analyse, validate, draft, monitor
* Build human + AI systems, not just automation

Build the internal platform layer

* Design a unified automation + AI ecosystem across the firm
* Replace fragmented tools with a connected platform
* Treat internal workflows like products, not processes

Automate the core engine

* NAV production with minimal manual intervention
* Fully automated reconciliations and exception handling
* Real-time reporting across funds, investors, and management
* Risk & Compliance → automated monitoring and alerts

Transform support functions

* Finance → real-time, automated, data-driven
* Internal Operations → AI-enabled work flow management

Turn data into leverage

* Build a unified data layer across the organisation
* Enable real-time decision-making
* Remove dependency on fragmented spreadsheets and reporting

Drive adoption, not just implementation

* If people aren’t using it, it doesn’t exist
* Change behaviour across teams and leadership
* Make AI and automation the default way of working

**What Success Looks Like**

* Manual work becomes the exception, not the rule
* AI is used daily across all functions
* Fully integrated client/ intermediary platform
* NAV and reporting cycles are faster and cleaner
* The business scales without proportional headcount growth
* The organisation operates as a system, not a collection of processes

**Who You Are**

* You think in systems, not tasks
* You challenge everything that exists today
* You build, not just advise
* You move fast and iterate
* You care about outcomes, not tools

**This Role Is Not For You If**

* You want to “improve” existing processes
* You need fully defined requirements before acting
* You see yourself as IT or support

**This Role Is For You If**

* You want to build something from scratch
* You’ve always thought: “Why is this done this way?”
* You want to redefine how a financial services firm operates

The candidates can apply from any region, we are flexible on location.

data.raw_snippet:
**Some Careers Shine Brighter Than Others**
If you’re looking for a career that will help you stand out, join HSBC and fulfil your potential. Whether you want a career that could take you to the top, or simply take you in an exciting new direction, HSBC offers opportunities, support and rewards that
data.jd_text:
**Some Careers Shine Brighter Than Others**
If you’re looking for a career that will help you stand out, join HSBC and fulfil your potential. Whether you want a career that could take you to the top, or simply take you in an exciting new direction, HSBC offers opportunities, support and rewards that will take you further
  
  
HSBC aims to be the international bank of choice for affluent customers, supporting their domestic and international banking, and holistic wealth management needs. We help customers to take care of their day-to-day finances and to manage, protect and grow their wealth. Our international network and breadth of expertise enable us to support individuals, families, business owners, investors and entrepreneurs around the world.
  
  
This role is a key member of the Digital Channels team, reporting to the Head of Digital Sales for Unsecured Lending, in IWPB UAE and will work alongside a Digital Sales Manager. The role holder will be accountable for supporting the delivery of ambitious commercial growth in Digital performance, measured by the Digital Channels KPIs, with a particular focus on: Pure Digital Sales for Credit cards and Personal Loans.
  
  
**In This Role, You Will**

* Driving Digital Acquisition and Sales Journey Transformation activities across the public websites and application journeys.
* Key focus on selling unsecured lending products to our NTB customer base.
* Drive the day-to-day execution of Digital Commercialisation programs, marketing consulting, data analysis and complex problem solving, while working closely with the global digital and analytics teams.
* Working with third party partners, aggregators and affiliates to drive forward performance and find new channels for business growth.
* Identify key risks, issues and interdependencies and providing appropriate mitigation strategies or escalating as appropriate.
* Ensuring that all HSBC Wealth and Personal Banking services offer standout customer experience and fully deliver on our brand promise.
* Analysing extensive raw data sets, structuring them and providing actionable insight to help inform the unsecured lending digital sales strategy.
* The role holder will be expected to build strong relationships across both global and local market teams.
* To be successful, the individual must be passionate about creating a digital first mind-set across front-line, product teams and customers, as well as be exceptional at complex problem solving and change delivery. The role holder should also be passionate about customer journey optimization and transforming the digital channel into a high performing sales distribution channel.

**To be successful in the role, you should meet the following requirements:**

* Customer obsessed, results based approach, able to deliver to deadlines.
* Understanding and knowledge of paid media advertising an advantage
* Consumer financial services industry experience and strong understanding of Digital business, while experience with travel, lifestyle, and/or other consumer product development is a strong advantage.
* Outstanding track record with a digital business and transforming digital sales.
* Experience with A/B Testing and Multivariate Testing solutions. Experience with personalisation projects or programs an advantage.
* Strong quantitative skills and familiarity with statistical analysis or experiment design.
* Working knowledge of the Adobe product suite, Tealium, Looker or relatable MI and analysis tools.
* Strong Commercial focus, ability to balance risks vs. rewards and maximize the cost effectiveness and profitability for the business.
* Pragmatic decision-making skills, with the ability to make clear judgments based on a range of factors, for example commercials, risk, and customer experience determine the implications and make recommendations as needed.
* Innovative with the ability to approach things differently or do different things to deliver goals.
* High levels of resilience and self-motivation.
* The ability to quickly understand customer and operational considerations.
* University bachelor’s degree.
* Strong Analytical and Presentation skills.
* Energetic, positive attitude and team player.
* Excellent organisational and planning skills.
* A flexible approach to work and working hours.
* Ability to drive change and innovation with respect to costs, revenue and service
* Strong leadership / interpersonal skills and has the ability to communicate and influence at all levels of the organisation
* Understands how to navigate the matrix and drive integration opportunities
* A graduation degree is essential for obtaining a UAE visa and/or work permit. If your university certificate is from outside the UAE, up-to-date attestations and equivalency are also mandatory (Recognition of Higher Education Qualifications Issued Outside The UAE

**You’ll achieve more at HSBC.**
HSBC is committed to building a culture where all employees are valued, respected and opinions count. We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment.
  
  
We believe diversity brings benefits for our customers, our business and our people. Different ideas and perspectives help us innovate, manage risk and grow the business in a sustainable way. Personal data held by the Bank relating to employment applications will be used in accordance with our Privacy Statement, which is available on our website.
  
  
Issued by The Hong Kong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited.

data.title: HR Systems and Innovation Lead
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Purpose:**

The HR Systems and Innovation Lead is Arada's engine for HR innovation, responsible for transforming how the HR function operates through smart HR systems, automation, and data, enabling exceptional experiences at every stage of the employee journey.

Reporting to the Global Head
data.jd_text:
**Role Purpose:**

The HR Systems and Innovation Lead is Arada's engine for HR innovation, responsible for transforming how the HR function operates through smart HR systems, automation, and data, enabling exceptional experiences at every stage of the employee journey.

Reporting to the Global Head of HR Transformation & Operations, this role owns HRIS strategy, process transformation, and cross-system integration. It champions AI-powered tools and automation to reduce friction and drive efficiency across Arada's growing international operations, and it ensures that people data and digital solutions translate into smarter decisions, better experiences, and an HR function that truly scales.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Work with Global Head of Transformation & Ops on the HR technology and AI strategy, including selection, governance, and optimization of HRIS platforms and related systems.
* Drive end to end PX process re-design, standardization, and continuous improvement seizing digital and automation opportunities, to ensure accuracy, efficiency, and compliance.
* Enable and ensure high quality data governance, building a single HR source of truth that supports reporting and analytics as foundation of business decision making.
* Lead major HR transformation programs, including system implementations, user experience improvement, and employee journey redesign.
* Oversee the ongoing maintenance, configuration, and performance of HR systems, coordinating with software vendors and system integration partners to ensure issues are resolved promptly, releases are managed effectively, and service levels are maintained.
* Partner with IT to ensure HR data flows and process triggers are accurately activating downstream systems and functions, including Payroll, Corporate Directory, and other business-critical integrations, maintaining data integrity across the full employee lifecycle.
* Champion and promote the use of systems, automation and AI-enabled tools to improve operational efficiency and support HR to thrive and act as strategic partner to the business.

**Experience Required:**

* Minimum 8–10 years of experience in HR technology and transformation programs within global organizations.
* Strong expertise in HRIS platforms such as Darwinbox, Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, or Oracle HCM and integration with downstream systems/ERPs
* Proven capability in process optimization, employee journey design, and operating model development.
* Track record of working on large-scale HR transformations with measurable efficiency and experience improvements.
* Experience managing and influencing cross-functional stakeholders and third-party vendors.
* Proficiency in HR data architecture, master data management, and people data structures that ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance across systems and jurisdictions.
* Experience establishing HR system support frameworks, including incident management, release coordination, SLA governance, and oversight of internal and external support resources.
* Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Information Systems, or a related field; Professional HR, HRIS and project management certification are a plus.

**Success Measures:**

* Measurable improvement in HR process efficiency and innovation, including reduction in manual effort and processing time across key HR workflows
* HR technology platforms operating at high adoption rates, with positive usability and satisfaction feedback from HR teams, managers, and employees
* HR data integrity maintained at high accuracy levels across all systems, with a single, trusted source of HR data available to support reporting and business decision-making.
* Major HR technology and transformation programs delivered on time, within scope, and with adoption outcomes that meet or exceed defined targets.
* HR systems operating within agreed SLAs, with incidents resolved promptly and releases coordinated with minimal disruption to the business.

data.title: Head of Data Science & Asset Risk | Financial Services - Transformation & Development
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Requisition ID:**
176277
  
  
Established in the 1930s as a trading business, Al-Futtaim Group today is one of the most diversified and progressive, privately held regional businesses headquartered in Dubai, United A”rab Emirates. Structured into five operating divisions; automotive, financia
data.jd_text:
**Job Requisition ID:**
176277
  
  
Established in the 1930s as a trading business, Al-Futtaim Group today is one of the most diversified and progressive, privately held regional businesses headquartered in Dubai, United A”rab Emirates. Structured into five operating divisions; automotive, financial services, real estate, retail and healthcare; employing more than 35,000 employees across more than 20 countries in the Middle East, Asia and Africa, Al-Futtaim Group partners with over 200 of the world's most admired and innovative brands. Al-Futtaim Group’s entrepreneurship and relentless customer focus enables the organisation to continue to grow and expand; responding to the changing needs of our customers within the societies in which we operate.
  
  
By upholding our values of respect, excellence, collaboration and integrity; Al-Futtaim Group continues to enrich the lives and aspirations of our customers each and every day.
  
  
**Overview of the role:**
The Head of Data Science & Asset Risk owns the end-to-end analytics, forecasting and risk intelligence that protects and optimizes Al-Futtaim’s automotive and financial services portfolio.
  
  
This role is accountable for turning data, AI and market intelligence into financial outcomes, ensuring that pricing, leasing, provisioning, capital allocation and portfolio strategy are driven by forward-looking, explainable and regulator-ready models.
  
  
The position operates at the intersection of CFO-level financial control, CRO-level risk management and CDO-level analytics leadership, supporting executive and Board decision-making across the group.
  
  
**What you will do:**
The role is responsible for the full lifecycle of assets and market intelligence, from data to financial decision-making.
  
  
This includes:
  
  

* Owning all Residual Value, used-car pricing and market forecasting used across the business
* Maintaining authoritative market indices, price curves and forward-looking scenarios for all brands, powertrains and segments
* Defining and enforcing the Asset Risk Framework covering market risk, EV transition risk, concentration risk and volatility
* Providing risk-driven inputs to IFRS9, provisions, ECL and capital planning
* Ensuring all models are auditable, explainable and regulator-ready

The Head of Data Science & Asset Risk acts as the single source of truth for:
  
  

* Portfolio value
* Forward price risk
* Stress scenarios
* Financial impact of market movements

This role chairs the Residual Value & Risk Committees, translating complex analytics into clear financial actions for the CFO, CRO and Executive Management.
  
  
Strategic & Commercial Impact
  
  
The role directly influences:
  
  

* Vehicle pricing and lease structures
* Portfolio profitability and risk appetite
* Provisioning and capital allocation
* OEM negotiations and product launches
* Remarketing and stock strategy

Decisions supported by this function materially impact P&L, balance sheet and return on assets.
  
  
Technology, Data & AI Ownership
  
  
The role owns the group’s AI-driven asset intelligence platform, including:
  
  

* Data pipelines across Brands, dealers, auctions, web and internal systems
* Forecasting, valuation and risk models
* Executive dashboards and real-time reporting The mandate is to continuously replace external vendors and manual processes with in-house, scalable AI, delivering higher accuracy, faster decisions and material cost savings.

Leadership & Governance
  
  
The Head of Data Science & Asset Risk:
  
  

* Leads a senior team of Data Scientists and Analytics specialists
* Defines modelling standards, governance and validation
* Ensures outputs are trusted by Finance, Risk and Commercial tems
* Acts as the group’s technical authority on asset valuation and risk.

**Required Skills to be successful:**

* Deep hands-on technical and analytical expertise, including Python, SQL, large-scale data extraction, and building advanced statistical and machine-learning models.
* Ability to turn data into actionable insight, translating complex analysis into clear decisions with measurable business impact.
* Strong data governance and risk discipline, ensuring models are explainable, controlled, and suitable for regulated environments.
* Proven leadership and executive influence, able to build scalable teams and drive adoption at the senior-management level.

**About the Team:**

* You will be reporting to Chief Risk Officer

**What equips you for the role:**

* 10+ years in Statistics, Data Science, Risk, Pricing, Forecasting or Financial Modelling
* Experience in automotive, asset finance, banking, insurance or large portfolios
* Proven ownership of P&L-critical models
* Strong background in IFRS9, ECL, stress testing or portfolio risk
* Comfortable operating at CFO, CRO and Board level

We’re here to provide excellent service but a little help from you can ensure a five-star candidate experience from start to finish.
  
  
Before you click “apply”: Please read the job description carefully to ensure you can confidently demonstrate
**why**
this opportunity is right for you and take the time to put together a well-crafted and personalised CV to further boost your visibility. Our global Talent Acquisition team members are all assigned to specific businesses to ensure that we make the best matches between talent and opportunities. We not only consider the requisite compatibility of skills and behaviours, but also how candidates align with our Values of Respect, Integrity, Collaboration, and Excellence.
  
  
As part of our candidate experience promise, we also want to make ourselves available to you throughout the application process. We make every effort to review and respond to every application.
