data.jd_text:
**Head of Sales & Marketing**
ELE Interior Design
  
  
ELE Interior Design is a premium luxury design studio based in Dubai, known for creating bespoke, high-end residential and commercial spaces. We combine creative excellence with strategic business growth, delivering unforgettable environments for discerning clients.

**Role Overview:**
  
We are seeking an experienced Head of Sales & Marketing to lead the company’s commercial growth and brand-building efforts. You will be responsible for setting and executing strategic sales and marketing plans, driving revenue and elevating brand presence in the market and leading a high performance team. This role is both strategic and hands-on approach, requiring creativity, leadership and a strong business expertise.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities:**

**Strategic Sales & Growth**

Lead the development and execution of sales strategies to achieve revenue targets.

Conduct market research, competitive analysis and bran positioning overview to identify new opportunities in the Market.
  
Set sales goals, sales KPI’s and track performance records to deliver measurable outcomes..

Build and maintain strong relationships with high-value clients of ELE Interior Design

**Sales Management & Client Engagement**

Manage the full sales cycle, from lead generation and qualification to proposals, presentations, negotiations, and deal closure.
  

Supervise CRM systems, sales pipelines, forecasting, and monthly reporting to Studio Management.

Ensure timely follow-up on leads, proposals, and client communications to maximize conversion rates.
  

Represent ELE Interior Design in client meetings, pitches, presentations, exhibitions, and major business and networking events.

Lead pricing strategies, commercial proposals, and contract negotiations, ensuring alignment with ELE’s premium positioning and profitability goals.
  

Collaborate closely with design and project teams to ensure client expectations are clearly translated into deliverables.

Monitor client satisfaction and post-project engagement to support retention, referrals, and upselling opportunities.

**Marketing, Brand and Lead Generation Strategy
  
  
Brand Positioning & Strategy**

Defined and execute a complete marketing strategy aligned with ELE’s luxury design and premium positioning in UAE Market.

Elevate brand awareness and perception among high-net-worth individual (HNW)

Ensured all communications aligned with and reflected the brand’s sophisticated identity

**Digital Marketing Lead Generation**

Responsible for attracting potential customers and creating and categorizing high-quality, engaging content across multiple social media platforms to grow audiences and drive interaction.

Plan and execute multi-channels campaign planning, execution and performance optimization.

Manage SEO, Google Ads, paid social media campaigns, and performance marketing to generate qualified lead.

Manage email marketing, CRM workflows, newsletters, and automated engagement journey.

Monitor digital performance metrics to optimize strategic campaigns and ROI.

**PR & Media Collaboration**

Manage relationships with PR agencies including, photographers, videographers, and design publications.

**Reporting & Optimization**

Monitor and report on key metrics, sales KPI’s and marketing campaign performance.

Use date insights to optimize strategy and improve ROI.

Manage budget and allocate resources effectively.

**Leadership & Internal Collaboration**
Lead and mentor Sales and Marketing team, setting goals and performance expectations.

Work closely with design team, project delivery and operations team to ensure smooth execution.

Align with the team for sales and marketing plans to maintain consistency.

Requirements
  
  

**What We’re Looking For**

· A hands-on approach with a ‘can-do’ spirit

· Must be proactive with a meticulous eye for detail.

· Proven leadership experience in sales and marketing, preferably in luxury services, design and real estate or private sectors.

· Strong strategic thinking and excellent communication.

· Track record of meeting sales goals and driving brand growth

· Well experience with CRM systems and marketing analytic tools

· Proactive, result-oriented with strong leadership capability.

* Good networking skills.
* Tenacity and drive to seek new business and meet or exceed targets.
* An excellent manner for making initial contact and for ongoing communication with customers and business associates.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills - needed for communicating with a wide range of people, both internally and externally.
* A professional manner and presentable appearance for meeting customers/clients.
* Initiative and good decision-making skills.

Benefits
  
  

**Benefits:**

* Competitive Salary and an Uncapped Sales Commission
* Laptop & Phone
* Medical Insurance & Visa

· Laptop & phone to be provided

Office Timing: Monday to Friday 9am - 6pm.
  
Location: Our Studio is based Al Quoz 4

data.title: AVP - Head of Customer Intelligence & Insights Activation
data.raw_snippet: The Customer Intelligence & Insights is accountable for establishing and leading the enterprise-wide customer intelligence capability for DIB. This role owns the definition, integration, and interpretation of customer intelligence across all customer touchpoints — digital, branch, contact centre, co
data.jd_text:
The Customer Intelligence & Insights is accountable for establishing and leading the enterprise-wide customer intelligence capability for DIB. This role owns the definition, integration, and interpretation of customer intelligence across all customer touchpoints — digital, branch, contact centre, complaints, social, surveys, and external signals — transforming fragmented data into a single, actionable view of customer reality. The role goes beyond analytics execution to define how the bank understands customers, translating behavioural, attitudinal, and experiential signals into clear customer outcomes (e.g. acquisition quality, activation, attrition, retention, cross-sell, loyalty) and driving insight-led actions across Business, Digital, Operations, Service, and Transformation functions. This is a strategic yet highly action-oriented leadership role, requiring strong judgement, enterprise influence, and the ability to connect insight to decision-making at scale.

**Key Responsibilities:**

Enterprise Customer Intelligence Ownership

• Own and define the enterprise Customer Intelligence Framework, setting how customer data is aggregated, synthesised, interpreted, and activated across the bank.

• Integrate multiple sources of customer insight, including:

o Voice of Customer (VOC), complaints, and contact centre interactions

o Digital behaviour and transactional signals

o Surveys, research, social listening, and external benchmarks

• Establish a single, coherent view of customer reality, moving the organization away from siloed, channel-specific analytics.

• Oversee model development and rules for Next Best Action and Personalized Actions (propensity, eligibility, affordability, suitability) with Data Science and Risk.

• Oversee predictive churn modeling and segmentation (save‑ability, value at risk, reason codes), with governance for drift monitoring and bias checks.

• Supervise CLV modeling and calibration, including back‑testing, stability monitoring, and bias/fairness checks; chair model change control with Model Risk/Governance

• Lead pricing and value‑proposition design for bundles, including benefit tiers, fee waivers, rewards, and thresholds; run A/B and multivariate tests to optimize take‑up and profitability

• Establish experimentation at scale A/B test creatives, timing, channels, and incentives; optimize for incremental lift and CLV impact, not just click‑through.

2. Strategic Insight to Business Action

• Translate customer intelligence into clear implications for customer outcomes, including:

o Acquisition quality and onboarding effectiveness

o Activation and usage behaviour

o Attrition risk and early-warning indicators

o Retention, engagement, and cross-sell opportunities

• Drive insight-led prioritisation for:

o Segment and proposition strategy

o Customer lifecycle design and activation

o Journey redesign and service model improvements

• Ensure insights are decision-ready, outcome-oriented, and tied to enterprise priorities.

3. Enterprise Influence & Governance

• Act as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders across Business, Digital, Operations, Service, and Transformation.

• Present customer intelligence and implications to senior management and governance forums, influencing prioritisation and investment decisions.

• Embed customer intelligence into enterprise decision-making, rather than post-hoc reporting.

4. Intelligence Frameworks & Advanced Analytics

• Define standards for customer analytics and insight development, including:

o Predictive and diagnostic modelling

o Segmentation, personas, and value-driver analysis

o Root-cause and systemic issue analysis

• Guide the application of AI and advanced analytics to uncover patterns and risks while ensuring interpretability and business relevance.

• Provide oversight in the architecture, development, and ongoing maintenance of CoCE‑specific data schemas and data marts, ensuring alignment with enterprise analytics and governance standards.

• Partner closely with Data Engineering and SPBA teams to ensure data quality, availability, and responsible use.

5. Data Quality, Governance & Compliance

• Serve as the data steward for the CoCE team and work closely with the data governance team to ensure adherence to governance standards and compliance requirements.

• Oversee the implementation of data‑quality controls, including validation checks, ongoing monitoring, and exception‑handling processes to ensure reliable and trusted data.

• Ensure full compliance with DIB’s data‑security, privacy, and regulatory obligations, providing oversight and direction to uphold enterprise‑wide risk and control requirements.

• Provide oversight for the continuous curation and maintenance of the CoCE report inventory, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and relevance for business and governance needs.

6. Leadership & Capability Building

• Lead, mentor, and develop the Customer Intelligence team, raising analytical maturity and business acumen.

• Build enterprise data literacy and insight adoption, ensuring stakeholders understand and act on insights.

• Oversee the continuous enhancement of dashboards, insight packs, and executive-level intelligence outputs.

7. Risk, Ethics & Governance

• Ensure all analytics and insight activities comply with data privacy, regulatory, and ethical standards.

• Establish governance around insight interpretation and usage to avoid misrepresentation or unintended customer harm.

**Education & Work Experience:**

• Degree in Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, or related field; MBA preferred.

• 10-12+ years of experience in customer analytics, customer insights, strategy, or customer-led

transformation

• Demonstrated experience operating at enterprise or group level, not function-specific analytics

• Demonstrated Experience with report and dashboard development tools such as PowerBI, SAP

Business Objects, Tableau, etc

• Proven ability to translate customer insight into business and customer outcomes

• Banking or financial services experience strongly preferred

data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**

The Head of Strategy, PMO & Digital Transformation & Business Planning is responsible for leading the organization’s strategic direction, enterprise project governance, digital transformation initiatives, and business planning processes. This role ensures alignment between corporate
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**

The Head of Strategy, PMO & Digital Transformation & Business Planning is responsible for leading the organization’s strategic direction, enterprise project governance, digital transformation initiatives, and business planning processes. This role ensures alignment between corporate strategy, project execution, and operational planning while leveraging IT systems and data analytics to drive performance and sustainable growth. The role plays a critical part in enhancing organizational effectiveness by integrating strategy, PMO governance, digital capabilities, and structured planning frameworks.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Corporate Strategy & Business Planning**

* Lead the development and execution of corporate strategy aligned with organizational goals.
* Drive annual business planning cycles including budgeting, forecasting, and long-term planning.
* Translate strategic objectives into actionable initiatives and measurable outcomes.

**PMO & Project Governance**

* Establish and lead the Project Management Office (PMO) to ensure effective project governance and execution.
* Define and standardize project management methodologies, tools, and reporting frameworks.
* Oversee the project portfolio to ensure alignment with strategic priorities, timelines, and budgets.

**Digital Transformation & IT Enablement**

* Drive digital transformation initiatives across the organization to enhance efficiency and innovation.
* Oversee implementation, optimization, and utilization of ERP systems (preferably SAP).
* Collaborate with IT teams to improve system integration, automation, and digital capabilities.

**Business Planning & Performance Management**

* Lead performance management frameworks including KPIs, dashboards, and reporting mechanisms.
* Monitor organizational performance and provide insights to senior leadership for decision-making.
* Ensure alignment between strategy, planning, and execution across all business units.

**Operations & Business Support**

* Oversee business support functions to ensure efficient and effective operations.
* Manage budgeting, cost optimization, and resource allocation across functions.
* Support operational teams with tools, systems, and administrative services required for execution.

**Data & Analytics**

* Establish data-driven decision-making practices through analytics and reporting tools.
* Develop dashboards and performance tracking systems to support leadership insights.

**Risk, Compliance & Governance**

* Ensure compliance with regulatory, legal, and industry requirements.
* Identify strategic and operational risks and implement mitigation strategies.
* Maintain governance frameworks across strategy, PMO, and planning functions.

**Stakeholder Management**

* Engage with senior leadership, internal stakeholders, and external entities including government and regulatory bodies.
* Ensure effective communication and alignment across all levels of the organization.

**Continuous Improvement & Innovation**

* Identify opportunities for process optimization, efficiency improvements, and cost savings.
* Promote innovation through digital tools, analytics, and best practices.

**Business Continuity**

* Develop and implement business continuity and emergency response plans.
* Ensure organizational resilience and readiness for disruptions.

**Job Knowledge & Skills**

* Strong expertise in
  **strategy development, business planning, and execution frameworks**
  .
* Advanced knowledge of
  **PMO governance and project portfolio management**
  .
* Solid background in
  **IT systems, ERP (SAP preferred), and digital transformation initiatives**
  .
* Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making capabilities.
* Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and communication skills.
* Proven ability to manage cross-functional teams and drive organizational change.

**Experience and Qualification:**

* Minimum
  **12+ years of experience**
  , including:
* 5+ years in a
  **senior leadership or head-level role**
* Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field or master’s degree (MBA or equivalent) is preferred
* Proven experience in
  **Strategy, PMO, Digital Transformation, and Business Planning**
* GCC experience is a strong advantage

data.title: Head of Marketing Research and Experience
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Summary**
We're looking for a sharp, curious, and commercially minded Head of Marketing Research & Customer Experience to join our leadership team. You'll own the insight engine that powers our marketing, product, and growth decisions while ensuring every touchpoint a customer has with us is
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
We're looking for a sharp, curious, and commercially minded Head of Marketing Research & Customer Experience to join our leadership team. You'll own the insight engine that powers our marketing, product, and growth decisions while ensuring every touchpoint a customer has with us is informed by real data, not gut instinct. This is a high-impact role that sits at the intersection of research, analytics, customer strategy, and growth marketing. You'll be equal parts analyst, strategist, and storyteller - able to translate complex data into clear actions that move the business forward.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Market & Competitive Research**

* Lead our market intelligence function; tracking trends, competitor moves, and emerging opportunities in the fintech landscape.
* Commission and run both qual and quant research programs (surveys, focus groups, desk research, third-party data).
* Provide leadership with regular, decision-ready briefs on market dynamics and whitespace opportunities.
* Build and maintain a competitive intelligence framework that keeps us ahead of the curve.

**Customer Insights & Brand Tracking**

* Own the growth VOC program end-to-end, designing listening posts across the customer lifecycle and turning feedback into insight
* Partner with Product, Marketing, and Commercial teams to ensure customer perspectives directly inform roadmap and GTM decisions.
* Develop and maintain rich customer personas and segmentation models that reflect how our customers actually behave.
* Own brand health tracking program with external partners and internal stakeholders

**CX Data & Analytics**

* Work closely with our Data team to build dashboards and insight frameworks that track customer sentiment, behaviour, and experience metrics (NPS, CSAT, CES, etc.).
* Define and own the research tech stack; from survey tools to analytics platforms.
* Champion a data-driven culture across the marketing function, raising the bar on how we measure and report on customer outcomes.
* Turn raw numbers into clear narratives for exec and board-level audiences

**Leadership Attributes**
Platform Thinking.
  
  
Ability to optimize growth across a portfolio of services rather than a single product.
  
  
**Growth Orientation**
Deep understanding of user acquisition, engagement, retention, and monetisation levers.
  
  
**Commercial Acumen**
Strong instinct for identifying scalable revenue opportunities within large digital user bases.
  
  
**Data Fluency**
Ability to translate analytics and experimentation into strategic decision-making.
  
  
**Collaborative Leadership**
Comfort working across product, marketing, data, and commercial teams to deliver platform-wide growth
  
  
**Requirements**

* 8+ years in marketing, consumer insights, or customer experience roles.
* At least 3 years in a leadership or management capacity.
* Proven track record in a tech, fintech, or connectivity services environment.
* Experience designing and running both quantitative (surveys, conjoint, segmentation) and qualitative (depth interviews, focus groups, ethnography, usability testing) research.
* Strong command of CX measurement frameworks (NPS, CSAT, CES) and journey mapping methodologies.
* Significant experience in managing marketing research with external partners and internal stakeholders.
* Preference for a multi role expertise including commercial, brand management and, digital marketing.
* Excellent analytical skills; comfortable with data, statistical methods, and research tools

data.jd_text:
**Why Join Hantec Trader?**

As Hantec Trader has grown we require a dedicated support agent who will be able to provide support to customers via multiple channels but also act as a liaison for internal teams in resolving complex issues. With our volume in South America increasing, the need for a PT speaker has increased.

**Role Overview:**

We are seeking a commercially driven and data led Head of Performance Marketing to lead our global acquisition strategy across all paid media and performance channels.

In this role, you will own the end to end growth engine, from strategic planning and funnel design through to optimisation, attribution, and measurable revenue impact. You will play a critical role in scaling customer acquisition, improving conversion efficiency, and maximising long term customer value through data driven and AI powered strategies.

You will collaborate cross functionally with CRM, Product, Data, Compliance, and Creative teams to deliver a seamless and high performing customer journey across global markets.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Performance Strategy and Growth**

Define and execute full funnel acquisition strategies across Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, Microsoft Ads, programmatic, and affiliate channels

Drive scalable customer acquisition and revenue growth across key international markets

Continuously optimise CAC, ROAS, and customer lifetime value

**Funnel and Conversion Optimisation**

Own and enhance the full customer journey from ad to landing page to onboarding to retention

Lead CRO initiatives to improve landing pages, forms, and conversion flows

Partner with CRM teams to strengthen retargeting and lifecycle marketing strategies

**Tracking, Data and Attribution**

Oversee tracking infrastructure including UTM governance, GTM, and GA4 implementation

Develop and refine event based tracking frameworks

Improve attribution accuracy and performance measurement across channels

**AI, Testing and Creative Performance**

Leverage AI tools to drive creative production, testing, and optimisation

Build and scale structured A B testing frameworks across campaigns and landing pages

Collaborate closely with Creative teams to identify and scale high performing assets

**Budget and Performance Governance**

Own budget allocation across channels and geographies to maximise return on investment

Scale high performing campaigns while maintaining efficiency benchmarks

Deliver clear performance insights and strategic recommendations to senior leadership

**Skills and Experience:**

* 7 plus years experience in performance marketing, including team leadership
* Strong background within fintech, trading, or proprietary trading environments
* Proven expertise across Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, Microsoft Ads, and programmatic platforms
* Deep understanding of GTM, GA4, attribution modelling, and conversion tracking
* Experience using AI tools for optimisation, automation, and creative testing
* Highly analytical with strong stakeholder management and communication skills

**What we offer:**

* Annual Ticket Home - 2,500 AED a year offered after 1 year of employment
* VISA Sponsorship
* Health Insurance
* Annual Discretionary Bonus Pool – rewarding high performance
* Monthly $100 Core Values Nominations – recognition for living our values
* Quarterly Core Values Winner – exclusive dinner with our Directors
* Yearly Core Values Champion – an all-inclusive paid work trip to one of our global offices
* Work from Other Offices – flexibility to work remotely from our worldwide locations (at employee’s expense)

data.title: Chief Technology Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a globally regulated financial services and fintech group with a strong presence across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and Australia. The organization operates across multi-asset trading, digital assets, and financial technology infrastructure, providing institutional and
data.jd_text:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a globally regulated financial services and fintech group with a strong presence across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and Australia. The organization operates across multi-asset trading, digital assets, and financial technology infrastructure, providing institutional and retail clients with access to advanced trading platforms, liquidity solutions, and financial services.

With a growing global footprint and continued investment in technology, the group is focused on strengthening its trading infrastructure, expanding its product offering, and enhancing platform scalability, reliability, and performance across multiple regulated markets.

**Role Overview**

The Chief Technology Officer will lead the group’s global technology function, overseeing engineering, architecture, infrastructure, and security across all trading and financial platforms.

This role is responsible for ensuring the stability, scalability, and performance of high-volume trading systems while driving continuous improvement and modernization of the technology landscape. The CTO will work closely with executive leadership, product, trading, and compliance teams to align technology delivery with business objectives and regulatory requirements.

**Role Responsibilities**

* Define and execute the overall technology strategy aligned with the group’s global growth and product roadmap
* Lead and scale engineering teams across development, infrastructure, DevOps, and platform architecture
* Oversee the design, performance, and reliability of trading platforms, including pricing, execution, risk, and back-office systems
* Ensure high availability, low latency, and resilience of systems supporting real-time trading operations
* Drive modernization initiatives across cloud infrastructure, automation, and system architecture
* Establish and enforce engineering standards, governance frameworks, and best practices across global teams
* Work closely with product, trading, compliance, and operations teams to support platform enhancements and new product launches
* Ensure compliance with regulatory, cybersecurity, and data protection requirements across multiple jurisdictions
* Manage technology budgets, vendor relationships, and third-party service providers
* Lead incident management, disaster recovery, and business continuity planning across all systems
* Provide strategic input to executive leadership on technology investments, risks, and opportunities

**Role Requirements**

* 15+ years of experience in technology leadership roles within financial services, fintech, or trading environments
* Proven experience leading engineering teams and delivering large-scale, high-performance technology platforms
* Strong background in trading systems, brokerage platforms (MT4/MT5), or financial market infrastructure
* Experience with low-latency systems, real-time data processing, and high-availability architectures
* Solid understanding of risk systems, liquidity integration, and trading platform ecosystems
* Experience with cloud platforms, DevOps practices, and modern software development methodologies
* Strong knowledge of regulatory and security requirements in financial services environments
* Demonstrated ability to lead global teams across multiple regions and functions
* Strong stakeholder management skills with experience working closely with executive leadership

data.raw_snippet:

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operati
data.jd_text:
Our client is a well-established, diversified group and market leader in the automotive space in Saudi Arabia. The organization plays a critical role in its sector and is recognized for operational scale, brand strength, and financial depth.

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operational transformation, the group is seeking to appoint a
**Chief Executive Officer**
to join the executive leadership team. This role will partner directly with the Board of Directors to drive financial strategy, optimize capital structure, enhance governance, and support sustainable expansion across multiple business divisions.

This opportunity is suited to a commercially driven finance leader with experience in large-scale, multi-entity operations and strong exposure to working capital-intensive environments.

**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – Automotive Dealership Group (KSA)**

**Overview**

A leading automotive dealership group in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia is seeking a dynamic and commercially driven
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO)**
to lead the organization through its next phase of growth, operational excellence, and digital transformation.

The CEO will be responsible for driving profitability, strengthening OEM partnerships, expanding market share, and positioning the business as a leading mobility solutions provider in line with Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Leadership**

* Define and execute the company’s long-term strategy across vehicle sales, aftersales, and mobility services
* Align business strategy with Vision 2030, including localization, digitization, and sustainability initiatives
* Identify new revenue streams (EVs, fleet solutions, leasing, mobility platforms, etc.)

**Commercial & Financial Performance**

* Deliver top-line growth and optimize EBITDA across all business units
* Drive vehicle sales (retail, fleet, government) while maximizing aftersales profitability
* Ensure strong working capital management, inventory optimization, and cost discipline
* Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and financial performance tracking

**OEM & Partner Management**

* Maintain and strengthen relationships with global automotive OEMs
* Negotiate favorable commercial terms, distribution rights, and performance incentives
* Ensure compliance with OEM standards across showrooms, service centers, and brand representation

**Operational Excellence**

* Optimize dealership operations across sales, service, parts, and logistics
* Drive performance improvement initiatives across the branch network
* Enhance customer experience and retention through best-in-class service delivery

**Digital Transformation & Innovation**

* Lead digitalization across sales channels, CRM, and aftersales platforms
* Implement data-driven decision-making and performance dashboards
* Explore e-commerce, online car sales, and integrated mobility ecosystems

**People & Culture**

* Build and lead a high-performing executive team
* Drive a performance-oriented culture with strong governance and accountability
* Develop Saudi national talent in line with Saudization requirements

**Governance & Stakeholder Management**

* Report directly to the Board of Directors and shareholders
* Ensure strong corporate governance, compliance, and risk management frameworks
* Represent the company with regulators, government entities, and key stakeholders

**Candidate Profile**

**Experience**

* 15–20+ years of experience in automotive, mobility, or related sectors
* Proven CEO / Managing Director / GM experience within a large dealership group or automotive distributor
* Strong track record of delivering growth and profitability in complex, multi-branch operations
* Experience working with international OEMs is essential
* Prior experience in the GCC / Saudi Arabia is highly preferred
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, or related field
* MBA or equivalent postgraduate qualification preferred

**Skills & Competencies**

* Strong commercial acumen with deep understanding of dealership economics (sales, aftersales, parts)
* Strategic thinker with hands-on operational leadership capability
* Expertise in turnaround, scaling, or transformation environments
* Strong financial literacy and performance management skills
* Excellent stakeholder management and negotiation skills
* Visionary yet execution-focused
* High resilience and adaptability in a fast-evolving market
* Strong people leadership and cultural intelligence
* Entrepreneurial mindset with a focus on innovation

data.title: Chief Information Security Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a long-established, globally regulated financial services group with operations across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and beyond. The organization operates across multi-asset brokerage (FX, CFDs, commodities, and equities), payments, and digital asset platforms, serving a
data.jd_text:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a long-established, globally regulated financial services group with operations across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and beyond. The organization operates across multi-asset brokerage (FX, CFDs, commodities, and equities), payments, and digital asset platforms, serving a large international client base within highly regulated environments.

As the group continues to scale its technology, trading infrastructure, and digital asset offerings, cybersecurity and information security governance have become a critical priority at the executive level.

**Role Overview**

The Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) will lead the group’s global cybersecurity strategy, ensuring the protection of trading platforms, payment infrastructure, client data, and digital assets across multiple jurisdictions. This is a highly strategic and hands-on leadership role, requiring deep experience in financial services, brokerage, or crypto environments, with the ability to operate in real-time, high-risk, and regulated ecosystems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and execute the group-wide information security and cybersecurity strategy aligned with business growth and regulatory requirements
* Establish and oversee security governance frameworks, policies, and controls across all entities and jurisdictions
* Lead threat detection, incident response, and cyber risk management, particularly across trading systems and digital platforms
* Ensure security of trading infrastructure, including low-latency systems, APIs, and client-facing platforms
* Oversee cloud security, network security, and application security across distributed environments
* Collaborate closely with Technology, Product, Compliance, Risk, and Operations teams to embed security into all systems and processes
* Manage security operations (SOC), penetration testing, vulnerability management, and red teaming activities
* Ensure compliance with global regulatory frameworks (e.g., DFSA, FCA, ASIC, MiCA, GDPR) and cybersecurity standards (ISO 27001, NIST, etc.)
* Lead third-party/vendor risk assessments, particularly for liquidity providers, PSPs, and technology partners
* Provide regular executive-level reporting to senior leadership and the board on cybersecurity posture, risks, and incidents
* Build and lead a high-performing global security team

**Requirements**

* Proven experience as a CISO, Head of Information Security, or equivalent leadership role
* Strong background within financial services, brokerage (FX/CFDs), fintech, payments, or digital assets/crypto
* Deep understanding of trading platforms, financial systems, and real-time infrastructure risks
* Experience operating in multi-jurisdictional, regulated environments
* Strong knowledge of cybersecurity frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, CIS, etc.)
* Hands-on experience with cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern security architectures
* Demonstrated experience managing security incidents, breaches, and crisis response
* Ability to operate at both strategic and technical levels
* Strong stakeholder management skills, with experience engaging C-level executives and regulators
* Relevant certifications preferred (CISSP, CISM, CISA, or similar)

data.jd_text:
Co-founder for fundraising and scaling.

IntelliVerse - AI Universe, including:

OneClickTrip - your smart AI-powered travel planner. Plan your dream vacation with one click. Simply describe your dream trip or upload inspiration, and instantly get a personalized plan for each day with transportation options, hotel links, budget estimates, and local tips—all in one click.

CheapTrip - Unique search engine that finds the cheapest ways between cities, combining flights, buses, trains and ferries.

DietTracker - helps users monitor their intake of calories, fats, proteins, carbohydrates, vitamins, and minerals in food. It not only counts these elements, but also analyzes what is absorbed by the body after digestion. Users can upload images of products, after which the application recognizes the ingredients and provides the ability to edit the list.

SchoolKiller - AI assistant for schoolchildren and students.

StyleTranslator - converts text to different styles, tones and languages.

Matter of choice - interactive scenarios for studying different subjects, languages and decision making.

VirtualClone - AI-Powered Digital Twin from Your YouTube

At VirtualClone, we transform YouTube channels into AI digital twins. Our technology transcribes your videos, learns your expertise, and creates a text-based assistant that communicates with your audience in multiple languages.

✨ Key Features:

Primary input: YouTube videos (auto-transcription & knowledge extraction).

Additional inputs: websites, articles, and other content.

Engage your audience with answers in your authentic style — or choose from different styles (educational, inspiring, business-focused, casual).

Expand your reach with multilingual content and SEO-ready text.

Save time, scale your presence, and never leave your audience without an answer.

We don’t just replicate — we amplify your voice and adapt it to new contexts.

data.title: Chief AI Officer - Partner/Associate Partner - AI Transformation
data.raw_snippet:
**Chief AI Officer [Partner/Associate Partner AI Transformation]**
Abu Dhabi or Dubai

Job Description

**ROLE OVERVIEW**

The Chief AI Officer leads and oversees the strategy and execution of the organisation's Digital, Data and AI transformation initiatives, ensuring alignment with the government
data.jd_text:
**Chief AI Officer [Partner/Associate Partner AI Transformation]**
Abu Dhabi or Dubai

Job Description

**ROLE OVERVIEW**

The Chief AI Officer leads and oversees the strategy and execution of the organisation's Digital, Data and AI transformation initiatives, ensuring alignment with the government entity's broader digital objectives and vision. The AI Officer is the key leader and highest authority for Digital, Data and AI decision-making within the entity, providing comprehensive strategic direction to drive digital innovation and operational efficiency.

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**

**1. Digital Strategy and Vision**

* Set the entity's digital agenda, aligning it with the government's digital vision and emerging technologies and trends
* Collaborate and coordinate closely with central government digital teams
* Lead the development and refinement of the entity's AI and data strategies
* Oversee enterprise architecture, ensuring support for digital, data, and AI initiatives
* Manage budgeting and resource allocation for digital programmes

**2. Digital Transformation Execution**

* Oversee the entity's digital initiatives, including flagship projects and the digitalisation of core services
* Coordinate closely with internal IT teams on infrastructure and cloud initiatives
* Lead the deployment of innovative digital solutions, ensuring seamless end-to-end user experiences
* Monitor progress, manage risks, and drive continuous improvement across transformation programmes

**3. AI and Data Enablement**

* Lead the implementation of AI and data strategies and initiatives
* Oversee the prioritisation and delivery of AI and analytics use cases, including the development and deployment of AI agents and machine learning models
* Ensure robust data governance frameworks and AI ethics policies are in place|

**4. Governance and Compliance**

* Oversee digital governance frameworks and ensure compliance with data privacy, cybersecurity, and AI ethics regulations
* Monitor adherence to policies, managing risks and maintaining accountability across digital efforts
* Act as the highest review and escalation point for all Digital, Data and AI activities within the entity

**5. Innovation and Capability Building**

* Build and strengthen internal capabilities in digital, AI, and data, fostering a culture of innovation and service excellence
* Promote digital literacy and upskill employees across the organisation

**6. Performance and Value Realisation**

* Define and track performance metrics to ensure strategic alignment and outcome achievement
* Drive and monitor the realisation of value from digital investments

**7. Stakeholder Engagement**

* Engage with internal and external stakeholders to define and drive the delivery of the Data, AI and Digital agenda
* Proactively drive alignment, integration and collaboration across key vendors and partners

**QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS**

**Experience**

* AP or Partner level with an MBB or equivalent.
* 12+ years in digital, AI, and data programme leadership, with a proven track record in large-scale transformation, ideally in government or complex environments
* Extensive experience in setting and executing digital, data and AI strategies

**Technical Knowledge**

* Strong foundations in digital technologies, AI, machine learning, data management and data-driven decision making
* Proficiency in budgeting, financial planning, and resource optimisation

**Leadership & Soft Skills**

* Demonstrated leadership, organisational, and senior-level management experience
* Advanced skills in communication, stakeholder engagement, and change management
* Strong strategic thinking, analytical, and problem-solving skills
* Arabic speaking (nice to have)

**Education**

* Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field
* Master's degree or MBA with a focus on relevant domains is preferred
* Relevant Data, AI and Digital certifications are preferred

Exclusively managed by oryxsearch.

data.title: Group Chief Marketing Officer - Dubai
data.raw_snippet:
**About Medetone**
Medetone is a dynamic and fast-growing online pharmacy that prioritises customer care and innovation in healthcare delivery. We are committed to providing customers a seamless, safe, and efficient service. We offer prescription medications, over-the-counter products, and personali
data.jd_text:
**About Medetone**
Medetone is a dynamic and fast-growing online pharmacy that prioritises customer care and innovation in healthcare delivery. We are committed to providing customers a seamless, safe, and efficient service. We offer prescription medications, over-the-counter products, and personalised healthcare services.
  
  
**Base salary**
Up to 450,000 AED per year
  
  
**Role Overview**
We're seeking an experienced and visionary Chief Marketing Officer to join our senior leadership team on-site in Dubai. Reporting directly to the CEO, the CMO will be a strategic partner.
  
  
You will drive measurable business growth through OOH marketing, PR campaigns, and performance marketing, aligning with our rapid expansion across the UK, Europe and Dubai. You will play a critical role in leveraging AI in marketing and growth strategies, increasing market share, building brand awareness, and leading community engagement initiatives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Growth Strategy & Leadership: Shape and implement a comprehensive growth strategy aligned with business objectives, driving customer acquisition, revenue growth, and market expansion
* Integrated Campaign Management: Lead the execution of multi-channel campaigns across PR, OOH, and digital platforms, ensuring consistent messaging and measurable performance
* Brand & PR Leadership: Develop and execute brand strategy, managing public relations and media outreach to strengthen brand positioning and visibility
* Community & Market Expansion: Drive initiatives that build and engage communities through partnerships, sponsorships, and strategic activations
* Performance Marketing & Analytics: Oversee performance marketing initiatives, ensuring campaigns are data-driven and AI optimised
* Cross-functional Leadership: Collaborate with internal teams across product, operations, and leadership to align growth initiatives with broader business goals

**Requirements**
**Must Have**

* Proven experience in public relations, branding, and out-of-home (OOH) campaigns
* Strong background in performance marketing and advertising
* Demonstrated success in launching campaigns that increased market share for the company
* Experience building and engaging communities through partnerships and activations
* Minimum 10+ years of senior marketing or growth leadership experience
* Experience leveraging AI in marketing and growth strategies

**Technical Skills**

* Experience across digital marketing platforms and advertising channels
* Strong understanding of creative tools and marketing technologies
* Expertise in brand development and campaign execution

**Leadership & Soft Skills**

* Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams
* Strong management, communication, and decision-making skills
* Highly driven, confident, and adaptable in fast-paced environments

**Nice to Have**

* Background in healthcare, wellness, or e-commerce industries

**Benefits**
**Why Work With Us?**
At Medetone, we are committed to creating a dynamic, innovative workplace where every team member has the opportunity to make a real impact. You'll be joining a rapidly growing company and working alongside a hardworking and talented team that's at the forefront of healthcare innovation, with the chance to contribute to exciting projects that are transforming patient care.
  
  
**What We Offer**

* Access to cutting-edge technology and tools to support your work
* Competitive Salary
* A Collaborative and Inclusive Team Culture
* Pension scheme
* Employee discounts on our healthcare products
* Opportunities for personal and professional development within a forward-thinking company

This is a unique opportunity for a strategic and results-oriented marketing professional to make a significant impact in a fast-growing healthcare organisation. If you're ready to lead and drive excellence, we'd love to hear from you!

data.title: Division CEO (F&B)
data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
French Spirit Coffee Shop is a premium F&B company bringing the elegance of French café culture to international markets. We operate Ladurée franchises in Arabia, China, Egypt, and Morocco, and PAUL in Spain, offering luxury pastries, artisanal breads, and authentic French dining experi
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
French Spirit Coffee Shop is a premium F&B company bringing the elegance of French café culture to international markets. We operate Ladurée franchises in Arabia, China, Egypt, and Morocco, and PAUL in Spain, offering luxury pastries, artisanal breads, and authentic French dining experiences. As we continue to expand our portfolio with more brands and locations, we are seeking a visionary Division CEO to lead our international operations and drive sustainable growth.
  
  
**Role Overview**
The Division CEO will provide overall leadership, guidance, and strategic direction for French Spirit Coffee Shop LLC. Reporting to the Group CEO, you will drive business growth, operational excellence, and organizational performance across all markets. You will oversee long and short-term strategies, manage resources, build and lead the executive team, and ensure alignment with the Board of Directors’ objectives. This role requires strategic vision, operational expertise, and strong leadership capabilities, with some international travel expected.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategy & Business Growth**

* Develop and execute high-quality business strategies aligned with short- and long-term objectives.
* Make informed investment and expansion decisions to drive growth and profitability.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key partners, stakeholders, and shareholders.
* Analyze challenges and implement solutions to ensure sustained business growth.

**Operations & Performance Management**

* Oversee all operations and business activities to ensure alignment with strategy and mission.
* Develop and implement operational policies, sales strategies, and systems to maximize revenue and market share.
* Ensure the company meets its annual sales and performance targets.

**Finance & Resource Management**

* Oversee fiscal activities including budgeting, reporting, auditing, and resource allocation.
* Review financial and non-financial reports, recommend improvements, and manage resources within budget guidelines.

**Human Resources & Leadership**

* Lead, motivate, and develop a high-performing managerial and operational team.
* Ensure compliance with legal guidelines, in-house policies, and ethical standards.
* Promote a positive work environment, employee engagement, and talent development.

**Project & Brand Management**

* Plan, manage, and monitor projects, ensuring quality, timely delivery, and risk mitigation.
* Maintain brand standards across all functions, ensuring consistent customer experiences.
* Monitor food safety compliance, cost control, and operational efficiency across all stores and labs.

**Qualifications & Experience**

* Proven experience of atleast 10 years as a senior executive managing multiple international brands and markets, preferably in F&B or hospitality.
* Demonstrated success in strategic leadership, business growth and expansion, and brand management across geographies.
* Strong financial acumen with experience managing P&L, budgeting, forecasting, and resource allocation.
* Expertise in operational excellence, project and risk management, and multi-country compliance.
* Excellent leadership and communication skills, with the ability to inspire and motivate high-performing cross-cultural teams.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or a related field; MBA or equivalent preferred.
* Additional certifications in leadership, project management, or international business are a plus.
* Willingness to travel internationally as required.

**Why Join Us?**
Lead a dynamic, growing F&B company operating globally recognized brands. Shape the future of the company, expand our international footprint, and deliver authentic experiences to new markets worldwide.

data.jd_text:
**Role:**
Product CTO – Crypto Exchange

**Location:**
Dubai

Our client is launching a next-generation
**Centralized Crypto Exchange (CEX)**
and looking for a hands-on
**Product CTO**
to architect and build the entire trading infrastructure from scratch.

This is a founding-level role with full ownership of the exchange’s technical backbone.

**🛠 What You’ll Own**

* High-performance order matching engine
* Real-time, low-latency trading systems (WebSockets)
* Order book, clearing & settlement architecture
* Custody integrations (Fireblocks, Copper, BitGo)
* Market surveillance tools (Solidus Labs, Chainalysis)
* Technical sections of exchange license applications (Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority, Monetary Authority of Singapore, Financial Conduct Authority)

✅ Must-Have

* 5+ years building trading systems (CEX/DEX/traditional)
* Experience with high-performance matching engines
* Strong understanding of custody & wallet infrastructure
* Real-time, low-latency systems expertise
* Exposure to crypto regulatory frameworks (VARA/MAS/FCA)

⭐ Nice-to-Have

* Built exchange from 0 → 1
* Managed $100M+ daily trading volume
* Smart order routing/liquidity aggregation
* Market making or algorithmic trading knowledge

If you’ve built exchange infrastructure before and want to lead one end-to-end, let’s talk. Apply directly to this job or send your CV to Jinal@fintop.co.uk

data.title: Senior Specialist - Dubai Licensing CEO's Office
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**

Advance Licensing Agency strategy and execution by coordinating correspondence, committees, programs, contracts, and resilience; delivering data-driven reports and value management controls; and aligning plans and budgets with the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) Corporate Plan.
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**

Advance Licensing Agency strategy and execution by coordinating correspondence, committees, programs, contracts, and resilience; delivering data-driven reports and value management controls; and aligning plans and budgets with the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) Corporate Plan. Supervise the preparation and follow-up of the organization's developmental and executive plans. Supervise the formation of resilience groups and teams and monitor the implementation of the comprehensive organizational resilience map.

**Roles and Responsibilities**

**Strategy**

• Support the preparation and follow-up of developmental and executive plans, including analysis of the current state, opportunities, challenges, and risks, and consolidation of reports for leadership.

• Provide analytical and advisory support to strategic planning frameworks aligned with the RTA Corporate Plan, including participation in priority settings and annual CAPEX/OPEX planning.

• Contribute and supervise the agency's strategic roadmap, recommend milestones and performance checkpoints and coordinate alignment with long-term objectives.

• Advice and support with data, Artificial Intelligence (AI), and Proof of Concept (PoC) use cases to support strategic initiatives; ensure adherence to institutional documents

• Support the structuring and mobilization of agile cross-functional teams (tribes/squads) and contribute to the setup and sustainment of Objectives and Key Results (OKRs).

• Ensure the implementation of the agency’s Agility Transformation Roadmap by tracking adoption of adaptive operating models across the agency.

**Operations**

• Review outgoing and incoming correspondence for the CEO, maintain official records, and follow up on the closure of recommendations.

• Review strategic plans and project reports to ensure quality, completeness, and accuracy.

• Supervise and advice on implementation of directives and recommendations from the Director General, Board of Directors, and CEO with concerned units, ensuring required reviews and opinions.

• Monitor contractual plans, contract status, and budget disbursement plans, and submit periodic project and budget reports to leadership.

• Support and monitor the implementation of the agency’s Agility Transformation Roadmap by tracking adoption of adaptive operating models across the agency.

• Follow up on the formation of resilience groups and teams and track progress against the organizational resilience implementation map.

• Review and validate contractual data across all stages, including change orders, by analyzing root causes, justifications, and preparing recommendations.

• Advise partnerships, service providers, operators, memberships, agreements, and performance level agreements and follow up on compliance actions.

• Advise the committees related to Project /Contractof committees/external teams and internal committees formed by the CEO; plan agendas, action registers, and submit periodic report

• Provide input to support the communication plan, internal/external visits (including field visits and official duties), and organizational unit for readiness for senior leadership visits.

• Monitor programs and projects, assess risks and challenges, track performance, and submit periodic progress and completion of reports.

• Oversee the delivery status of digital transformation initiatives and assure periodic performance reporting to the CEO

**Product / Process Improvement**

• Contribute to the enhancement of governance templates, data quality, and change control documentation for contracts and projects to improve decision lead times, traceability, and benefits realization.

• Monitor and report on the implementation status of the agency’s digital transformation agenda and agency roadmap, ensuring initiatives are progressing in line with approved plans.

• Review and validate program and project data across all stages, including project transfer requests and change orders, and prepare analytical recommendations and reports.

• Support the application of value management principles during project phases by tracking benefits, validating asset lists, and disseminating lessons learned and leading practices.

• Participate with functional units in the assessment of consultancy and contractor proposals to safeguard agency interests and outcomes.

• Advise with departments to ensure strategic alignment and performance accountability and recommend training needs to build capacity for strategy implementation

**Physical Working Conditions**

• Office-based role with periodic on-site and field presence to support internal and external visits, readiness checks, and leadership-related activities.

**Job Qualifications & Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree/Master’s degree in Engineering or Business Administration
* 9-11 years of experience in strategy execution, program/contract governance, committee coordination; exposure to digital/AI use cases
* Certifications such as Agile/Scrum or SAFe (for tribes/squads), Lean/Six Sigma, ISO 9001 internal auditor

data.title: Chief Specialist - Technical Support  - Executive Affairs
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**

Drive expert-level project governance and technical assurance across enterprise initiatives. Review

and advise on cross-sector project reports, audits, and portfolio policies. Standardize project management practices and tools, develop capabilities, and deliver decision-ready mater
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**

Drive expert-level project governance and technical assurance across enterprise initiatives. Review

and advise on cross-sector project reports, audits, and portfolio policies. Standardize project management practices and tools, develop capabilities, and deliver decision-ready materials for

leadership and committees.

**Roles and Responsibilities:**

**Strategy**

* Monitor strategic plan execution and performance indicators, analyze outputs, and submit reports to leadership.
* Identify focus areas and strategic challenges, track progress with concerned departments, and submit periodic reports.
* Recommend actions aligned with government directions, ensure executive plans are prepared with concerned departments and monitor their execution.
* Follow up performance of main committees chaired by leadership with concerned departments.
* Supervise important committees, review outputs, report performance, and recommend corrective actions on deviations.
* Coordinate data, systems, and tools with concerned departments to enable informed decisions by the Director General (DG)/Chairman.
* Follow up on major projects and related teams, submit performance reports, and review outputs.
* Review and synthesize technical reports from institutions and sectors, provide technical opinions and solutions, and prepare reports per leadership directives.

**Operations**

* Prepare for leadership technical meetings and visits-agendas, documents, and minutes-and participate in external boards/committees; prepare and review technical reports/memoranda for stakeholders.
* Support and facilitate workshops on feasibility studies, ROI, cost analysis, technical specifications, alternatives analysis, and project management.
* Design, develop, and manage internal project-management software applications and tools to improve business performance.
* Review and audit engineering, IT, and other projects; advise on appropriate technical solutions; provide technical advice on reports from external parties and across sectors and institutions.
* Provide expert assistance to project managers on assigned engineering projects.
* Participate in committees related to engineering projects, including evaluation of control centers.

**Process/Product Improvement**

* Train and mentor project managers (SME Development Program); support PMOs with guidance and executive materials; develop and deliver PM/enterprise PM communications capabilities as directed.

**Physical Working Conditions**

* Conduct site visits to ongoing/completed projects and service facilities, collect required data and observations for official reports, track corrective actions with teams, and be available after hours for site visits, emergencies, urgent meetings, and ad-hoc tasks.

**Job Qualifications & Requirements :**

**Education**

* Bachelor’s degree/ master’s degree in civil/ mechanical/electrical engineering, Project Management, Industrial Engineering

**Experience**

* 9+ Years in case of master’s degree (11+ years in case of bachelor’s degree)

We are seeking a commercially driven and data-led Chief Digital Marketing Officer (CDMO) with deep experience in the telecommunications sector to lead digital growth, customer acquisition, and transformation across the Group.

The CDMO will play a critical role in scaling digital sale
data.jd_text:
Role Overview

We are seeking a commercially driven and data-led Chief Digital Marketing Officer (CDMO) with deep experience in the telecommunications sector to lead digital growth, customer acquisition, and transformation across the Group.

The CDMO will play a critical role in scaling digital sales channels, enhancing customer experience, and driving subscriber growth, ARPU, and retention across mobile, broadband, and converged offerings.

Key Responsibilities

Digital Growth & Commercial Strategy

* Define and execute a digital-first growth strategy across mobile, broadband, fibre, and bundled products
* Drive online subscriber acquisition and digital revenue contribution across all markets
* Partner with Commercial, Product, and Technology teams to align pricing, packaging, and go-to-market strategies

Performance Marketing & Acquisition

* Own all digital acquisition channels (paid media, SEO/SEM, affiliates, programmatic, social)
* Optimize customer acquisition cost (CAC) while maximizing lifetime value (LTV)
* Lead data-driven campaign execution with continuous testing, attribution modelling, and ROI optimisation

Digital Sales & Channels

* Scale and optimise direct-to-consumer digital channels (web, app, e-commerce platforms)
* Increase digital penetration of sales and self-service across all product lines
* Drive online conversion improvements through funnel optimisation and UX enhancements

Customer Lifecycle & Retention

* Lead CRM, lifecycle marketing, and personalization strategies to reduce churn and increase engagement
* Implement targeted campaigns for upsell, cross-sell, and bundle adoption
* Utilize behavioural data and segmentation to improve retention and ARPU

Telecom KPI Ownership

* Monitor and optimise key telecom metrics including:
* Subscriber growth & net adds
* ARPU and revenue mix
* Churn and retention rates
* Digital sales penetration
* Conversion rates across digital funnels

MarTech, Data & Analytics

* Own and evolve the marketing technology stack (CRM, CDP, automation, analytics platforms)
* Build advanced analytics capabilities (customer insights, predictive modelling, segmentation)
* Leverage AI and automation to drive campaign performance and customer experience

Brand, Content & Digital Presence

* Lead digital brand strategy and execution across all channels
* Oversee content, social media, and digital communications aligned to commercial goals
* Ensure consistent brand positioning across markets and customer touchpoints

Transformation & Innovation

* Drive digital transformation initiatives across marketing and customer engagement
* Champion agile ways of working and experimentation culture
* Identify new digital revenue streams (VAS, fintech, content partnerships, etc.)

Leadership & Stakeholder Management

* Build and lead a high-performing, multi-market digital marketing team
* Manage external agencies, media partners, and technology vendors
* Collaborate with Technology, Data, and Customer Experience teams to deliver end-to-end digital excellence

Key Requirements

Experience & Background

* Proven experience in a senior digital marketing leadership role within a telecommunications operator or digital telecom ecosystem
* Strong track record in driving digital subscriber growth and online revenue
* Experience managing large-scale performance marketing budgets with clear ROI accountability

Telecom Expertise

* Deep understanding of telecom products: mobile, broadband, fibre, enterprise solutions, and bundled offerings
* Strong grasp of telecom commercial levers including pricing, promotions, and distribution channels
* Experience working with high-volume customer bases and subscription models

Technical & Digital Skills

* Expertise in performance marketing, SEO/SEM, paid media, and programmatic
* Strong knowledge of CRM, marketing automation, and customer data platforms (CDPs)
* Experience in conversion rate optimisation (CRO) and digital funnel management
* Familiarity with telecom digital ecosystems (apps, self-care portals, e-commerce journeys)

Leadership & Attributes

* Highly commercial, data-driven, and results-oriented
* Strategic thinker with strong execution capability
* Ability to operate in complex, multi-market environments
* Strong stakeholder management and executive presence

data.title: Chief Executive Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**We are seeking Disruptive Entrepreneurs with Great Networking, Strategic, Execution & Business Advisory Skills and NOT Pure Job Seekers.**

**About the Company**

FranchiseBazar is expanding across the UAE and searching for passionate, high-caliber individuals ready to establish and scale their ow
data.jd_text:
**We are seeking Disruptive Entrepreneurs with Great Networking, Strategic, Execution & Business Advisory Skills and NOT Pure Job Seekers.**

**About the Company**

FranchiseBazar is expanding across the UAE and searching for passionate, high-caliber individuals ready to establish and scale their own franchise consultancy. Become the Co-founder /Co-Owner/CEO/MD of your business, backed by the global expertise of FranchiseBazar, and play a pivotal role in accelerating franchising and new business models in the UAE market.

**About the Role**

As a Chief Executive Officer / Managing Partner, Co-Founder & Country Master Franchisee Owner, you’ll lead a dynamic business in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Al Ain, or Ajman, representing FranchiseBazar’s portfolio of 4000+ global and regional brands.

**Responsibilities**

* Connect entrepreneurs, business buyers, investors, and SMEs with innovative franchise business opportunities every day.
* Advise SMEs, family offices, and local businesses to become franchise-ready and drive scalable growth.
* Enable UAE-based brands to expand across the Middle East, Indian Subcontinent, and beyond — while bringing international brands to the UAE.
* Offer A-Z franchise development solutions and be integral to the evolution of business models in one of the world’s hottest commercial hubs.

**Qualifications**

* Senior Investors / Management professionals (CXO, Director, Partner, VP, Head of Business, Consultants) looking for high-growth business and franchise opportunities.
* Minimum investment of 150,000 AED and a 300 sq ft dedicated office in Dubai (or similar commitment in other major UAE cities).
* If you are already operating a consultancy / advisory / brokerage business - franchise consultancy could be a natural diversification + addition and you could start getting great results and profitability, instantly.
* Option to start as a unit franchisee in major cities for 100,000 AED in Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Al Ain, Ajman.

**Required Skills**

* Well-networked individuals in UAE’s business, investment, real estate, government, and corporate sectors.
* English fluency is a must; knowledge of Arabic or other languages is a strong plus.
* Ability to recruit, manage, and inspire a branch network, as well as collaborate with other consultants, brokers, real estate professionals, and financial advisors.
* Proven business development skills and daily access to entrepreneurs, investors, and new clients from your existing network.

**Preferred Skills**

* Experience in business advisory, consulting, investment deals, franchise or business brokerage, or management roles or real estate or franchise sales or franchise consulting.
* Strong track record in new business development, franchising, sales strategies, retail, construction, banking, financial advisory, or event management.
* Working successfully with entrepreneurs, start-ups, business buyers, and investors.
* Experience in corporate leadership, B2B consulting, strategy, or building high-level client relationships.

**Pay range and compensation package**

* Operate as a business owner under an exclusive country license — not as an employee.
* Potential to earn a 70% share of revenues from your deals closed, with no upper limit.
* Pure performance-based remuneration: the more you scale your consulting and franchise sales business, the more you earn.
* Access to world-class training to become a certified franchise consultant in UAE.

**Equal Opportunity Statement**

No fixed monthly packages – this is an entrepreneurial, commission-only growth model built for leaders ready to make their mark in the booming franchise and consulting sector of the UAE.

Ready to Own Your Success? If you’re hungry to launch a franchise consulting business in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah or any major UAE city, have the required investment, and possess a network you believe in, this is your platform!

We are also seeking Exclusive Master Franchise Partners for Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Egypt, Turkey & Jordan. Ask for a Detailed Presentation Should you be interested in any of the above country.

Email your CV with the subject “YES I Am Interested to Explore A Country Master Franchisee” to MENA@FranchiseBazar.com.

Let’s connect and write your next success story together!

data.title: Senior Vice President, Head of Strategy and Planning - Business Banking Group
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Role:**

The Head of Strategy & Planning acts as a key strategic partner to the Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) – Business Banking, driving the strategic direction, commercial planning, and execution agenda of the Business Banking division. This role shapes the medium- and long-term strat
data.jd_text:
**About the Role:**

The Head of Strategy & Planning acts as a key strategic partner to the Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) – Business Banking, driving the strategic direction, commercial planning, and execution agenda of the Business Banking division. This role shapes the medium- and long-term strategy, aligns it with market opportunities and internal capabilities, and translates it into actionable plans. It leads Cost Management, Planning, and Customer Segmentation functions, supported by a Strategy Manager, forming the central strategy office for Business Banking, and reports directly to the Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) – Business Banking.

**What You’ll Be Doing:**

* Define and drive Business Banking strategy in alignment with the bank’s overall direction.
* Monitor market trends, regulatory changes, and emerging technologies to identify opportunities and risks.
* Translate insights into strategic recommendations and initiatives.
* Develop annual and multi-year strategic and financial plans.
* Oversee planning and budgeting processes, ensuring alignment with strategic priorities.
* Track performance against plans and recommend corrective actions.
* Maintain dashboards and executive-level reporting for transparency.
* Lead cost optimization initiatives to improve cost-to-income ratio.
* Ensure efficiency and productivity while maintaining customer experience.
* Develop segmentation frameworks for targeted propositions and pricing strategies.
* Use analytics to shape product development and channel strategy.
* Drive transformation projects, process reengineering, and digital enablement.
* Act as business owner for cross-functional initiatives with clear success metrics.
* Lead and develop teams in Cost Management, Planning, and Customer Segmentation.
* Foster collaboration across Finance, Risk, Operations, and Digital functions.
* Represent Business Banking in strategic forums and committees.

**What We’re Looking For:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics (Master’s preferred).
* 10–15 years of banking or financial services experience, with at least 5 years in strategy or planning leadership.
* Strong understanding of Business Banking products and market dynamics in UAE/GCC.
* Proven track record in strategic planning and business transformation.
* Exceptional analytical, commercial, and leadership skills.

**Skills:**

* Strategic Planning & Execution
* Financial Planning & Performance Management
* Market & Competitor Analysis
* Cost Optimization
* Customer Segmentation & Insights
* Strategic Thinking & Commercial Acumen
* Leadership & Team Development
* Stakeholder Management & Communication
* Analytical & Problem-Solving
* Execution Excellence & Results Orientation

**What You’ll Gain:**

* Competitive compensation and performance-based incentives
* Medical coverage for you and your family
* Comprehensive life insurance
* Exposure to high-impact strategic projects
* Supportive and inclusive workplace culture
* Opportunities for career advancement and professional development

data.jd_text:
Madison Pearl is working closely with a leading global alternative investor headquartered in the GCC. They are looking to hire a senior risk professional with around 10 – 12 years’ experience gained working within an alternative investment environment. The right candidate would have the ability to lead risk management efforts across investment, operational and capital.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead risk management for the institution across financial risk, operational risk and capital risk.
* Lead risk oversight across financial services, products, funds, capital and liquidity management, business continuity planning, regulatory risk and compliance.
* Risk Reporting for ICAAP and preparing risk dashboards for governance bodies, including the board risk committee and fiduciary committee.
* Oversee the consolidation and recommend the departmental budget and monitor financial performance versus the budget.
* Supervise third-party/vendor risk management and cyber resilience assessments.

**Key Requirements:**

* 10 – 12 years’ experience within a buy side institution across financial and non-financial risk.
* In depth experience to private markets investment management.
* A deep familiarity to a regulatory environment such as DIFC or ADGM.
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in financial, Economics, Risk or related field.
* CFA or FRM are highly advantageous.

**If you are interested in discussing this mandate, please contact Damion Cubitt on damion.cubitt@madisonpearl.com**

**\*Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted\***
