data.title: Senior Program Manager
data.raw_snippet:
Senior Program Manager
  
Meet myZoi
  
myZoi is changing lives for the better for those who deserve it the most. We are an exciting fintech start-up aiming to promote financial inclusion globally. Our vision is to provide a level playing field to the unbanked and the underbanked in accessing essent
data.jd_text:
Senior Program Manager
  
Meet myZoi
  
myZoi is changing lives for the better for those who deserve it the most. We are an exciting fintech start-up aiming to promote financial inclusion globally. Our vision is to provide a level playing field to the unbanked and the underbanked in accessing essential financial services in an affordable, convenient, and transparent fashion. We are looking for smart, ambitious, and purpose-driven individuals to join us in this journey.
  
Position
  

The Senior Program Manager is responsible for leading complex, cross-functional programs that deliver and enhance myZoi’s product ecosystem. Reporting into the Enterprise PMO, the role translates strategic, product, and regulatory objectives into structured programs comprising multiple interdependent projects.

The role requires strong understanding of end-to-end fintech product delivery, customer journeys, regulatory constraints, and operational impacts, combined with disciplined governance and execution.

Key Responsibilities
  
  
**Program Leadership & Delivery**

* Lead end-to-end delivery of large, multi-workstream programs spanning myZoi’s product landscape.
* Structure programs into clearly defined projects, workstreams, milestones, and outcomes.
* Ensure programs are delivered on time, within scope, budget, and quality expectations.

Product & Business Alignment
  
  
  

* Partner closely with Product Management to translate product roadmaps into executable delivery plans.
* Maintain strong understanding of myZoi’s products, customer journeys, and operating model.
* Ensure alignment between customer experience, regulatory requirements, and technical implementation.

Governance, Control & PMO Alignment
  
  
  

* Deliver programs in line with standards, governance frameworks, delivery methodologies.
* Establish and manage integrated program plans, RAID logs, and change control processes.
* Provide consolidated, high-quality reporting to PMO governance forums and senior leadership.
* Ensure governance remains lightweight, value-driven, and aligned to industry-standard frameworks rather than bespoke internal processes.

Cross-Functional Stakeholder Management
  
  
  

* Lead coordination across Technology, Product, Risk, Compliance, Operations, Finance, and external partners.
* Act as the single point of contact for program-level risks and issues.
* Facilitate steering committees, PODs, and decision forums.

Risk, Compliance & Regulatory Delivery
  
  
  

* Ensure programs address all relevant risk, compliance, and regulatory requirements.
* Work closely with Risk and Compliance teams to embed controls into design and delivery.
* Support audits, regulatory reviews, and remediation initiatives.

Financial & Resource Management
  
  
  

* Own program-level budgets, forecasts, and financial tracking in partnership with Finance.
* Manage resource planning across multiple delivery teams and vendors.
* Oversee third-party and vendor delivery where applicable.

Continuous Improvement & Capability Building
  
  
  

* Capture lessons learned and apply best practices to future programs.
* Support Project & Portfolio Managers within the PMO.
* Contribute to the ongoing maturity of processes, standards, and ways of working.

Qualifications
  
  
Experience
  
  
  

* 12-15+ years of experience in program/project management within fintech (Digital Product)/financial services.
* Proven experience delivering complex, product-led programs in regulated environments.
* Experience in leading regulatory enabled strategic programs
* Strong track record working with PMOs and enterprise governance frameworks.
* Experience with tech delivery coordination in hybrid mode with cloud native in-house built platform/outsourced delivery model.

Skills & Expertise
  
  
  

* Experience operating within Lean-Agile delivery models, including PI planning and structured prioritization frameworks.
* Ability to apply standardized industry frameworks (e.g., SAFe principles, Agile governance) without adding unnecessary process.
* Strong understanding of fintech product lifecycles and end-to-end delivery.
    
  - Excellent program structuring, dependency management, and execution skills.
    
  - Strong stakeholder management and executive communication capabilities.
    
  - Experience with Agile, Waterfall, and hybrid delivery models and tools (JIRA, Confluence).
* Experience in orchestrating Product, Operations and Technology, SLODs, commercial, Business Development and external partners.
* Ability to understand the strategic and financial implications of trade-offs and translate them into the program delivery scope and requirements.
* Ability to challenge and support Product and Tech on architecture, sequencing, and trade‑offs between scope, risk and time‑to‑market.

Education & Certifications
  
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Finance, or a related field.
* PMP, PgMP, SAFe, or equivalent certifications preferred.

Personal Attributes
  
  
  

* Strategic yet execution-focused.
* Comfortable operating in matrix and regulated environments.
* Strong ownership mindset and attention to detail.
* Passion for purpose-driven fintech and financial inclusion.

**At myZoi we strive to create a both a product and a team that embraces equality, inclusion, diversity and freedom. We want people who can be themselves and bring their own brand of value to the team. Come and join us!**

data.jd_text:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
Technical Program Management Analyst I, Launch Graduate Program 2026 - Dubai, United Arab Emirates
  
  
Technical Program Management Analyst I, Launch Graduate Program 2026 - Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE Nationals preferred)
  
  
**Launch Program**
Mastercard Launch is an 18-month global development program providing recent graduates with opportunities and exposure. You will not only enhance your professional growth and skills in a global setting, you’ll launch your Mastercard career.
  
  
**Technical Program Management Analyst I**
As a Technical Program Management Analyst, you will Work across teams to:
  
  

* Organize and accelerate delivery, ensuring all teams are delivering in a coordinated manner.
* Track and manage manifest definitions, release integration, timing, scope and delivery.
* Provide ongoing updates (with data) on the state of delivery.
* Proactively manage all dependencies, ensuring all outputs are production ready at launch.

**What you’ll need**

* To be available to start from 1st September 2026
* To be a Final Year Undergraduate/Masters students or to have graduated no earlier than September 2025
* Analytical and problem-solving skills
* Strong strategic and conceptual aptitude
* Ability to multi-task and prioritise multiple projects concurrently
* High-energy, can-do attitude, very strong sense of ownership

**Corporate Security Responsibility**
All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
  
  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

data.title: Senior Manager Project Controls
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**Job Overview:**
The Senior Manager Project Controls requires an in-depth understanding of Project Controls concepts, theories, principles, and basic knowledge of other related disciplines. The Senior Manager of Project Controls must be able to apply industry standards to improv
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Job Overview:**
The Senior Manager Project Controls requires an in-depth understanding of Project Controls concepts, theories, principles, and basic knowledge of other related disciplines. The Senior Manager of Project Controls must be able to apply industry standards to improve effectiveness, provide guidance, and influence process improvements. The Senior Manager of Project Controls is required to identify and resolve technical, operational, and organizational problems that negatively impact the organization. Decisions made by the Senior Manager of Project Controls should be guided by internal policies, best practices, budgets, and the business plan.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Key Tasks and Responsibilities:**

* Oversee and manage Project Controls activities throughout the EPFCI project lifecycle
* Must have a thorough understanding of the contract requirements of the project they are assigned to
* Provide planning supervision and direction
* Directly work with the Project Manager/Director to provide visibility into the project schedule, its status, forecast completion dates, and provide alternatives in cases where mitigation is required
* Develop and implement comprehensive cost control strategies, policies, and procedures in line with industry standards and best practices
* Collaborate with project managers, engineers, and stakeholders to establish schedule and cost control baselines and ensure adherence to budgetary and contractual constraints
* Monitor project expenditures, including material costs, labor, expenses, and subcontract cost to identify cost-saving opportunities and mitigate potential overruns
* Conduct regular cost performance reviews and variance analyses to assess project financial health and provide actionable recommendations for cost optimization
* Implement efficient cost-reporting systems and tools to provide accurate and timely financial information
* Lead a team of Project Controls professionals by providing guidance, training, and performance evaluations to ensure high-quality deliverables and continuous improvement
* Collaborate with procurement and contract management teams to evaluate and negotiate vendor contracts, ensuring cost-effectiveness and compliance with project requirements
* Ensure adherence to McDermott systems and processes
* Ensure that the project develops and maintains an overall integrated Level 3 schedule
* Proactively manage the schedule; review and use late and look ahead reports to achieve the same
* Progress the schedule on an ongoing basis and analyze the impact
* Proactively manage all functional deliverables using the look-ahead process
* Liaise with the Project Functional Managers and critical vendors to ensure that the EPFCI schedule is developed at the required level of detail that will enable proper management and execution of the scope of work
* Ensure Risk & Opportunity strategies are communicated effectively and understood across the organization
* Promote the active management and harvesting of opportunities across projects
* Monitor for effectiveness and assist in the implementation of the Business Management System
* Support duties related to Risk & Opportunity function, as directed by the Project Director
* Execution Risk Management

+ Facilitate the risk management process for projects in execution supporting the mitigation of risks identified in the tender stage and continuous identification of risks along the project execution path
+ Roll out of project risk & opportunity management program to project team ensuring that roles, responsibilities, requirements, deliverables, and expectations are understood and agreed
+ Maintain a schedule of monthly engagements with the project team and management to ensure timely and accurate updating of the risk register and associated mitigation activities
+ Execute service agreement with the project manager to assure full alignment on how risk management will be applied to the project and any project-specific deliverables
+ Provide management with a strategic view of key risks impacting cost and schedule

* Support monthly CSRA (cost & schedule risk analysis)
* Own and lead the implementation, enforcement, and verification of compliance with all McDermott policies and procedures
* Ensure employees understand their responsibility and authority to effectively implement the requirements of all McDermott policies and procedures
* Ensure the timely completion of all mandatory training by themselves and their teams

**Qualifications**
**Essential Qualifications and Education:**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Business Administration, or a related field
* Proven experience of at least 14+ years in cost control or project controls roles within the EPCI industry
* Strong knowledge of project cost control methodologies, including earned value management (EVM), cost forecasting, and risk analysis
* Proficient in using industry-standard cost control software and tools (e.g., Primavera P6, SAP, Excel) to analyze data, generate reports, and support decision-making processes
* Excellent analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex financial data and provide actionable insights
* Demonstrated leadership abilities, including experience in managing and developing an effective team
* Communication and presentation skills, both written and spoken
* Computer literate in Microsoft programs: Word, Access, PowerPoint, Excel, Project

**About Us**
Our ingenuity fuels daily life. Together, we’ve forged some of the most trusted partnerships across the energy value chain to make what was once just an idea a reality: laying subsea infrastructure thousands of feet below sea level, installing platforms hundreds of miles from shore, using our expertise to design and build offshore wind infrastructure, and reshaping the onshore landscape to deliver the energy products the world needs safely and sustainably.
  
  
For more than 100 years, we've been making the impossible possible. Today, we're driving the energy transition with more than 30,000 of the brightest minds across 54 countries.

data.title: Technical Project Manager, Payments Consulting
data.raw_snippet:
**Technical Project Manager, Payments**

Fime is a globally recognised international player providing deep expertise across digital payments, mobility services, and digital identity. We work with leading organisations worldwide to solve complex challenges, identify emerging opportunities, and future
data.jd_text:
**Technical Project Manager, Payments**

Fime is a globally recognised international player providing deep expertise across digital payments, mobility services, and digital identity. We work with leading organisations worldwide to solve complex challenges, identify emerging opportunities, and future-proof their strategies.

Our team of 900+ experts operates in over 20 locations around the globe, delivering solutions that support millions of transactions every day, across global markets. What sets us apart is our values: we are curious, creative, and highly collaborative, with a strong commitment to integrity - we do the right thing for our clients, our people, and our shareholders.

At Fime, the work is varied and intellectually stimulating. No two days are the same, and you will be surrounded by smart, engaged colleagues who value learning and continuous improvement.

**Move. Pay. Trust.**

**Where identity, money, and movement connect.**

**MISSION**

As a Technical Project Manager, Payments your mission is to successfully plan, execute, and deliver projects while ensuring adherence to scope, timeline, budget, and quality standards. You will lead project teams, manage resources and risks, and maintain effective communication with stakeholders (after identifying internal & external stakeholders). By applying Fime – Consult Hyperion project management framework (PM@CHyp) principles, you will oversee project execution, monitor progress, and address deviations promptly. Your goal is to achieve the project objectives, optimize resource utilization, and foster a positive team dynamic. Throughout the project lifecycle, you will proactively manage risks, ensure stakeholder engagement, and implement quality control measures. Ultimately, your mission is to drive the project successfully, promote continuous improvement, and deliver valuable outcomes that meet stakeholder expectations.

Projects scope includes delivering consultancy services and certification test platforms to the Payment, Smart Mobility and Digital Identity ecosystems stakeholders. Main customers are International and Domestic Payment Schemes, Payment Service Providers, Financial Institutions, Transport Authorities, Digital Identity Service Provider.

**ACTIVITIES**

* **Project Planning**
  : Collaborate with stakeholders to define project goals, objectives, scope, and deliverables. Develop a comprehensive project plan, including task breakdown, timeline, resource allocation, and risk management strategies.
* **Team Management**
  : Assemble and lead project teams, assign activities, provide guidance, and foster collaboration. Ensure effective communication, resolve conflicts, and motivate team members to achieve project objectives.
* **Project Execution**
  : Oversee the execution of project activities, ensuring that tasks are completed as per the defined plan. Monitor progress, track milestones, and manage any deviations or issues that arise during project implementation.
* **Scope and Change Management**
  : Manage project scope by defining and controlling project boundaries. Evaluate change requests, assess their impact, and implement changes while maintaining project objectives and minimizing scope creep.
* **Stakeholder Management**
  : Engage with project stakeholders, including clients, sponsors, and team members. Maintain regular communication, manage expectations, and address stakeholder needs and concerns throughout the project lifecycle.
* **Risk Management**
  : Identify, assess, and manage project risks. Develop risk mitigation and contingency plans to minimize the impact of potential risks on project outcomes. Monitor risks and take proactive measures to address them.
* **Quality Assurance**
  : Establish quality control processes to ensure that project deliverables meet defined standards and stakeholder expectations. Conduct regular reviews, inspections, and testing to maintain high-quality outcomes.
* **Resource Management**
  : Optimize resource allocation to ensure efficient utilization of project resources, including personnel, equipment, and materials. Monitor resource availability, adjust as needed, and manage dependencies.
* **Communication and Reporting**
  : Maintain effective communication channels with stakeholders, providing regular project updates, progress reports, and key milestone achievements. Foster transparent and timely communication to ensure project transparency.
* **Project Closure:**
  Facilitate proper project closure by conducting post-project evaluations, capturing lessons learned, and documenting project outcomes. Ensure the orderly handover of deliverables and transition of project responsibilities.

**JOB EXPERIENCE**

* At least 7 years’ experience in project management roles, with proven track record of managing complex projects or portfolios
* Proven experience within Payment Schemes, Issuing, Acquiring and Payment Service Providers technical environments and standards. Experience across Fare Collection and Ticketing systems is a welcome advantage

**KNOWLEDGE & SKILLS**

* Master’s degree or equivalent in a relevant field
* Project management certification is a plus (PMP or equivalent)
* Proficiency in project management software/tools
* Customer oriented attitude and good interpersonal and presentation skills
* Outstanding leadership and communication skills
* Strategic thinking and decision-making abilities
* Strong analytical skills, Self-motivated committed and team player
* Advanced risk management and mitigation skills
* Strong negotiation and conflict resolution skills
* Ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams
* Fluency in English

**Contract:**
Permanent

**Starting at the latest:**
ASAP

**Location**
: Dubai, UAE

data.title: Director of Company Operations
data.raw_snippet:

Stake is the MENA region’s leading real estate fintech company, combining real estate expertise and innovative financial technology to deliver products that empower everyone to own and build wealth through Real Estate. Launched in 2021 we have grown rapidly, leveraging decades of ex
data.jd_text:
**Who we are:**

Stake is the MENA region’s leading real estate fintech company, combining real estate expertise and innovative financial technology to deliver products that empower everyone to own and build wealth through Real Estate. Launched in 2021 we have grown rapidly, leveraging decades of experience in technology, financial services and global real estate, to launch the MENA region’s first mobile app for fractional real estate investing.

This is just the beginning and we’re currently searching for highly talented individuals to join and help lead our expansion into international markets and new business lines.

The Leadership Team

At the helm of our startup is a dynamic leadership team. Each member brings a unique blend of expertise and passion, from strategic masterminds to creative trailblazers.

We are looking for a Director of Company Operations who will own and scale Stake’s end-to-end operating platform, driving operational excellence across all properties and business lines. This is a highly strategic and execution-focused role.

The Director of Company Operations will act as a central integrator across the business, ensuring strong coordination between departments, translating strategy into actionable plans, and driving consistent delivery. They will also ensure that new products, verticals, and jurisdictions are operationally ready ahead of launch.

🚀
**What you’ll do:**

Reporting directly to the Co-Founders, the Director of Company Operations will be a core member of the executive leadership team, responsible for building high-performing operational teams, establishing scalable systems and governance, and embedding the processes, controls, and culture necessary for sustainable, multi-jurisdictional growth. This role combines hands-on operational oversight with strategic influence, bridging the gap between vision and day-to-day execution while driving efficiency, performance, and investor trust.

**Operational Leadership & Executive Ownership:**

* Own the full property lifecycle from acquisition to exit across all investment structures
* Oversee and integrate our Business Operations, Property Management, Transactions, and Fix N’ Flip functions in the UAE
* Define and evolve the organisational structure to support scale, multi-vertical growth, and operational efficiency
* Set execution standards, service levels, and operational performance benchmarks across all teams
* Drive transaction efficiency while maintaining strong governance, financial controls, and risk management standards
* Act as the final escalation point for material operational, transactional, or delivery risks
* Maintain high levels of investor trust through operational reliability and transparency

**Cross-Functional Strategy Execution:**

* Lead company-wide initiatives requiring coordination across Operations, Finance, Compliance, Sales, Product and Marketing
* Translate strategic priorities into structured operational roadmaps with clear ownership and accountability across departments
* Ensure operational readiness for new verticals, product launches, regulatory implementations, and geographic expansion

**Systems, Data & Scalability:**

* Institutionalise scalable systems, automation, and reporting frameworks
* Ensure data integrity and a single source of truth across transactions, portfolio performance, and investor operations
* Define clear operational KPIs with executive-level visibility
* Leverage operational data to generate actionable insights for decision-making and portfolio optimisation
* Drive adoption of new systems and processes across teams, embedding best practices and ensuring operational consistency

**Risk, Governance & Controls:**

* Embed strong internal controls across transaction flows, asset management, and capital deployment
* Maintain operational integrity across regulated and multi-jurisdiction environments
* Develop proactive risk monitoring frameworks to identify operational, transactional, and vendor risks early
* Lead incident management and business continuity planning to minimise operational disruption
* Ensure auditability and regulatory alignment across operational processes

**Leadership & Organisational Development**

* Build and lead high-performing operational teams
* Implement clear accountability frameworks and performance metrics
* Foster a culture of ownership, accountability, operational discipline and continuous improvement across teams
* Lead organisational change initiatives that embed scalability, adaptability, and a growth mindset
* Translate strategic priorities into team-level objectives to ensure clarity, accountability, and execution focus

**👀 What we’re looking for:**

* 8+ years of experience leading complex, cross-functional operations within a high-growth, regulated environment. Experience may include top-tier consulting, corporate strategy, and ideally senior operating roles in scaling startups
* Strong understanding of real estate transactions and asset lifecycle management is beneficial
* Proven experience managing complex, multi-team operational environments at scale
* Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional initiatives and translate strategy into operational execution
* Strong financial and commercial acumen
* Systems-oriented, data-driven operator who leverages analytics to optimise operational performance
* Proven track record leading operational transformation and scaling processes

**😇 Why you should join Stake:**

* Hybrid work environment
* Work directly with senior leadership in one of the region’s fastest growing start-ups; you will get exposure to all functions at Stake and have the chance to learn from the very best in the space!
* Generous equity compensation; this aims to bring a high degree of ownership into your work. As Stake grows, you grow with it!
* Budget for learning and development; we want Stakers to constantly strive for personal and professional growth
* Best in class end of service savings scheme; through DIFC-sponsored DEWS programme
* Off-sites and regular team events

Stake has a high performance culture where the bar is always rising. We bring on brilliant, ambitious and curious people who see the value in Stake and want to grow with us.

data.jd_text:
**Operations Director – AI Infrastructure**

**Location:**
Dubai, United Arab Emirates

**Industry:**
Data Center & AI Infrastructure

**Reporting Line:**
Senior Leadership

**Role Overview**

We are partnering with a fast‑growing AI infrastructure company to appoint an experienced
**Operations Director**
to lead the
**execution, governance, and operational control**
of large‑scale AI and data center infrastructure initiatives across the UAE.

This critical leadership role is responsible for ensuring
**seamless project delivery, regulatory compliance, and audit readiness**
, while managing complex vendor ecosystems and government relationships. The successful candidate will serve as the operational backbone of the organization as it scales
**sovereign AI computing capabilities**
in the region.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1. Infrastructure Project Execution & Vendor Management**

* Lead the end‑to‑end coordination of external partners, including data center design consultants, construction firms, IT vendors, and local utility providers.
* Ensure all infrastructure projects are delivered
  **on time, within scope, and to required technical and quality standards**
  .
* Act as the primary escalation point for vendor performance, schedule risks, and delivery issues.

**2. Documentation Control & KYC / Audit Readiness**

* Establish and maintain a
  **centralized document control framework**
  covering all infrastructure and corporate operations.
* Ensure systematic archiving of engineering contracts, government approvals, licenses, leases, and financial records.
* Maintain continuous readiness for
  **KYC, compliance audits, and due‑diligence reviews**
  conducted by global banks, institutional investors, and sovereign wealth funds.
* Enforce strict documentation discipline across all operational activities.

**3. Entity Compliance & Government Relations**

* Serve as the
  **primary custodian of UAE entity compliance**
  , managing interactions with Free Zones, municipal authorities, and regulatory bodies.
* Ensure all corporate licenses, permits, certifications, and land approvals remain valid and compliant at all times.
* Oversee local PRO services to manage visas, labor documentation, and administrative requirements for employees and expatriate executives.
* Proactively manage regulatory risks and compliance timelines.

**4. Administrative & Executive Logistics Oversight**

* Provide high‑standard logistical and administrative support for visiting board members, global investors, and senior government stakeholders.
* Manage executive travel, accommodation, transportation, and meeting arrangements in line with professional and diplomatic standards.
* Support senior leadership with operational readiness for high‑visibility engagements.

**Candidate Requirements**

**Experience**

* **7–10 years**
  of UAE‑based experience in a senior operations role such as
  **Operations Director, Senior Project Manager, or PMO Lead**
  .
* Background in large enterprises, multinational technology companies, or
  **heavy/mission‑critical infrastructure sectors**
  .
* Proven experience supporting
  **data center (IDC) projects**
  or complex, regulated infrastructure environments is highly preferred.

**Core Competencies**

* Strong execution mindset with the ability to translate plans into tangible results within complex vendor and regulatory ecosystems.
* Deep understanding of
  **contract management, documentation standards, compliance, and KYC requirements**
  .
* Proven ability to operate effectively within UAE regulatory frameworks and bureaucratic environments.
* Confident, authoritative leadership style capable of holding external contractors and service providers accountable.
* Excellent problem‑solving skills and sound judgment under pressure.

**Language Requirements**

* Native‑level fluency in
  **English**
  (spoken and written) for business communication and negotiation.
* **Arabic fluency**
  is highly advantageous.

data.jd_text:
In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
  
  
At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential. Unleash your talent and redefine what’s possible.
  
  
**Job Description**
**Assistant Project Manager (UAE National)**
**Dubai, UAE**
Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
**Assistant Project Manager (UAE National)**
to join our team! In this role you will get to join our team of innovators! At Parsons Corporation, we're looking for an amazingly talented Assistant Project Manager to help us change the world. This is an opportunity to be part of a company that values your skills, encourages innovation, and believes in the power of collaboration..
  
  
**What You'll Be Doing**

* Manage and Control Project Communications: You'll be the central hub of information, ensuring clear and effective communication across all project stakeholders.
* Coordinate and Control Deliverables: You'll ensure that all project deliverables are completed on time and meet the highest quality standards.
* Projects' Quality Management: You'll oversee the quality of all project aspects, ensuring that we meet and exceed the expectations of our clients.
* Projects' Reporting: You'll be responsible for regular project reports, keeping everyone informed about the project's progress.
* Stakeholder Management: You'll work closely with all project stakeholders, ensuring their needs and expectations are met.
* Guidance: You'll provide guidance to the team working on the same project, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment.

**What Required Skills You'll Bring**

* Education: Bachelors degree in Business Administration or Engineering or Technology, in such areas as Civil, Electrical, or Mechanical.
* Experience: Fresh graduates with some internship experience are welcome to apply. More experienced candidates are also invited.
* Technical Skills: Working knowledge of AutoCAD and other PC software packages typically associated with engineering is required.
* Project Experience: Experience working on Infrastructure related projects is a plus.
* Must be UAE national.

Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
  
  
We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!
  
  
Parsons is aware of fraudulent recruitment practices. To learn more about recruitment fraud and how to report it, please refer to https://www.parsons.com/fraudulent-recruitment/.

data.title: Project Delivery Manager | Emirati Talent
data.raw_snippet:
**ROLE SUMMARY**

The Project Delivery Manager supports the delivery of Sales & Media initiatives through structured planning, delivery governance, and cross‑functional coordination across Product, Marketing, Commercial, Technology, and Operations. The role ensures delivery discipline, tracks risks
data.jd_text:
**ROLE SUMMARY**

The Project Delivery Manager supports the delivery of Sales & Media initiatives through structured planning, delivery governance, and cross‑functional coordination across Product, Marketing, Commercial, Technology, and Operations. The role ensures delivery discipline, tracks risks and dependencies, aligns go‑to‑market activities, and provides clear reporting to enable smooth, timely launches and strong stakeholder alignment.

**ROLE PROFILE**

* Own structured delivery planning and coordination across Product, Marketing, Commercial, Technology, and Operations
* Maintain prioritised project backlogs aligned to agreed objectives and delivery timelines
* Track progress, dependencies, risks, and issues across multiple workstreams
* Support delivery governance by maintaining plans, logs, decision records, and status reports
* Coordinate go‑to‑market and launch readiness activities across all stakeholders
* Ensure clear documentation, action tracking, and follow‑through from governance forums
* Provide concise and transparent delivery updates to senior stakeholders and leadership
* Support post‑launch reviews and continuous improvement of delivery processes

**REQUIREMENTS**

* 5+ years of experience in project or program management roles
* Proven experience coordinating cross‑functional delivery across Product, Marketing, Commercial, Technology, and Operations
* Strong capability in delivery planning, backlog management, and dependency tracking
* Experience supporting project governance, reporting, and stakeholder communication
* Hands‑on exposure to go‑to‑market or launch coordination activities
* Advanced Microsoft Office skills with the ability to support business cases, proposals, and documentation

data.title: IT Program Delivery Support Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**
To act as the central point of contact for support by area and regional IT Programs deployments. Provide direct local support for all implementations and deployments of DHL services. Provide regular reports to country IT Programs Delivery Manager on status of all projects. To work wi
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
To act as the central point of contact for support by area and regional IT Programs deployments. Provide direct local support for all implementations and deployments of DHL services. Provide regular reports to country IT Programs Delivery Manager on status of all projects. To work with country IT Services Manager and business to ensure that adequate resources for both IT and business are available to support all agreed project plans. Provide support to Infrastructure Manager for facility and infrastructure projects as required
  
  
**RESPONSIBILITES**

* Working relationship with Country business teams, e.g. working with OPS, GTWY, FINANACE, CS & COMMERCIAL teams to deploy EGAP solutions and achieve functional must-do’s and KPIs.
* Working relationship with Regional Program Management to channel requirement and/or change requests and planning Country deployments.
* Working relationships with ITSC’s (and other service providers) to priorities projects, review impact of service performance on issues and requests raised by external or internal customers.
* Manage the project and report regularly against the project plan to ensure visibility of project progress.
* Develop project plans, scope, key stakeholder requirements.
* Monitor investment cost, ensure adequate resources are available.
* Identify project costs and benefits.
* Produce project plans that define the purpose, scope, deliverables and success criteria for each project. Obtain agreement to these plans from all project sponsors.
* Produce or draft a project budget.
* Assemble project teams as appropriate from internal staff and outside vendors.
* Manage the projects according to agreed plans and budgets.
* Identify risks that could impact the completion of the project within budget and on time.
* Escalate issues as appropriate and ensure resolution.
* Complete project “Life Cycle” and ensure project sign off.
* Carry out post project reviews to identify if the originally determined benefits have been realized and take corrective or remedial action as appropriate.
* Manage internal regional or global workgroups to deliver country projects.
* Define the scope and goals of projects to meet the Region or Country’s objectives with the IT Programs Delivery Manager.
* Standardize service portfolio by aligning services offered as per the EGAP portfolio and guidelines.
* Create awareness of solutions and services amongst country business units
* Productize appropriate solutions (as per global direction) to reduce the time to market.
* Optimize business and operations processes via automation
* Manage the project team to ensure the identified project methodology is adhered to and deliverables are achieved.
* Foster cooperation and a strong customer-focused approach within the project team.
* Develop a high-performance service culture within the project team.

**Requirements**

* Strong technical background and understanding of business and operational processes.
* Good knowledge of telecommunications and networking.
* Ability to direct and influence other senior managers outside the direct line management structure to undertake activities and achieve project objectives.
* Excellent spoken and written English communication skills.
* Excellent presentation and facilitation skills.
* Recognized industry-standard Project Management methodologies (e.g. Prince 2/PMP)
* At least 5 years of multi-disciplined IT experience including:
* Experience in a large, sophisticated organization with high transaction/volume environment including the physical shipment of goods.
* Exposures to an IT department delivering IT strategies that are tied to business goals.
* In depth understanding of international standards such as ISO and ITIL.
* Energetic, enthusiastic, results oriented and driven by goal achievement with a strong focus on excellence and high-quality project delivery.
* Degree in Information Services (or equivalent)

data.title: MCA Operational Performance Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Minimum Required Qualifications**
**Education:**
Bachelor’s degree in engineering or a related technical discipline (Master’s preferred).
  
  
**Technical Knowledge**

* Experience in testing, inspection, certification activities is a plus
* Practical experience of lean methods, 5S, standardized
data.jd_text:
**Minimum Required Qualifications**
**Education:**
Bachelor’s degree in engineering or a related technical discipline (Master’s preferred).
  
  
**Technical Knowledge**

* Experience in testing, inspection, certification activities is a plus
* Practical experience of lean methods, 5S, standardized work, problem solving, VSM, Kaizen, Hoshin Kanri with evidence of real sustainable financial and behavioral results
* Project management certificate or experience
* Advanced Office 365 skills

**Experience**
10+ years professional work experience, preferably in the testing, inspection, certification activities
  
  
**Role Purpose**
The Performance Manager drives business profitability across the Middle East, Caspian & Africa (MCA) region by deploying strategic process improvement initiatives and digital transformation programs. Leading a team of Area Performance Directors and support staff, this role executes modernization of operations, optimizes workflows, and establishes a culture of operational excellence that enhances client experience and Bureau Veritas' efficiency.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Strategic Performance & Profitability Leadership**

* Establish annual profitability targets for MCA countries and deploy prioritized process improvement projects to achieve group-level performance goals
* Partner with underperforming business units to diagnose operational challenges and implement corrective actions
* Monitor LEAP 28 TIQ and Performance indicators to track progress and drive sustained improvement

**Digital Transformation & Field Operations Modernization**

* Lead strategic deployment of digital systems to modernize and optimize field operations and workflows across the region
* Drive digitization of harmonized processes in partnership with the Digital Transformation (DxT) team
* Deploy Tableau digital cockpits and comprehensive TIQ/Performance KPI visualization tools
* Establish governance frameworks with HR, M&S, Finance, DxT, HSSE, and P&L leaders to optimize digital system adoption

**Process Improvement Program Execution**

* Establish and monitor process improvement projects across regions, areas, and countries
* Review operational and administrative processes using lean methodologies to eliminate waste and streamline workflows
* Identify alternatives (shared services centers, resource transfers, etc.) to optimize production capacity
* Harmonize and replicate best-practice processes across MCA for consistency and scalability
* Ensure end-to-end process traceability from opportunity identification through cash collection

**Change Leadership & Organizational Adoption**

* Direct Area Performance Directors and support team in executing improvement initiatives and monitoring adoption
* Drive alignment through clear communications on process changes and performance expectations
* Embed operational excellence as a day-to-day practice and champion continuous improvement

data.jd_text:
**Operations Director – AI Infrastructure**

**Location:**
Dubai, United Arab Emirates

**Industry:**
Data Center & AI Infrastructure

We are partnering with a fast-growing AI infrastructure company to appoint a highly capable
**Operations Director**
to oversee project execution, compliance, and high-level administrative operations across the UAE.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* **Project Execution & Vendor Coordination:**
  Lead the seamless coordination and management of external third parties, including data center design consultants, construction contractors, IT vendors, and local utility departments to ensure projects are delivered on time and to the highest standards.
* **Document Control & KYC Readiness:**
  Establish and maintain a rigorous document control system for both infrastructure projects and corporate operations. Systematically archive all third-party engineering contracts, government approvals, lease agreements, and financial invoices to ensure the company remains fully audit-ready for stringent KYC and due diligence processes conducted by global banks and sovereign wealth funds.
* **Entity Compliance & Government Relations:**
  Serve as the primary guardian of local entity compliance, managing day-to-day interactions with UAE Free Zones, municipal licensing departments, and regulatory bodies. Ensure all corporate licenses, land permits, and operational certifications remain current and fully compliant. Oversee local PRO services to efficiently handle visa, labor, and administrative requirements for the growing team and expatriate executives.
* **Administrative & Logistics Leadership:**
  Deliver high-end logistical support for visiting multinational board members, key investors, and government officials, including ground transportation, accommodation, and meeting arrangements that consistently meet executive standards.

**Requirements:**

* 7 to 10 years of hands-on experience working in the
  **UAE**
  as an Operations Director, Senior Project Manager, or PMO Lead within large enterprises, multinational tech firms, or heavy infrastructure sectors.
* Proven experience with
  **data center (IDC) build-outs**
  or complex local supply chain management is highly preferred.
* Strong execution mindset with the ability to take established plans and deliver results within complex local vendor networks and bureaucratic environments.
* Deep understanding of documentation standards, contract management, and
  **KYC/compliance**
  requirements in high-finance and heavy infrastructure projects — “if it is not documented, it did not happen.”
* Commanding professional presence with excellent problem-solving skills; able to hold external contractors accountable while navigating the unique operational challenges of the Middle East.
* **Language:**
  Native-level fluency in English (both spoken and written) for business communication and negotiation. Fluency in Arabic is considered a significant advantage.

**What’s on Offer:**

This is a critical leadership role within a high-profile AI infrastructure initiative in the UAE. You will play a pivotal part in ensuring operational excellence, regulatory compliance, and smooth execution as the company scales its sovereign AI computing capabilities in the region. The role reports directly to senior leadership.

If you are an experienced operations professional with strong UAE market knowledge, exceptional attention to detail, and a proven ability to manage complex infrastructure projects and compliance matters, we would like to hear from you.

data.title: Technical Program Manager, AMET 3PL and Direct Imports
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
As a PM on the Supply Chain Automation team, you'll design and build full-stack applications and data-intensive systems that power critical supply chain decisions. You'll work with massive datasets, develop and implement science-based artifacts capable to impact broader supply chain,
data.jd_text:
**Description**
As a PM on the Supply Chain Automation team, you'll design and build full-stack applications and data-intensive systems that power critical supply chain decisions. You'll work with massive datasets, develop and implement science-based artifacts capable to impact broader supply chain, and create intuitive interfaces that enable our operations teams to work smarter and faster.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  
Design, develop, and deploy full-stack applications for supply chain optimization and automation
  
  
Build scalable backend services using modern technologies (Java, Python, Node.js, etc.) on AWS infrastructure
  
  
Develop responsive, performant frontend applications using React, JavaScript/TypeScript, Redux, and modern web technologies
  
  
Architect and implement data pipelines leveraging our lakehouse architecture with Apache Iceberg
  
  
Work with large-scale data systems including Amazon Redshift, S3, and EMR
  
  
Perform data mining and analysis to uncover insights that drive supply chain improvements
  
  
Develop and support scientific solutions that are exemplary in terms of design, clarity, extensibility, and the ability to evolve over time
  
  
Innovate with the latest technology to build highly automated solutions for efficient forecasting and supply chain automation
  
  
Design, develop and deploy end-to-end machine learning solutions in the Amazon production environment to improvise the current supply chain through forecasting
  
  
Own the full software development lifecycle from design to deployment and operations
  
  
Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and contribute to technical strategy
  
  
**About The Team**
Join Amazon's Supply Chain Automation team, chartered with building the next generation of automation and optimization systems from the ground up. Our mission is to transform supply chain operations through intelligent automation, reducing manual effort while increasing speed, accuracy, and efficiency across Amazon's fulfillment network.
  
  
**Basic Qualifications**

* 3+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 2+ years of software development experience
* 3+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Bachelor's degree in engineering, computer science or equivalent
* Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Python, Ruby, Golang, Java, C++, C#, Rust
* Experience designing rich user interfaces using modern web frameworks (such as React, Angular, and Vue)
* Knowledge of object-oriented design, data structures, and algorithms
* Experience with modeling tools such as R, scikit-learn, Spark MLLib, MxNet, Tensorflow, numpy, scipy etc.
* Experience with scripting language (e.g., Python, Java, or R)
* Experience effectively gathering information from multiple data sources
* Experience architecting/operating solutions built on AWS

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 3+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
  
  
  
**Company**
- Amazon Middle East and North Africa FZ-LLC
  
  
Job ID: A10383741

data.title: Program Manager - Sales & Operations Planning, 1P UF, AMET ANow Supply Chain
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
If you are a supply chain professional with a passion to innovate and contribute in a fast paced growing environment- you might be a good fit to join Ultra Fast grocery (UFG) Supply chain team as an S&OP Manager . The S&OP program manager acts as a bridge between business and operati
data.jd_text:
**Description**
If you are a supply chain professional with a passion to innovate and contribute in a fast paced growing environment- you might be a good fit to join Ultra Fast grocery (UFG) Supply chain team as an S&OP Manager . The S&OP program manager acts as a bridge between business and operations teams and is responsible for seamless business planning and execution during peak and off peak periods while maximizing customer/seller experience. This role involves driving critical decisions with cross functional teams and senior leadership and demands strong program management skills along-with an ability to drive data driven discussions. The candidate is expected to have exceptional analytical, planning and written/verbal communication skills along with preferred experience in Forecasting, Sales & Operations Planning and Inventory management.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  

* Set up robust processes to improve forecasting accuracy with an objective to minimize cost and maximize customer/seller experience
* Support the business growth in constrained environments with Frugal and innovative solutions
* Make the existing processes scalable by identifying and implementing available tools/automation
* Rollout best practices from other geographies/ companies to minimize end to end supply chain losses
* Utilize exceptional problem-solving and communication skills to influence business, operations and technical audiences
* Program manage and drive decision making across cross functional teams and senior leadership

**Basic Qualifications**

* 3+ years of program or project management experience
* 3+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non-tech teams experience
* 3+ years of defining and implementing process improvement initiatives using data and metrics experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Knowledge of Excel (Pivot Tables, VLookUps) at an advanced level and SQL
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 3+ years of driving end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* 3+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

data.raw_snippet:
**Grow with us**
At
**Ericsson**
, we connect people, businesses, and societies through cutting‑edge mobile networks. We are now looking for a
**Customer Project Manager**
to lead the delivery and deployment of
**Mobile Radio Access Networks (RAN**
) for one of our most strategic customers in the UA
data.jd_text:
**Grow with us**
At
**Ericsson**
, we connect people, businesses, and societies through cutting‑edge mobile networks. We are now looking for a
**Customer Project Manager**
to lead the delivery and deployment of
**Mobile Radio Access Networks (RAN**
) for one of our most strategic customers in the UAE.
  
  
**About this opportunity:**
This is a
**high‑visibility, customer‑facing leadership role**
where you will take full accountability for complex network rollout projects, working at the intersection of technology, execution, and customer partnership.
  
  
As Customer Project Manager, you will have
**end‑to‑end responsibility**
for customer projects, ensuring delivery against contractual, financial, and operational targets while building a trusted and professional relationship with the customer organization. You will lead a
**highly skilled, multi‑disciplinary team**
and coordinate a broad stakeholder ecosystem across Ericsson and external partners. The role
**functionally reports to the Customer Operations Manager**
, with a
**dotted‑line reporting to the Head of PMO**
, ensuring strong governance, delivery excellence, and professional development.
  
  
**What you will do:**

* Establish and own the project baseline: scope, schedule, resources, and governance
* Lead planning, execution, and deployment of mobile radio network projects (RAN, 5G)
* Act as the primary interface towards the customer, building confidence, trust, and transparency
* Drive project execution: track progress, manage changes, risks, conflicts, and critical issues
* Lead and motivate a technically proficient, culturally diverse team
* Coordinate internal stakeholders including Supply, Sourcing, Finance, and Operations
* Manage external partners and third‑party service providers (e.g. installation services)
* Own project financials: forecasting, cost control, revenue recognition, and margin protection
* Ensure compliance with OHS, EMS, Security, and Anti‑Corruption requirements
* Contribute to pre‑sales and RFQ activities when required
* Drive continuous improvement of project methods, tools, and ways of working

**The skills you bring:**

* Degree in Telecommunications, Electronics, IT, or equivalent experience
* Solid experience delivering Mobile Network / RAN rollout projects, including 5G
* Strong customer‑facing project leadership experience in complex environments
* Proven ability to manage multi‑stakeholder ecosystems (customer, internal teams, suppliers)
* Financial acumen with hands‑on experience managing project budgets and forecasts
* Strong leadership, communication, and influencing skills
* Structured, proactive, and solution‑oriented mindset
* Fluency in English & Arabic

**Nice to Have**

* Experience working with operators in the Middle East
* Experience with modernization, swap, and large‑scale rollout programs
* PMP / Prince2 or equivalent certification
* Experience managing third‑party suppliers and subcontractors
* Exposure to project sales processes and contract management

**Ready to Make an Impact?**
If you are a results‑driven Project Manager who thrives in customer‑facing roles and wants to shape how mobile networks are delivered at scale —
**we would love to hear from you**
.
  
  
**Why join Ericsson?**
At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
  
  
**What happens once you apply?**
Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.
  
  
**Primary country and city:**
United Arab Emirates (AE) || Dubai
  
  
**Req ID:**
783086

data.title: Manager - Project Finance
data.raw_snippet:
**Manager – Project Finance**

We are seeking a highly analytical and commercially driven
**Manager / Senior Manager – Project Finance**
to join our Business Development team. This role will play a key part in executing and structuring large-scale infrastructure and development transactions, includi
data.jd_text:
**Manager – Project Finance**

We are seeking a highly analytical and commercially driven
**Manager / Senior Manager – Project Finance**
to join our Business Development team. This role will play a key part in executing and structuring large-scale infrastructure and development transactions, including greenfield and brownfield projects, refinancings, acquisitions, divestments, and stake sales.

**Candidate Background:**

We are particularly interested in professionals with experience in:

* Project Finance teams within Developers
* Investment Banking (M&A and/or fundraising experience)
* Financial Advisory firms advising on project finance transactions
* Investments
* Private Equity

Candidates must demonstrate strong analytical capabilities, superior communication skills, and above-average exposure to investment transactions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Transaction Execution & Financial Leadership**

* Build, audit, maintain and supervise the development of complex financial models for large infrastructure projects.
* Lead financial modelling workstreams across greenfield and brownfield developments, refinancings, acquisitions, divestments and stake sales.
* Ensure models comply with project agreements, financing documents, accounting and tax regulations across jurisdictions.
* Conduct financial analysis, optimization and business valuation to support business development and bid teams.
* Prepare investment memoranda, internal approvals documentation, and Board-level presentations.
* Support economic analysis and financial structuring optimization for existing assets (including impairment tests and performance reviews).

**Fundraising & Financial Structuring**

* Lead and support fundraising activities, including structuring and negotiations with banks, export credit agencies and financial institutions.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with financial institutions across assigned geographies.
* Coordinate due diligence, tax, accounting and modelling workstreams with internal teams and external advisors.

**Team Leadership & Governance**

* Work closely with Transaction Managers (Executive Manager / Director) in project execution.
* Coordinate with Business Development, Legal, Technical, Finance and external stakeholders to ensure timely transaction delivery.
* Provide financial advisory guidance to subsidiaries and support Board/Audit Committee requirements.
* Train and oversee Managers (M1) and interns within the team.

**Qualifications & Experience:**

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Mathematics, Engineering or related field.
* MBA, CA, CFA or other relevant postgraduate qualifications preferred.

**Experience:**

* 6 + years of relevant experience specifically in project finance within developers, banks, financial institutions, advisory firms or consultancies.
* Proven track record in building and managing advanced financial models.
* Strong exposure to project finance structuring, M&A and/or fundraising.
* Strong negotiation skills with investors and lenders.
* Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple workstreams simultaneously.
* Exceptional financial modelling and analytical skills
* Strong commercial acumen
* Clear, confident communicator with stakeholder management ability
* High ownership mindset and ability to lead transaction workstreams
* Exceptional attention to detail with strong governance awareness

data.title: Project Manager / Design Site Supervisor
data.raw_snippet:
The Project Manager / Design Supervision Manager is responsible for supervising the implementation of interior design works on site, ensuring that approved drawings are executed correctly, design intent is maintained, and quality standards are met.

This role acts as the key link between design and
data.jd_text:
The Project Manager / Design Supervision Manager is responsible for supervising the implementation of interior design works on site, ensuring that approved drawings are executed correctly, design intent is maintained, and quality standards are met.

This role acts as the key link between design and site execution, supporting the Technical Design Manager in resolving site issues, coordinating stakeholders, and delivering projects in line with ELE Interior Design’s standards.

Requirements
  
  

Key Responsibilities

Design Supervision & Site Coordination

* Report directly to the Technical Designer / Technical Design Manager and work under their direction
* Assist in resolving site-related concerns, particularly where design clarification or coordination is required
* Conduct weekly site visits for assigned projects to monitor progress and execution
* Ensure approved drawings and specifications are fully compliant with site implementation
* Identify deviations from design intent and initiate corrective action

Quality Control

* Carry out regular quality reviews of work on site, including finishes, joinery, and detailing
* Ensure materials and workmanship meet approved standards and specifications
* Report quality issues and coordinate with relevant parties to ensure timely rectification

Project Coordination & Communication

* Act as the main point of contact for assigned projects
* Coordinate with internal design teams, contractors, suppliers, and consultants
* Identify design and site issues, report them clearly, and resolve design-related matters in coordination with the Technical Design Manager

Client Reporting & Documentation

* Prepare and issue project reports and Minutes of Meeting (MOM) to clients and internal stakeholders
* Maintain clear documentation of site observations, design issues, and agreed actions
* Support inspections, snagging, and handover documentation as required

Skills & Competencies

* Strong understanding of interior fit-out execution and design supervision
* Excellent attention to detail and quality standards
* Clear communication and reporting skills
* Ability to manage multiple assigned projects simultaneously
* Proactive problem-solving and coordination skills

Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Interior Design, Architecture, Civil Engineering, or a related field
* 5+ years’ experience in interior design project management or design supervision (UAE experience preferred)
* Strong knowledge of joinery, finishes, and site coordination
* Proficient in AutoCAD (Revit experience is an advantage)
* Familiarity with UAE fit-out processes and authority requirements
* Valid UAE driving licence preferred
