data.jd_text:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
Job Category
  
  
Customer Success
  
  
Job Details
  
  
**About Salesforce**
Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
  
  
Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
  
  
**About The Role**
We are looking for a dynamic and experienced
**Service Delivery Director**
to lead our professional services and customer success operations across the Middle East region. Based in the UAE (or KSA), this senior leadership role is responsible for driving delivery excellence, growing a high-performing team, and ensuring customers achieve measurable outcomes from their investments.
  
  
This is a unique opportunity to shape the future of service delivery across one of the world's most exciting and fast-growing technology markets.
  
  
What You'll Be Doing
  
  
Delivery Leadership
  
  

* Own end-to-end service delivery across the Middle East, ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope, and to the highest quality standards
* Define and execute regional delivery strategy aligned with global frameworks and local market needs
* Establish and continuously improve delivery methodologies, governance models, and best practices
* Drive operational KPIs including CSAT, NPS, utilization, revenue, and margin

Customer & Stakeholder Engagement
  
  

* Build trusted, executive-level relationships with key customers and partners across the GCC and broader Middle East
* Act as an escalation point for complex delivery challenges, driving swift and effective resolution
* Partner with Sales and Pre-Sales to support business development, solution scoping, and proposal development
* Present delivery performance and strategic roadmaps to C-level stakeholders

Team & Talent Development
  
  

* Lead, mentor, and grow a diverse team of project managers, consultants, and delivery professionals
* Foster a culture of accountability, continuous learning, and customer obsession
* Drive talent acquisition, onboarding, and retention strategies for the region
* Partner with HR and global teams to develop career paths and succession plans

Business Growth
  
  

* Collaborate with Sales on go-to-market strategies and new business opportunities
* Identify and develop service offerings tailored to regional needs and customer segments
* Contribute to revenue targets through effective resource planning and delivery efficiency
* Support partner ecosystem development and enablement across the region

What We're Looking For
  
  
**Experience & Qualifications**

* 12+ years of experience in professional services, consulting, or technology delivery
* 5+ years in a senior leadership or director-level role managing regional delivery operations
* Proven track record of delivering large-scale, complex technology projects (CRM, ERP, SaaS, or cloud platforms)
* Experience operating in the Middle East market — GCC experience is strongly preferred
* Bachelor's degree required; MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is a plus
* PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project/program management certification preferred
* Deep understanding of Middle East business culture, government sector dynamics, and enterprise buying behavior
* English fluent mandatory; Arabic language skills is a strong advantage
* Willingness to travel across the region as required (estimated 30–40%)
* Existing network of senior relationships across GCC enterprises and government entities is highly desirable

Skills & Competencies
  
  

* Exceptional leadership and people management skills with experience leading multicultural teams
* Strong executive presence with the ability to influence and engage at C-suite level
* Deep understanding of professional services business models (T&M, fixed-price, managed services)
* Excellent commercial acumen — P&L management, forecasting, and resource planning
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a data-driven mindset
* Outstanding communication, presentation, and negotiation skills

What Makes You Stand Out
  
  

* Experience in digital transformation programs at scale
* Familiarity with Salesforce, ServiceNow, SAP, Oracle, or similar enterprise platforms
* Track record of building delivery practices from the ground up in emerging or high-growth markets
* Passion for developing talent and creating inclusive, high-performing team cultures

Unleash Your Potential
  
  
When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
*be your best*
, and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
*do your best*
. Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
  
  
Accommodations
  
  
If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
  
  
Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
  
  
Posting Statement
  
  
Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

data.title: Director, Sales MEA
data.company: The Leading Hotels of the World
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking a Director, Sales MEA who is responsible for driving the overall sales performance of the MEA region, with a dual focus on managing a portfolio of strategic accounts and leading a team of sales professionals.
  
  
This role combines hands-on ownership of key B2B and B2C relationships
data.jd_text:
We are seeking a Director, Sales MEA who is responsible for driving the overall sales performance of the MEA region, with a dual focus on managing a portfolio of strategic accounts and leading a team of sales professionals.
  
  
This role combines hands-on ownership of key B2B and B2C relationships with direct people management responsibilities, including the oversight, development, and performance management of the regional sales team. The Director Sales plays a critical role in fostering long-term partnerships while ensuring the team delivers sustained commercial results, in line with LHW’s global philosophy and policy guidelines.
  
  
Acting as a key contributor to both execution and strategy, the Director Sales plays a critical role in implementing team-level sales plans and providing input into the broader regional strategy. The position requires a high level of ownership, cross-functional collaboration, and the ability to influence stakeholders across levels.
  
  
Time allocation:
  
  

* 40% leadership
* 30% strategy
* 30% sales involvement

This is a full-time position located in Dubai. We offer flexible workplace policies that allow for working remotely 3 days a week and require being in our Dubai office 2 days a week (Wednesdays and Thursdays).
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Team Leadership & People Management
  
  

* Lead, coach, and develop a team of sales professionals, fostering a high-performance and accountable culture
* Set and manage performance expectations, providing regular feedback and development opportunities
* Serve as a resource and escalation point for team challenges, both internal and client-related
* Support sales team hiring, onboarding, and succession planning

Sales Strategy and Execution
  
  

* Drive the execution of sales plans aligned with organizational objectives and member hotel needs
* Contribute to the development of segment, regional, or global strategies by offering market insights and team-level feedback
* Monitor sales metrics and business trends to identify opportunities, adjust tactics, and optimize account coverage
* Partner with cross-functional teams (global servicing, marketing, distribution, member relations) to align efforts and maximize impact
* Ensure strong representation and value delivery for member hotels in client engagements and partnerships

Client Relationship Management
  
  

* Maintain and grow strategic client relationships, ensuring a high level of satisfaction, retention, and value delivery
* Support the team in managing key accounts and navigating complex negotiations or service issues
* Represent the organization and its member hotels at key industry events, meetings, and business reviews
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, identifying opportunities for growth, innovation, and collaboration

Operations, Reporting, & Communication
  
  

* Oversee accurate forecasting, reporting, and CRM updates, ensuring visibility into team activity and performance
* Manage team resources and budgets in alignment with strategic goals
* Facilitate regular internal communications, sharing updates, insights, and feedback across teams and leadership
* Contribute to continuous improvement of sales processes, tools, and systems

**Requirements & Experience**

* Preferred Bachelor’s degree, ideally in Business, Sales, Marketing, or Hospitality.
* 6+ years of progressive experience in sales, preferably in hospitality, travel, or related industries
* 2+ years of experience leading and developing high-performing teams
* Proven knowledge of the MEA luxury travel landscape and its key stakeholders, with an established regional network
* Proven ability to manage strategic accounts and foster long-term client relationships
* Strong business acumen with experience in sales planning, forecasting, and performance management
* Excellent interpersonal, communication, and presentation skills
* Comfortable working in a dynamic, cross-functional, and global environment
* Ability to travel as required
* Fluent in English and Arabic

**Skills & Abilities**

* Strategic, analytical thinker with a proven ability to develop innovative, win-win solutions that drive value for clients, partners, and the business
* Operates effectively in fast-paced, evolving environments; experienced in leading teams and managing shifting priorities across multiple stakeholders
* Results-driven and self-directed, with a consistent record of high performance, ownership, and accountability at a senior level
* Exceptional communicator with strong executive presence; adept at influencing across cross-functional teams, client organizations, and senior leadership
* Builds lasting trust and credibility with clients, hotel partners, and internal collaborators through transparency, reliability, and expertise
* Demonstrates sound judgment and professionalism in high-stakes, client-facing interactions and strategic discussion
* Highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to oversee multiple workstreams and deliverables while maintaining strategic oversight
* Strong time management and planning skills; able to set clear priorities, guide team execution, and drive results in line with business goals
* Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, Excel, PowerPoint, Word), with the ability to develop strategic presentations and actionable reporting for internal and external stakeholders

**Benefits**
The Leading Hotels of the World fosters a high-performance culture and generously rewards its employees for their contributions. Here is just a preview of the benefits we offer:
  
  

* Competitive Salary and benefits package
* Up to $500 for home office setup credit
* Up to $500 travel credit that supports and encourages our employees’ passion for travel
* Opportunity to work in a diverse and dynamic environment
* Professional development opportunities
* Flexible working arrangements

**About The Leading Hotels Of The World, Ltd. (LHW)**
Comprised of more than 400 hotels in over 80 countries, LHW is the largest collection of independent luxury hotels. In 1928, 38 independent hoteliers came together to create LHW. Since then, the Company has carefully curated distinctive hotels, resorts, inns, chalets, villas, and safari camps from the snow-capped Alps of Europe to the African veldt, to share them with adventurous souls who seek the remarkably uncommon. The LHW community is filled of exceptional individuals, united by a passion for the surprising discoveries and details that come with every experience. LHW’s collection covers the globe and promises a broad range of destinations and uncommon experiences, enhanced by LHW’s tiered guest loyalty program Leaders Club. From converted former palaces, and countryside retreats run by the same families for generations, to gleaming skyscrapers in dynamic urban centers, serene private island escapes, glamorous tented camps – and beyond – explore, find inspiration, and experience unforgettable travel moments. For more information visit: www.lhw.com, Facebook at @LeadingHotels, Twitter at @LeadingHotels and Instagram @leadinghotelsoftheworld
  
  
*LHW is an equal opportunity employer. LHW does not discriminate on the basis of religion, race, creed, color, national origin, sex, age, disability, handicap, veteran status, sexual orientation, genetic information or any other applicable legally protected category.*

data.title: Senior Manager - Retail Leasing
data.raw_snippet: The role holder is responsible for managing the leasing activities of the assigned cluster of retail destinations under DHAM Retail to maximize the growth of leasing revenues. The role holder is responsible for leading and guiding the team in identifying, attracting, and closing business development
data.jd_text:
The role holder is responsible for managing the leasing activities of the assigned cluster of retail destinations under DHAM Retail to maximize the growth of leasing revenues. The role holder is responsible for leading and guiding the team in identifying, attracting, and closing business development opportunities across the retail portfolio, including both new and current clients. The role holder is also responsible for providing a seamless customer service process for clients to improve customer satisfaction, customer retention & achievement of overall revenue targets across the portfolio.

**Strategic Responsibilities:**

* Support the Director – Retail Leasing in developing the Retail leasing strategy and plan in line with the overall Retail strategy to ensure all retail assets are fully leased in line with the tenancy mix and earn the desired returns to meet the overall targets for the retail function.
* Identify, prioritize and project manage strategic initiatives that span but are not limited to business development, key industry segment and customer targeting initiatives, operational efficiency initiatives, tenant acquisitions, policy and process introduction, and enhancement initiatives.
* Review and implement leasing strategies merchandising/ tenant mix / new developments for the assigned cluster
* Support the Director – retail leasing in producing systems, tools and processes that improve DHAM retail leasing efficiency and ensure that all Group stakeholders receive timely, accurate and comprehensive information which allows them to make informed decisions.

**Core Responsibilities:**

**Budgetary Support**

* Support the Director – Retail Leasing to prepare, consolidate, and forecast the commercial budget and monitor financial performance versus the budget so that the business is aware of anticipated costs/revenues; areas of unsatisfactory performance are identified, and potential performance improvement opportunities are capitalized upon in line with the forecasts and assuring budget accuracy.
* Review market trends and market research information in order to develop the overall budget forecast in line with company objectives and continually review against actuals to ensure targets are being achieved to take action in case of any variances.
* Support the Director – retail leasing on year-on-year revenue growth strategy.

**Commercial Operations**

* Manage the leasing services for all DHAM retail portfolios and ensure proper planning and execution of activities to maximize occupancy rate and ensure the highest revenue return on the assets.
* Meet revenue and occupancy targets and ensure all pipelines and deals are closed. Oversee and drive the leasing team activities and ensure they are motivated and driven to hit their targets.
* Plan and monitor the life cycle of leasing activities for each offering/unit to ensure optimum staff utilization and effective business closure.
* Research, analyze and make recommendations concerning prospective tenants for Malls / Retail Destinations / Community Centers based on client financial strength, tenant mix, and return on investment. Provide recommendations to the Retail Tenant Selection Committee & Asset Management committee on proposals submitted.
* Pursue local and international tenants within the targeted use categories via regular and systematic canvassing, cold calling, and networking.
* Develop overall market research on brands not present in the UAE and high/unique brands to attract and connect with them and introduce them to DHAM for leasing.
* Negotiate new leases and acquire new business opportunities based on prevailing market rates, evaluate properties, lease rents, and available properties to achieve revenue targets. Understand and recommend the Lease rent trends and their viability for different retailer categories.
* Coordinate with the lease admin team to ensure renewals, leasing documents and payments are issued and received in a timely manner.
* Ensure all leasing activities are incorporated through YARDI or other available platforms.
* Implement the leasing plan and escalate as appropriate to correct deviation from the plan to respond effectively and quickly to any change in the business environment.
* Ensure maximum efficiency of the sales function to achieve targets as well as minimize opportunity loss & revenue loss.
* Identify and develop potential business opportunities, handle major accounts, negotiate major deals with clients, and build short-term/long-term business relationships to meet tangible objectives and targets for growth.
* Work closely with Specialty Leasing on an overall leasing strategy to avoid duplication of concepts/brands and over-saturation of common areas.
* Establish and maintain a strong network with existing brands through ongoing communication and contact with store management and brand headquarters staff.
* Contribute to developing pricing modelling in conjunction with Corporate Strategy and Finance to recommend competitive pricing of product offerings that maximizes the IRR.
* Work with the marketing team to establish new marketing channels and enhance the reach of current channels to improve the return on marketing spend.
* Plan and monitor monthly leasing reports to meet financial targets. Review and recommend corrective actions based on the reports prepared for sales to monitor and review the company's performance against key performance indicators to highlight any variances to Management for corrective action.
* Ensure continuous improvement of leasing practices considering ‘international best practice’, changes in international standards, and changes in the business environment which demand proactive action plans.
* Ensure compliance with Dubai Holding Code of Conduct, department policies and HC policies and procedures at all times.

**Key Relationship Management**

* Manage client relationships and relationships with key commercial contacts and market players within the retail and seek expansion opportunities, ensuring the team conducts regular client visits to achieve assigned revenue and customer satisfaction targets.
* Drive the development and maintenance of effective key business relationships with all relevant external/internal entities with the highest standards of business ethics whilst promptly attending to all critical issues in order to ensure the services required by the organization are delivered most effectively.

**Policies, Processes, Systems, Procedures, and Controls**

* Lead and direct the development and implementation of ‘best-in-class’ processes across all DHAM Retail functions, including external benchmarking, reviewing, and drafting brand new processes to cater to a range of partners in coordination with the Business Excellence team.
* Collaborate with Finance to develop sales payment policies for complicated transactions to reflect the realistic scale of the payments and ensure the policy is implemented effectively though out the project cycle.
* Understand and recommend the lease rent trends and their viability for different retailer categories and provide suggestions to the Research & Product Development team.

**Customer Experience Management**

* Drive the customer experience management model to maximize and enhance the customer acquisition and retention rate.
* Oversee the customer satisfaction survey results for Retail leasing and ensure appropriate corrective actions are taken within the stipulated time per the agreed priorities.
* Provide leadership within the function, setting individual objectives, managing performance, developing and motivating staff, and providing formal and informal feedback and appraisal to maximize subordinate and departmental performance in the pursuit of the Department’s objectives.
* Build and promote an organizational culture that encourages innovation and rewards performance, leading to enhanced staff motivation and retention.

**Minimum Qualification:**

Bachelor’s degree in the fields of Marketing / Business Administration

Chartered Surveyor certification/ member of the RICS preferred

**Experience:**

Minimum ten years of experience in retail leasing/sales with at least two years in a managerial-level position.

Middle East experience is preferred.

Technical Competencies

* Strong financial management and business acumen.
* Adept in revenue and cost analysis.
* Advanced analytical skills.
* Thorough knowledge of retail market/trends intelligence.
* Ability to manage the brokers/agents.
* Advanced negotiation & persuasion skills.
* Excellent customer relations and networking skills.
* Excellent interpersonal and leadership skills with the ability to lead teams in achieving results.

data.title: Senior Manager Property Management
data.raw_snippet: The role holder is responsible for working closely with the Director - Property Management to manage the property management activities for the residential portfolio in order to ensure that all residential projects meet their objectives to maximize revenues whilst reducing costs. The role holder sup
data.jd_text:
The role holder is responsible for working closely with the Director - Property Management to manage the property management activities for the residential portfolio in order to ensure that all residential projects meet their objectives to maximize revenues whilst reducing costs. The role holder supports the Director – Property Management with day to day activities of the department to ensure higher level of customer satisfaction and profitability for the business.

**Core Responsibilities**

**Customer Relationship Management**

* Follow up, address and resolve tenants’ complaints and keep updated records as appropriate.
* Oversee the coordination provided between tenants and FM team for move-in and move out process.
* Ensure violations within the community are identified and violation / breaches notices are issued, and records are maintained to ensure that the community rules are followed.
* Coordinate with tenants to provide access as required for maintenance and repair work.
* Ensure circulars and notices to are sent to tenants in a timely fashion.
* Accompany RDC team during evictions of tenants from the premises / units when required.
* Handle escalated negotiation discussions of renewal rates with key tenants and obtain approvals as per DOA.
* Ensure that all deferral requests are attended to and coordinate with internal departments to obtain approvals as per DOA.
* Ensure that all documents are filed as per process as well as CRM system is updated regularly.

**Community Management**

* Conduct community aesthetic inspection on a regular basis (day and night) to ensure it is maintained as per agreed policies, procedures and guidelines. Coordinate with internal departments to ensure the upkeep of the community as and when required.
* Ensure that the team raises and records any snags identified during the inspection and follow up with relevant department until issues are closed.
* Identify possible area / ideas to enhance community to provide better customer experience.
* Identify, evaluate and propose additional revenue generation opportunities from the assets.
* Assist the Director – Property Management, and FM teams to select the service providers and coordinate with the FM department to evaluate their performance against SLAs. Assist the FM team with SLA / KPI scoring of the service providers.
* Identify and highlight HSE risks to the relevant teams and ensure that they are addressed in a timely manner.
* Monitor performance and highlight any issues with value added services providers.
* Monitor and audit the performance of FM team, to highlight any shortfalls from the team that may affect customer satisfaction.
* Update community guidelines, rules and regulations in consultation with the Director – Property Management.
* Support the Leasing team to ensure unit readiness for prospect tenants’ viewings and move in.
* Inspect and ensure that community facilities are always in good working condition.
* Coordinate with Authorities / Third parties and service providers for any events / emergencies in the community.
* Make sure incident reports are issued and followed up with concerned departments to close the report in a timely manner.

**Inter Department Coordination**

* Manage internal departments (HSE / FM etc.) performance against the set SLAs.
* Make sure that the OPEX budget is utilized appropriately and not exceeded.
* Ensure that RDC cases are filed on time and as per the set KPI in coordination with the Rent Dispute Management team.
* Support leasing and renewals team with pricing, and work on tenant retention schemes.
* Work with IT to enhance the APP, Yardi, other systems to enhance efficiency and customer satisfaction.

**Continuous Improvement**

* Keep abreast about the new real estate laws and regulation of the country and keep documents for reference to provide information and inputs to the Director - Property Management for making sound decisions and judgments.
* Highlight any operational/ organizational risks along with mitigation plan.
* Prepare customer satisfaction enhancement plan in coordination with the Director – Property Management based on Customer Service Report.

**Reporting and Auditing Support**

* Prepare reports to provide the manager with timely information to aid review of the property management activities and performance.
* Support management to facilitate the internal and external audits related to area of responsibility and if required provides reports to support the audit process.
* Prepare customer satisfaction enhancement plan based on Customer Service Report.

**People Management**

* Provide leadership within the function, setting individual objectives, managing performance, developing, and motivating staff, provision of formal and informal feedback and appraisal – in order to maximize subordinate and departmental performance in the pursuit of the Department’s objectives.
* Build and promote an organization culture that encourages innovation and reward performance that leads to enhanced staff motivation and retention.

**Minimum Qualification:**

* Bachelors’ degree in Business Administration, or similar

Experience:

* Minimum 8 years of experience in a similar role with at least 4 years at a senior managerial level.
* Middle East experience is preferred.

Technical Competencies

* Knowledge of applicable UAE laws and RERA regulations
* Excellent business developments skills
* Advanced analytical skills
* Advanced planning and organizing skills.
* Advanced negotiation & persuasion skills
* Customer relations and service orientation skills.
* Financial acumen and business outlook.
* Communication & networking skills with the ability to interact at all levels.
* Excellent written and oral English communication skills. Arabic will be preferred.

data.title: Senior eCommerce Manager
data.raw_snippet: Pattern is a leading eCommerce accelerator with offices across the globe offering outsourced marketplace and ecommerce management services for brands worldwide. The Pattern Ecommerce Acceleration Platform leverages AI-powered technology, industry expertise, and global distribution, logistics, and fu
data.jd_text:
Pattern is a leading eCommerce accelerator with offices across the globe offering outsourced marketplace and ecommerce management services for brands worldwide. The Pattern Ecommerce Acceleration Platform leverages AI-powered technology, industry expertise, and global distribution, logistics, and fulfilment services to help quality brands scale profitably on their own websites and through hundreds of marketplaces. Pattern works with some of the most recognized brands such as Thorne, Naturelo, Marshall, Nutricost, MegaFood, TIGI, Hair Burst and Sage and it ranks among the top 5 Amazon sellers globally.
  
  
Pattern is expanding and we are looking for an experienced Ecommerce expert to join our MENA Team in Dubai to support the scaling of the business by driving the performance of the brands we represent on Amazon and other Marketplaces.
  
  
You will own the relationship and financial performance of a portfolio of global brands managing their performance across marketplaces here in MENA. You will support the Associate Director of eCommerce with defining and implementing the E2E growth and profitability plan for your portfolio of brands by working cross-functionally with Operations, Content, Advertising, Creative, Merchandising and Finance. You will also lead cross-functional projects to implement processes to scale the organisation in MENA. You will be a strategic and commercial ecommerce professional who can engage partners and internal stakeholders towards a common goal. You will have a growth mindset and love navigating the challenges of working in fast changing landscapes.
  
  
**The core responsibilities of the Senior eCommerce Manager reflect the following**

* Drive revenue growth on marketplaces across MENA through a data-driven approach across a portfolio of brands through B2B and D2C marketplaces.
* Ensure that a clear activity plan is in place to achieve and surpass the budget targets, including promotional planning, seasonal phasing, NPD launches, advertising campaigns etc.
* Define the strategy and joint business plan with our brands to create mutually beneficial sales and marketing plans which grow market share.
* Represent your brands brilliantly across Marketplaces through best-in-class product content, including but not limited to images, enhanced content, keyword SEO, local language translation, advertising campaigns etc.
* Conduct analysis of brands performance using multiple data sources and tools on a regular basis to ensure that performance is continuously optimised across all touch points.
* Manage inventory, working alongside our merchandisers to maintain a healthy pipeline
* .Establish and maintain relationships with appropriate client partners, providing day-to-day contact on project status and changes.
* Have a passion for continuous improvement and building and automating processes.

**What will I need to thrive in this role?﻿**

* Demonstrated success in managing an ecommerce business
* 5+ years experience in an ecommerce role
* Strong academic background (2:1 or above)
* Previous experience managing and growing 3P business on Marketplaces (Amazon and Noon)
* Creative thinker and problem solver
* Highly organized and disciplined
* Willing to be nimble and adaptable to change
* Able to work under pressure and manage workloads effectively
* Arabic fluency preferred to facilitate communication with local market clients

**We Are Looking For Individuals Who Are**
**Game Changers**
- A game changer is someone who looks at problems with an open mind and shares new ideas with team members, regularly reassesses existing plans and attaches a realistic timeline to goals, makes profitable, productive, and innovative contributions, and actively pursues improvements to Pattern’s processes and outcomes.
  
  
**Data Fanatics**
- A data fanatic is someone who recognizes problems and seeks to understand them through data, draws unbiased conclusions based on data that lead to actionable solutions, and continues to track the effects of the solutions using data.
  
  
**Partner Obsessed**
- An individual who is partner obsessed clearly explains the status of projects to partners and relies on constructive feedback, actively listens to partner’s expectations and delivers results that exceed them, prioritises the needs of your partners, and takes the time to create a personable experience for those interacting with Pattern.
  
  
**Team of Doers**
- Someone who is a part of team of doers uplifts team members and recognizes their specific contributions, takes initiative to help in any circumstance, actively contributes to supporting improvements, and holds themselves accountable to the team as well as to partners.
  
  
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.title: Sr. Manager/Mobile Communications Product
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
This isn't a role for someone who waits to be told what to market. You'll own the full product marketing lifecycle for e&'s B2B mobile portfolio — building propositions, launching products, managing CVM, and sitting in rooms with customers and sales teams to make it all land comm
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
This isn't a role for someone who waits to be told what to market. You'll own the full product marketing lifecycle for e&'s B2B mobile portfolio — building propositions, launching products, managing CVM, and sitting in rooms with customers and sales teams to make it all land commercially. You'll report into the Director of B2B Product Management, lead 1–2 direct reports, and operate as a trusted commercial partner to one of the UAE's most significant B2B revenue businesses.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Own end-to-end product marketing for B2B mobile — postpaid primarily, prepaid where it intersects — from market insight and proposition design through launch, CVM, and lifecycle performance management
* Define go-to-market strategies for mobile plans, bundles, and value-added services aimed at SME and enterprise segments; make the commercial case, get it approved, and execute it
* Design and run CVM programmes that reduce churn, grow ARPU, and drive upsell — using segmented offers, lifecycle journeys, and CCC campaign research to keep the B2B base active and growing
* Get in front of customers — join sales meetings, listen hard, identify pain points, and translate what you hear into product improvements and bespoke solutions that actually solve business problems
* Arm the sales team with everything they need to win: battle cards, playbooks, pitch narratives, objection-handling guides, and a promotions calendar that gives them something relevant to sell every quarter
* Track product performance using Power BI — monitor new acquisitions, churn, and revenues, flag seasonal trends and anomalies, and deliver sharp post-launch reads that drive fast commercial decisions
* Use AI productivity tools to raise the speed and quality of your output — briefs, decks, competitive reports — and build that habit into your team
* Stay sharp on the market: competitor moves, pricing shifts, enterprise buyer behaviour, and regulatory changes — and turn that intelligence into recommendations leadership actually acts on
* Manage and grow your team of 1–2, building commercial rigour and a bias for execution
* Drive cross-functional alignment across Technology, Sales, Finance, and Brand — and represent product marketing at senior business reviews with confidence

**Qualifications**

* Postgraduate degree in Marketing, MBA, or related field — mandatory
* 12+ years in Product Marketing, Product Management, or a commercial marketing role
* 5+ years in telecoms with hands-on mobile product or marketing experience in B2B or consumer — telecom background is a hard requirement
* A real track record in CVM: you've managed a postpaid base, run retention programmes, and know what moves the churn needle
* Power BI fluency — you build dashboards, own your data, and can walk a senior stakeholder through a product performance story without a data analyst in the room
* Experience attending customer meetings, running discovery conversations, and designing solutions from pain points — not just from a brief
* Proven sales enablement delivery: tools, collateral, and programmes that frontline B2B teams have used
* People management experience and strong stakeholder skills across technical and commercial functions

data.title: Director, Branded Residential Portfolio Management
data.raw_snippet:
( 18670 )
  
  
At Kerzner, we never settle. Through continued innovation, our team of pioneers push until the next level is achieved, and then to keep going. Our philosophy is simple - we go above and beyond to Blow Away our Guest and Colleagues. Good enough never is. For us, it is all about perfec
data.jd_text:
( 18670 )
  
  
At Kerzner, we never settle. Through continued innovation, our team of pioneers push until the next level is achieved, and then to keep going. Our philosophy is simple - we go above and beyond to Blow Away our Guest and Colleagues. Good enough never is. For us, it is all about perfection and innovation. This is not simply our job, it’s our passion.
  
  
Our Colleagues are at the heart of who we are and what we do. With an international team of over 10,000 Colleagues and strong strategic growth on the horizon, we offer unrivalled career opportunities around the world. We are committed to provide our Colleagues at all levels with opportunities to grow and develop within the organisation through personalised development plans and tailored succession planning. We invest in our communities to sustain the environment where we operate and minimising our own footprint. Whether it is through animal conservation, education or tree-planting, we like to give back in as many ways as we can to help our communities flourish.
  
  
**Job Summary**
The Director, Residential Portfolio Management is responsible for the portfolio‑level governance, planning, and setup of branded residential components across Kerzner’s global Private Homes and Branded Residences development pipeline.
  
  
The role focuses on the pre‑opening residential lifecycle, from early pre‑development and planning through to opening, providing structured management and coordination with internal and external stakeholders. The objective is to ensure that all branded residential projects are consistently defined, correctly configured, brand‑aligned, and operationally ready for structured handover to OpCo at opening.
  
  
The position acts as the residential portfolio authority, establishing and managing residential project stage gates, defining residential requirements and standards, and validating outcomes at key milestones to ensure quality, consistency, and readiness across a growing pipeline of residential projects. The role does not include responsibility for day‑to‑day operations, rental programs, or HOA governance, which sit outside of this position.
  
  
The role requires a strong background in luxury hospitality‑led residential product, portfolio oversight, and cross‑functional coordination, with the ability to translate brand intent and residential requirements into repeatable, scalable outcomes across multiple projects and geographies.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Portfolio Governance & Residential Frameworks**
  
  

* Establish, own, and maintain portfolio‑wide residential frameworks, standards, and setup playbooks for all branded residential and Private Homes projects.
* Define, document, and maintain Kerzner side residential requirements and performance principles to inform the design and delivery of branded residential projects across the portfolio.
* Establish minimum portfolio requirements (not design solutions) covering:

+ Unit mix and typology principles (performance intent and target ranges, not layouts)
+ Residential amenity principles, including owner only vs shared use positioning
+ Arrival, circulation, privacy, and access requirements, expressed as outcomes rather than spatial solutions
+ Back of house and servicing requirements necessary to support efficient future operation and homeowner experience
+ Residential technology readiness criteria, defining capability requirements rather than system design

* Ensure consistent interpretation and application of branded residential standards across all projects and geographies.

**Residential Project Stage Gates (Portfolio Control)**
  
  

* Establish and manage Residential Project Stage Gates aligned with the wider development lifecycle.
* Define required residential inputs and outputs at each stage, including:

+ Deal feasibility / concept confirmation
+ Concept design
+ Schematic design
+ Design development (residential “red‑flag” review)
+ Design and Build Phase
+ Pre‑opening residential readiness
+ Handover to OpCo

* Act as the Kerzner residential authority at each stage gate by:

+ Validating compliance with portfolio standards and residential requirements
+ Identifying material risks, gaps, or deviations
+ Confirming readiness to progress from a residential perspective

* Maintain a portfolio‑level record of residential stage‑gate reviews, approvals, and deviations
* Present stage gate readiness to all key internal stakeholders.

**Pre‑Development & Planning (Residential Input)**
  
  

* Provide residential subject‑matter input during pre‑development and early planning phases of new branded residential opportunities.
* Support Business Development and Design and Construction teams with residential assessments relating to:

+ Brand alignment and positioning
+ High‑level residential scope and feasibility assumptions
+ Unit mix strategy, typologies, and sizing logic
+ Amenity positioning and residential value proposition
+ Preliminary operational and governance implications

* Define early residential product principles to inform project briefs prior to design commencement.
* Identify and mitigate early‑stage risks that could impact:

+ Residential liveability and owner experience
+ Long‑term asset and portfolio value
+ Operational viability and handover readiness

* Ensure residential planning decisions align with a scalable, repeatable portfolio strategy.

**Design & Project Interface (Residential Input Only)**

* Provide structured residential input to Design and Project teams at defined project milestones.
* Review residential layouts, adjacencies, circulation, and functional planning from an owner, operator readiness, and portfolio perspective.
* Ensure residential requirements and assumptions are clearly documented and integrated into the design process.
* Monitor design evolution to prevent unintended deviations that may negatively affect residential quality or long‑term usability.
* Maintain a collaborative, non‑authoring relationship with Design, respecting design leadership and consultant ownership.

**Brand Compliance & Residential Product Integrity**
  
  

* Ensure branded residential standards are interpreted and applied consistently across the portfolio.
* Review key residential elements impacting brand equity and owner experience, including:

+ Finishes intent and durability
+ Amenity positioning and exclusivity
+ Privacy, acoustics, and spatial separation

* Monitor and document residential deviations, concessions, and approved exceptions.
* Provide portfolio‑level insight into recurring issues and lessons learned across projects.

**Residential Operating Model & Operating Plan Development**

* Define the Residential Operating Model and develop a structured Residential Operating Plan (ROP) for each project during the planning phase
* Ensure the defined residential operating plan is fully supported by design and asset configuration, validating that back‑of‑house layouts, access, storage, plant capacity, service flows, and residential technology capabilities enable efficient, discreet, and brand‑appropriate operation.
* Validate residential operational readiness from a governance perspective, confirming the asset can be realistically operated as intended, that material operational risks, inefficiencies, or cost drivers are identified and mitigated early, and that the project is ready for OpCo acceptance without fundamental re‑planning
* Formally package and transition the Residential Operating Model to OpCo as part of pre‑opening and handover, ensuring clarity of intent, scope, and assumptions.

**Pre‑Opening & Handover**
  
  

* Coordinate with OpCo teams in advance of opening to support a smooth transition of responsibility.
* Lead residential readiness activities prior to opening from a portfolio and governance perspective.
* Ensure completion of all residential handover requirements, including obtaining TCO and OC, establishing asset and warranty register frameworks, completing residential handover checklists, and confirming owner move‑in readiness principles.
* Coordinate structured handover of residential assets to:

+ OpCo (operations)
+ Director of Residence

* Formally transition responsibility at opening, retaining oversight only for portfolio‑level tracking, consult level support and continuous improvement.

**Portfolio Reporting & Stakeholder Coordination**
  
  

* Maintain strong collaboration with internal and external stakeholders including:

+ Design
+ Projects / Construction
+ Business Development
+ Property Management
+ OpCo

* Provide regular portfolio reporting on:

+ Residential pipeline status
+ Key risks and mitigation actions
+ Stage‑gate progress and readiness

* Support leadership decision‑making with clear, evidence‑based residential insights.

**Explicit Exclusions (Boundary Clarity)**

* No responsibility for residential rental programs or leasing
* No day‑to‑day residential operations or staffing
* No HOA or residential governance management
* No design authorship or consultant management

**Skills, Experience & Educational Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Business, Hospitality Management, Architecture, or related field required; Master’s degree preferred.
* Minimum 8–10 years’ experience across branded residences, luxury mixed‑use developments, or hospitality‑led residential platforms.
* Strong understanding of branded residential product, owner expectations, and residential lifecycle planning.
* Proven experience working at portfolio level across multiple concurrent projects.
* Ability to influence across Design, Development, Projects, Operations, and Property Management without direct authority.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Strong analytical and organisational skills with ability to manage complexity across geographies.
* Comfortable operating in an owner‑side, non‑operational, governance‑focused role.
* Willingness to travel internationally as required.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications; strong Excel skills preferred.
* Fluent in English; additional languages advantageous.

Our company is expanding faster than ever before. We are investing in the growth of our company, and that means we are committed to investing in you. Join a team that is open-hearted, innovative, inclusive, and inspiring in spirit. We believe in making our guests happy beyond anything they have ever imagined. We wow them at every turn and create memories that will last a lifetime. You will be at the heart of this vision, to constantly innovate to deliver Amazing Experiences and Everlasting Memories.

The company drives value through a comprehensive solution set, integrating multifunctional teams that have technical and business domain expertise with a ro
data.jd_text:
C5i is a pure-play AI & Analytics provider that combines the power of human perspective with AI technology to deliver trustworthy intelligence. The company drives value through a comprehensive solution set, integrating multifunctional teams that have technical and business domain expertise with a robust suite of products, solutions, and accelerators tailored for various horizontal and industry-specific use cases. At the core, C5i’s focus is to deliver business impact at speed and scale by driving adoption of AI-assisted decision-making.

C5i caters to some of the world’s largest enterprises, including many Fortune 500 companies. The company’s clients span Technology, Media, and Telecom (TMT), Pharma & Lifesciences, CPG, Retail, Banking, and other sectors. C5i has been recognized by leading industry analysts like Gartner and Forrester for its Analytics and AI capabilities and proprietary AI-based platforms.

**Global offices**

United States | Canada | United Kingdom | United Arab of Emirates| India

**Job Responsibilities**

We are seeking an experienced
**Sales Director**
to lead and manage strategic client relationships, ensuring successful delivery, growth, and long-term partnership value. The role involves acting as the single point of contact for clients and internal teams, driving execution excellence, and scaling accounts within the Data & AI space, particularly in the Banking domain.

* Act as the single point of contact for the client and internal team members, serving as the go-to person for all account-related and delivery-related activities
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key client stakeholders, ensuring a healthy and long-term association
* Work closely with business stakeholders, client teams, and internal delivery/project teams to drive successful execution and delivery of projects
* Understand client expectations, sentiment, and ecosystem dynamics to proactively align delivery and engagement strategies
* Develop and execute account plans in collaboration with internal stakeholders to drive growth, scale, and new opportunities.
* Plan and lead client engagements including workshops, quarterly business reviews (QBRs), and strategic discussions
* Create and maintain an account organization map and define both strategic and tactical approaches for account expansion
* Ensure alignment between client expectations and C5i capabilities, driving value-based outcomes
* Act as the final authority for ensuring successful delivery, client satisfaction, and overall account performance
* Drive profitability and revenue growth of the account while ensuring adherence to client commitments and delivery excellence

**Requirements & Qualifications:**

* 7–12 years of experience in client engagement, account management, or client partner roles.
* Proven experience managing and growing large client accounts in Data, Analytics, or AI domains.
* Techno-commercial background with strong understanding of delivery and business aspects.
* Experience working in or with the Banking industry, especially in Data & AI-related initiatives.
* Strong understanding of banking domain concepts; deep domain expertise is a plus.
* Demonstrated ability to manage senior stakeholders and drive strategic conversations.
* Experience in account planning, revenue management, and growth strategy execution.
* Strong leadership and team management skills across cross-functional teams.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities and drive outcomes in a fast-paced environment

**C5i**
is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, gender identity, etc. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please keep us informed about the same at the hiring stages for us to factor necessary accommodations

data.title: Business Development Director
data.raw_snippet: Thunes is scaling fast rapidly across the Middle East and we’re looking for elite hunters to open new markets and close transformational deals. If you love building, thrive on delivering big deals, and want to sell a product that actually moves money globally in real-time, this is your opportunity!
data.jd_text:
Thunes is scaling fast rapidly across the Middle East and we’re looking for elite hunters to open new markets and close transformational deals. If you love building, thrive on delivering big deals, and want to sell a product that actually moves money globally in real-time, this is your opportunity!
  
  
**What You’ll Do**

* Own the end-to-end sales cycle - prospect, pitch, negotiate, close, and activate
* Build and convert a high-quality pipeline of fintechs, banks, PSPs, and digital platforms
* Open new markets, landing strategic logos and unlocking revenue fast
* Drive senior-level conversations with founders, C-suite, and product teams
* Collaborate with internal teams to execute seamless go-lives and expand accounts

**What You’ll Bring**

* 8+ years in B2B payment sales, proven hunter DNA
* Strong network across PSPs, fintechs, banks, wallets, e-commerce players
* Track record of exceeding targets and closing complex commercial deals
* Execution-first mindset - proactive, resilient, self-driven, hands-on
* Fluent English; other regional languages welcome

**Why join Thunes**

* Uncapped commission with real earning power
* High-growth fintech backed by global investors
* Sell a mission-critical payments network used by world-class brands driving financial inclusion
* Huge white-space markets - build and own your territory
* Culture of ownership, ambition, and entrepreneurial execution

**About Thunes**
Thunes is the Smart Superhighway to move money around the world. Thunes’ proprietary Direct Global Network allows Members to make payments in real-time in over 130 countries and more than 80 currencies.
  
  
Thunes’ network connects directly to over 7 billion mobile wallets and bank accounts worldwide, as well as 15 billion cards via more than 320 different payment methods, such as GCash, M-Pesa, Airtel, MTN, Orange, JazzCash, Easypaisa, AliPay, WeChat Pay and many more.
  
  
Thunes’ Direct Global Network differentiates itself through its worldwide reach, in-house SmartX Treasury System and Fortress Compliance Platform, ensuring Members of the network receive unrivaled speed, control, visibility, protection and cost efficiencies when making real-time payments, globally.
  
  
Members of Thunes’ Direct Global Network include gig economy giants like Uber and Deliveroo, super-apps like Grab and WeChat, MTOs, fintechs, PSPs and banks.
  
  
Headquartered in Singapore, Thunes has offices in 14 locations, including Abidjan, Barcelona, Beijing, Dubai, Hong Kong, Johannesburg, London, Manila, Nairobi, Paris, Riyadh, San Francisco and Shanghai.
  
  
For more information, visit: https://www.thunes.com/

data.title: Portfolio Director - MENAT Account Lead (Banking Client)
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Role:**
  
The Portfolio Director / MENAT Account Lead is a senior leadership position based in Dubai, responsible for the success of CBRE's partnership with a global financial services client across the Middle East, North Africa, and Türkiye (MENAT) region. The role covers the client's
data.jd_text:
**About the Role:**
  
The Portfolio Director / MENAT Account Lead is a senior leadership position based in Dubai, responsible for the success of CBRE's partnership with a global financial services client across the Middle East, North Africa, and Türkiye (MENAT) region. The role covers the client's leasehold and freehold portfolio spanning 9 markets: Algeria, Bahrain, Egypt, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Türkiye, and UAE.
  
  
This is a dual-mandate role. You will serve as the
**single point of contact**
for the client's regional senior stakeholders within the client corporate real estate function, and you will simultaneously lead a team of 5 Portfolio Managers (based in Dubai and Cairo) delivering end-to-end portfolio management services. You are accountable for all CBRE activities and outcomes in the region - from transaction execution to governance, compliance, and strategic alignment.
  
  
This is a
**Player/Mentor**
role - you will be hands-on in driving complex transactions while coaching and developing your team to deliver at the highest standard. The ideal candidate combines deep transactional expertise with the leadership maturity to elevate those around them.
  
  
You will report directly to the Regional Account Lead for ASP & MENAT (Hong Kong) and indirectly to the Global Account Lead (London).
  
  
  
**What You'll Do:**
  
**Account Leadership & Client Partnership**
  

* Act as the primary regional relationship owner with the client's senior stakeholders, serving as a second-level escalation point after Portfolio Managers.
* Understand the client's business drivers and translate them into real estate strategies and solutions.
* Lead annual account reviews and present performance insights, strategic recommendations to the client.
* Ensure full compliance with the Global MSA and all contractual reporting requirements.
* Own regional governance, performance tracking, stakeholder engagement, and strategic alignment with the global account team.

  
**Portfolio Strategy & Transaction Management**
  

* Develop and implement portfolio strategies aligned with the client's goals, including portfolio optimisation, cost reduction, and risk mitigation.
* Prepare, recommend, and execute portfolio-wide transaction strategies - acquisitions, disposals, lease renewals, and lease amendments.
* Ensure disciplined transaction lifecycle management: project initiation, scope definition, prioritisation, and adherence to client-driven milestones.
* Manage critical dates and ensure all lease obligations are met across the MENAT portfolio.
* Where required, engage and oversee third-party brokers in accordance with Global MSA terms and conditions.

  
**Financial Management & Reporting**
  

* Oversee account financials including budgeting, forecasting, and P&L management for the MENAT region.
* Manage the OPEX budget related to the client's portfolio (rents, government rates, service charges, etc.).
* Review, analyse, and interpret financial templates to enable informed client decision-making.
* Deliver regular reporting and data-driven insights to support the client's strategic priorities.

  
**Team Leadership & Development**
  

* Lead, mentor, and manage the performance of a team of 5 Portfolio Managers.
* Provide guidance and coaching to develop team capability and ensure consistent delivery standards.
* Design and implement training programmes and continuous improvement initiatives across the account team.

  
**Operational Excellence & Innovation**
  

* Drive innovation and continuous improvement across all service lines in the region.
* Manage, review, and abstract contractual terms from property documentation; ensure all property records and tracking tools are accurate and current.
* Optimise operational processes for maximum efficiency within the account portfolio.
* Ensure integration and interlock between service lines - Portfolio Management, Project Management, Facility Management, Data Management, and Finance/Accounting - for aligned delivery.

  
**What You'll Need:**
  

* Minimum 10 years of experience in commercial real estate, with a strong transactional and estates management background - you should be equally comfortable negotiating a complex lease restructuring as you are setting regional strategy.
* Demonstrated experience managing P&L, budgets, and financial reporting at a regional level.
* Proven track record in stakeholder management at senior/executive level.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills (written and verbal in English).
* Strong analytical capability - ability to interpret data and deliver concise, actionable insights.
* Highly organised, detail-oriented, and process-driven.

  
**What Will Set You Apart:**
  

* Experience leading and developing diverse, multi-cultural teams across multiple geographies, including team members with varied professional backgrounds, nationalities, and working languages.
* Strong commercial acumen and deep knowledge of MENAT real estate markets.
* Experience working on large-scale, multi-market outsourced real estate accounts (banking/financial services sector preferred).
* Familiarity with global MSA/framework agreement structures and KPI-driven service delivery.
* Arabic language skills are an advantage.

  
**WHAT WE OFFER:**
  

* A senior leadership role within one of CBRE's most established and sophisticated global client accounts.
* The opportunity to shape real estate strategy for a major international bank across 10 MENAT markets.
* A platform for career growth within CBRE's global corporate occupier business.
* Specialist training and professional development to support your progression.

  
**Why CBRE**
  
When you join CBRE, you become part of the global leader in commercial real estate services and investment that helps businesses and people thrive. We are dynamic problem solvers and forward-thinking professionals who create significant impact. Our collaborative culture is built on our shared values - respect, integrity, service and excellence - and we value the diverse perspectives, backgrounds and skillsets of our people. At CBRE, you have the opportunity to chart your own course and realize your potential. We welcome all applicants.
  
  
  
**Applicant AI Use Disclosure**
  
We value human interaction to understand each candidate's unique experience, skills and aspirations. We do not use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to make hiring decisions, and we ask that candidates disclose any use of AI in the application and interview process.
  
  
**OUR VALUES IN HIRING**
  
At CBRE, we are committed to fostering a culture where everyone feels they belong. We value diverse perspectives and experiences, and we welcome all applications.

data.title: Director Demand Planning Middle East (Beauty & Cosmetics)
data.raw_snippet:
A leading international organisation within the beauty, wellness, and consumer goods sector is seeking an experienced Director of Demand Planning to lead regional forecasting and Sales & Operations Planning (S&OP) across a diverse, fast-moving product portfolio.

This is a senior leadership role wit
data.jd_text:
A leading international organisation within the beauty, wellness, and consumer goods sector is seeking an experienced Director of Demand Planning to lead regional forecasting and Sales & Operations Planning (S&OP) across a diverse, fast-moving product portfolio.

This is a senior leadership role with end-to-end ownership of demand strategy, combining strategic direction with hands-on oversight. The role partners closely with senior commercial, marketing, finance, product, and supply chain stakeholders to ensure demand plans support growth ambitions while maintaining inventory health and operational agility.

As Director of Demand Planning, you will lead demand planning across core ranges, seasonal collections, gifting portfolios, and new product development. You will own the S&OP agenda, drive cross-functional alignment, and ensure forecasts are robust, data-driven, and commercially relevant across multiple channels and markets.

Key Responsibilities

• Own and lead the regional demand planning strategy across core, seasonal, gifting, and NPD portfolios

• Drive the end-to-end S&OP process, including pre-S&OP and executive alignment forums

• Lead NPD sell-in forecasting, including launch planning, phase-in / phase-out, and cannibalisation analysis

• Partner with senior stakeholders across markets, sales, marketing, finance, product, and supply chain to align demand with commercial objectives

• Develop and continuously improve forecasting methodologies, tools, and planning capabilities

• Monitor forecast accuracy and bias, driving continuous improvement and governance

• Provide leadership, coaching, and direction to regional demand planning teams

• Ensure demand plans are aligned with supply capabilities and inventory targets

Experience & Background

• 10+ years’ experience in demand planning, supply chain, or operational planning roles

• Proven leadership experience within FMCG, beauty, wellness, or similarly fast-paced consumer sectors

• Strong track record leading S&OP processes at regional or multi-market level

• Demonstrated experience managing core ranges, seasonal cycles, and NPD concurrently

• Confident operating at senior stakeholder and executive level

Skills & Expertise

• Advanced forecasting and statistical modelling capability

• Strong knowledge of S&OP best practice and cross-functional governance

• High level of proficiency with ERP and forecasting tools (SAP or similar)

• Advanced Excel and data analytics capability; experience with BI tools preferred

• Strong commercial acumen with the ability to translate data into strategic decisions

Personal Attributes

• Strategic yet hands-on leadership style

• Highly analytical with strong problem-solving skills

• Comfortable operating in a complex, fast-moving environment

• Collaborative, influential, and outcomes-focused

• Strong understanding of consumer behaviour and omni-channel dynamics

This is a rare opportunity to step into a senior regional leadership role where demand planning plays a critical role in driving commercial performance and operational excellence.

data.title: Sales Director - Construction Saudi Cluster
data.raw_snippet:
**About us**

dmg events is an international exhibitions and publishing company. We attract more than 425,000 visitors to our global portfolio of 80 exhibitions each year. Through our global events, our aim is simple. We want to accelerate business through face-to-face events, which is why we work s
data.jd_text:
**About us**

dmg events is an international exhibitions and publishing company. We attract more than 425,000 visitors to our global portfolio of 80 exhibitions each year. Through our global events, our aim is simple. We want to accelerate business through face-to-face events, which is why we work so hard to bring people together, creating opportunities for them to network, learn and do business. dmg events is part of the Daily Mail Group Trust (DMGT). DMGT Manages a diverse, multinational portfolio of companies with total revenues of £2bn, that provide businesses and consumers with compelling information, analysis, insight, events, news and entertainment
**.**

**Job Description:**

**Sales and Sponsorship:**

* To be responsible for the revenue generation through the direct sales team who sell exhibition stands and sponsorship packages to achieve agreed sales targets.
* Responsible for generating sales strategy for portfolio of products going forward.
* Ensuring strong sales culture amongst the team, clear deadlines, targets and responsibilities.
* Coaching and mentoring colleagues where possible to improve their performance.
* Sell exhibition space and sponsorship in accordance with set targets to ensure the revenue budget is achieved and exceeded.
* Questions customers in depth to ascertain their long term business requirements and target markets
* Empathises with the client by demonstrating understanding of their market and customer base
* Identifies particular issues of interest or visitors for key accounts
* Develops long term account relationships through regular calls and visits, offering information on the customer’s sector and sending information
* Is able to articulate issues in associated sectors and suggest new perspectives for the customers marketing approach
* Actively networks with trade associations and other third parties
* Presents benefits of shows to large groups of potential exhibitors using visual aids
* Knows when to delegate and when to tackle issues directly
* Prepares sales plans with financial case included
* Demonstrates continuous development in sales practice

**Customer Service:**

* To actively seek new customers from all relevant sources including trade press, competitors and other like minded events. Thus increasing sponsorship revenue and develop emerging markets/product areas.
* Communicates the links between excellent service and business goals
* Monitors the performance of individuals and teams in relation to customer service
* Promotes excellent customer service through all team communication processes including performance management meetings
* Networks and benchmarks externally to generate ideas for improving customer service
* Translates suggestions for improvements into practical actions.
* Ensures high customer retention rate.

**Reporting:**

* Provide the Portfolio Director with weekly report detailing team activities and forecast.
* Monitor sales figures and reporting on a weekly, monthly and quarterly basis to enable senior management to be updated on the progress of the show and sponsorships.
* Writes and implements sales plans
* Develops interim forecasts
* Creates monthly sales forecasts

**People Management:**

* Manage the workload of the direct reports
* Develop and train the team to ensure high standards are met.
* Ensure all people administration is completed in a timely manner e.g. appraisals, return to works etc.
* Motivate team member to increase results.

**Administration:**

* Maintains accurate sales records
* Manages floor plan
* Issues and returns contracts
* Manages and develops database
* Organises distribution of sales communications
* Chases initial payments

**Financial Responsibility:**

* Understand and manage the sales budget Involvement with invoicing and collections to ensure payments are made in line with the contract.

**Qualifications:**

* Minimum 8-10 years of B2B sales management and account handling experience within the exhibitions/events industry.
* Familiarity in selling construction and design products/services is a plus.
* Excellent communication in Arabic & English (written and spoken is must).
* Ability to communicate effectively and efficiently with a wide variety of clients and partners across multiple mediums, including phone, email, and face-to-face meetings.
* Highly motivated, and ambitious, a desire to take ownership and responsibility to ensure the best outcome.
* Ability to work towards KPIs, using them as a motivational tool to hit and exceed targets.
* Adaptable and collaborative nature, working with colleagues across the team.
* Ability to travel within the region as required.

**Job-Specific Skills:**

* Proven track record with sales and sponsorship delivery
* Understanding of sales budget/forecasting
* Proficient with SalesForce

**Behavioural Competencies :**

* Communication
* External Awareness
* Resilience and tenacity
* Team work
* Flexibility

**"Please take the time to read the job description, you must meet all the criteria set out above for your application to be considered. We do check all applications and suitable candidates will be contacted within 5 days. If you are not contacted by us within 5 working days, please consider your application unsuccessful at this time."**

data.title: Customer Success/Sales Director - SAAS/Enterprise
data.raw_snippet:
We are currently partnering with a leading, global SaaS organisation to appoint a Customer Success Director to lead their MENAT region. This is a strategic leadership role focused on driving revenue growth, customer retention, and long-term client value across a portfolio of enterprise accounts.

**
data.jd_text:
We are currently partnering with a leading, global SaaS organisation to appoint a Customer Success Director to lead their MENAT region. This is a strategic leadership role focused on driving revenue growth, customer retention, and long-term client value across a portfolio of enterprise accounts.

**The Role**
As Customer Success Director, you will lead a high-performing team responsible for account strategy, growth, and customer satisfaction. You will work closely with senior stakeholders, building C-level relationships and identifying opportunities to expand services and deliver measurable business impact.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Own revenue targets and ensure strong retention across key accounts
* Drive growth through cross-sell and upsell strategies
* Lead, coach, and develop a high-performing Customer Success team
* Define and execute strategic account plans aligned to client objectives
* Build and manage senior client relationships at C-level
* Implement structured sales methodologies (e.g. MEDDPICC)
* Enhance customer engagement and satisfaction (NPS-driven)
* Identify market trends, risks, and growth opportunities

**About You**

* Proven leadership experience within SaaS / technology environments
* Strong background in Financial Crime, Fraud, or AML solutions
* Track record of managing enterprise accounts and exceeding revenue targets
* Experience leading and developing high-performing teams
* Strong commercial acumen and stakeholder management skills
* Must be based in UAE

**What's on Offer**

* Competitive salary and bonus structure
* Hybrid working model
* Opportunity to join a high-growth, market-leading organisation

data.raw_snippet:

As Associate Director, Product Management at Publicis Sapient, you will serve as our clients’ trusted advisors in defining, articulating and executing a product strategy that transforms customer experience and business outcomes. As a Product Owner, you will collaborate with clien
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
As Associate Director, Product Management at Publicis Sapient, you will serve as our clients’ trusted advisors in defining, articulating and executing a product strategy that transforms customer experience and business outcomes. As a Product Owner, you will collaborate with clients undertaking major Digital Business Transformation (DBT) engagements to understand their business and end-customer needs, and then constantly deliver value with fast release and feedback cycles.
  
  
**Qualifications**
Skills & Experience
  
  

* Demonstrated success managing digital products, strategy, experience, and enterprise solutions/services from ideation to launch, including engineering and operational quality
* Experience working with a multi-disciplinary team on customer-focused products and services
* Significant industry knowledge and expertise within Financial Services industry
* Proven ability to prioritize competing demands and obtain buy-in from stakeholders
* Deep understanding of design thinking principles, having led or facilitated workshops to cultivate the innovation process
* Ability to solve complex business problems to maximize value while balancing technical constraints
* Mastery in techniques and methodologies that maximize flow of value and are deeply rooted in Agile, Lean and continuous delivery principles with a passion to extend that understanding throughout the organization
* Proven track record of working with senior client stakeholder and diverse teams as a servant leader and steward of economic and customer value
* Ability to use storytelling to influence decisions without formal authority
* Comfortable with financials, KPIs, and forecasts with success leveraging such data to make decisions about product iterations

Additional Information
  
  
Set Yourself Apart With
  
  

* Certified Scrum Product Owner designation

Certified SAFe Product Owner/Product Manager designation
  
  
**Company Description**
Publicis Sapient is a digital transformation partner helping established organizations get to their future, digitally enabled state, both in the way they work and the way they serve their customers. We help unlock value through a start-up mindset and modern methods, fusing strategy, consulting, and customer experience with agile engineering and problem-solving creativity. United by our core values and our purpose of helping people thrive in the brave pursuit of next, our 20,000+ people in 72 offices around the world combine experience across technology, data sciences, consulting, and customer obsession to accelerate our clients’ businesses through designing the products and services their customers truly value.
