**About AtoG Labs:**
AtoG Labs is a high-technology molecular diagnostics and genetics laboratory dedicated to advancing personalized medicine in the UAE and beyond. Our multidisciplinary expertise covers molecular biology, gene
data.jd_text:
**Location:**
Dubai, UAE
  
  
**Reports to:**
Board of Directors
  
  
**About AtoG Labs:**
AtoG Labs is a high-technology molecular diagnostics and genetics laboratory dedicated to advancing personalized medicine in the UAE and beyond. Our multidisciplinary expertise covers molecular biology, genetic sequencing, oncology biomarkers, infectious disease testing, and women's health diagnostics. We combine innovation with clinical integrity to deliver a new standard in laboratory medicine.
  
  
**Role Overview:**
The Laboratory Director provides scientific, technical, and regulatory leadership across all molecular and clinical testing domains. This senior position ensures that all operations adhere to the highest levels of scientific accuracy, compliance, and accreditation—while shaping AtoG Labs' evolution as a regional leader in molecular diagnostics and genomics.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead all scientific and medical functions across molecular diagnostics, genetics, and clinical testing
* Oversee assay development, validation, and implementation of new technologies (e.g., PCR, NGS, qPCR, and molecular oncology)
* Ensure compliance with ISO, CAP, and UAE healthcare regulations across all test areas
* Direct and mentor senior scientists, molecular technologists, and quality officers
* Collaborate with the Business Manager to align medical integrity with operational and commercial goals
* Represent AtoG Labs before regulators, accreditation bodies, and industry partners
* Maintain the lab's medical credibility by participating in case discussions, quality reviews, and result approvals
* Evaluate emerging technologies and guide investment in R&D and scientific partnerships

**Requirements**

* MD or PhD in Molecular Biology, Genetics, Clinical Pathology, or a related discipline
* Minimum 10 years of laboratory management experience, with focus on molecular or genetic diagnostics
* Proven record in lab setup, validation, and accreditation
* Strong understanding of NGS workflows, molecular oncology, virology, and precision medicine
* Effective communicator with leadership and mentoring experience
* Eligibility for UAE DHA or MOHAP medical director licensing preferred

data.title: Head of Compliance (UAE National)
data.raw_snippet:
**Department:**
Compliance

**Location:**
UAE

**Description**
**About Tabby**
Tabby creates financial freedom in the way people shop, earn and save by reshaping their relationship with money. Over 15 million users choose Tabby to stay in control of their spending and make the most out of their mone
data.jd_text:
**Department:**
Compliance

**Location:**
UAE

**Description**
**About Tabby**
Tabby creates financial freedom in the way people shop, earn and save by reshaping their relationship with money. Over 15 million users choose Tabby to stay in control of their spending and make the most out of their money.
  
  
The company’s flagship offering allows shoppers to split their payments online and in-store with no interest or fees. Over 40,000 global brands and small businesses, including Amazon, Noon, IKEA, and SHEIN use Tabby to accelerate growth and gain loyal customers by offering easy and flexible payments online and in stores. Tabby generates over $10 billion in annual transaction volume for its partner brands and is the highest-rated, most-reviewed, largest, and fastest-growing FinTech in the GCC region.
  
  
Tabby launched in 2019 and has since raised +$1 billion in equity and debt funding from global and regional investors, and is now valued at $4.5 billion.
  
  
**About the role:**
We seek a Head of Compliance for our licensed payment (e-money wallet) entity in the UAE. The ideal candidate will be a seasoned professional with a proven track record of leadership and compliance expertise. This position will hold the critical responsibility of ensuring strict adherence to all applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies throughout our organization. As the Head of Compliance, you will play a pivotal role in maintaining the integrity of our business while proactively mitigating potential regulatory risks. Your ability to manage and motivate a team of compliance professionals, as well as effectively engage with regulatory authorities, will be essential to your success.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Implement, enhance, and maintain comprehensive compliance policies and procedures aligned with regulatory requirements set forth by the CBUAE, demonstrating a deep understanding of the applicable laws and regulations.
* Lead and manage a team of compliance professionals, fostering a collaborative and high-performing environment, to effectively implement and monitor compliance initiatives across the organization.
* Conduct regular compliance assessments and audits, proactively identifying potential areas of non-compliance and recommending corrective actions to mitigate risks and ensure adherence to regulatory standards.
* Provide strategic guidance and support to various departments within the organization on compliance-related matters, including regulatory changes and updates, ensuring that all business activities are conducted in a compliant manner.
* Design and roll out efficient and effective compliance processes, leveraging technology and innovative solutions to streamline compliance workflows and enhance operational efficiency.
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders, including senior management, to integrate compliance considerations into all aspects of business operations, including product development, marketing, and customer service.
* Serve as the primary point of contact for regulatory inquiries and examinations, liaising with regulators and providing timely and accurate responses to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.
* Stay abreast of developments in regulatory requirements and industry best practices, conducting research and analysis to identify emerging trends and potential risks, and providing regular updates to senior management and relevant staff members.

**Skills, Knowledge and Expertise**

* Bachelor's degree in Law, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field.
* Advanced degrees and/or professional certifications in compliance (e.g., CAMS, CFE, CRCM, ICA).
* Minimum of 7 years of experience in senior compliance roles within the financial services industry. Prior work experience with e-money institutions and/or payment service providers is particularly desirable.
* Experience in identifying, assessing, and mitigating compliance risks and developing and implementing effective risk management strategies.
* Familiarity with compliance-related software and technology solutions.
* Experience with data analytics and reporting tools for compliance purposes.
* In-depth knowledge of regulatory requirements applicable to FinTech companies and financial institutions in the United Arab Emirates, particularly those outlined by the CBUAE.
* Experience in mentoring and developing compliance talent.
* Strong understanding of anti-money laundering (AML), combating the financing of terrorism (CFT), sanctions and other financial crime compliance requirements.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams.
* Proven track record of implementing and managing compliance programs, including policies, procedures, and training initiatives.
* Analytical mindset with strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail.
* Ability to align compliance initiatives with the company's overall strategic goals and proactive approach to anticipating and addressing emerging compliance challenges.
* Strong alignment with the company's values and culture.

**Benefits**

* Flexible working model with trust and autonomy from day one.
* A high-growth environment with ownership and responsibility that will accelerate your career.
* Participation in the company’s employee stock options program.
* Comprehensive health insurance.
* Flexi Perks: a monetary benefit to spend on what matters most to your health, well-being, education, or professional development.

data.title: Head of Middle East
data.raw_snippet:
**About Airwallex**
Airwallex is the only unified payments and financial platform for global businesses. Powered by our unique combination of proprietary infrastructure and software, we empower over 200,000 businesses worldwide – including Brex, Rippling, Navan, Qantas, SHEIN and many more – with fu
data.jd_text:
**About Airwallex**
Airwallex is the only unified payments and financial platform for global businesses. Powered by our unique combination of proprietary infrastructure and software, we empower over 200,000 businesses worldwide – including Brex, Rippling, Navan, Qantas, SHEIN and many more – with fully integrated solutions to manage everything from business accounts, payments, spend management and treasury, to embedded finance at a global scale.
  
  
Proudly founded in Melbourne, we have a team of over 2,000 of the brightest and most innovative people in tech across 26 offices around the globe. Valued at US$8 billion and backed by world-leading investors including T. Rowe Price, Visa, Mastercard, Robinhood Ventures, Sequoia, Salesforce Ventures, DST Global, and Lone Pine Capital, Airwallex is leading the charge in building the global payments and financial platform of the future. If you’re ready to do the most ambitious work of your career, join us.
  
  
**Attributes We Value**
We hire successful builders with founder-like energy who want real impact, accelerated learning, and true ownership. You bring strong role-related expertise and sharp thinking, and you’re motivated by our mission and operating principles. You move fast with good judgment, dig deep with curiosity, and make decisions from first principles, balancing speed and rigor.
  
  
You're humble and collaborative; turn zero‑to‑one ideas into real products, and you “get stuff done” end-to-end. You use AI to work smarter and solve problems faster. Here, you’ll tackle complex, high‑visibility problems with exceptional teammates and grow your career as we build the future of global banking. If that sounds like you, let’s build what’s next.
  
  
**What You’ll Do**
This is a career-defining opportunity to lead Airwallex's Middle East business. You will be leading the full commercial, operational, and cultural agenda for the region. You will be the most senior Airwallex leader on the ground in the Middle East, responsible for building and executing the country strategy, growing the team, and delivering sustainable, cash-flow-positive growth.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Commercial Success & Vision**

* Lead SME and Enterprise commercial teams towards KPI achievement across revenue, customer acquisition, and product adoption
* Own the end-to-end go-to-market strategy and customer experience for the Middle East
* Define and drive the long-term commercial vision for the region, identifying emerging segments and verticals with high growth potential
* Partner with the Legal, Risk & Compliance (LRC) team to drive the necessary licensing and regulatory approvals required to operate and expand in the region

**P&L Management**

* Own full P&L responsibility for the Middle East, managing commercial contribution margin towards cash-flow-positive performance
* Manage and optimise the regional marketing budget in alignment with global priorities
* Design and own commercial team incentive structures within the globally approved framework

**Brand & Corporate Affairs**

* Build Airwallex's brand presence and awareness across the Middle East through targeted events, campaigns, and partnerships, in close collaboration with the global marketing team
* Act as a credible external voice with regulators, government bodies, and industry associations, shaping the narrative around Airwallex's regulatory posture and commitment to operating responsibly in the region
* Represent Airwallex at industry forums, regulatory engagements, and speaking opportunities through the corporate affairs function

**People Leadership & Culture**

* Build, attract, and retain a high-performing, diverse team across commercial and operational functions in the region
* Own culture and staff engagement for the Middle East office, partnering with the People & Talent team
* Ensure the team is aligned with Airwallex's global values and has regular, clear business updates and context

**Who You Are**
We're looking for people who meet the minimum requirements for this role. The preferred qualifications are great to have, but are not mandatory.
  
  
**Minimum Qualifications**

* 12+ years of experience in financial services, fintech, or technology, with significant leadership experience in the Middle East market
* Proven track record of owning a P&L and delivering commercial growth in a high-growth or scaling business
* Deep understanding of the payments, banking, or cross-border financial services landscape in the UAE and/or Saudi Arabia
* Demonstrated ability to build and lead high-performing teams across commercial and operational functions
* Experience navigating regulatory and licensing environments in the region

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience scaling a fintech or payments business in the Middle East from early or greenfield stage — ideally at a Series B–D company building its GCC presence, such as a cross-border payments, embedded finance, or B2B financial services platform
* Demonstrable track record of personally driving a licensing or regulatory approval with local regulators — not just working alongside compliance teams, but leading senior regulatory engagement through to a milestone outcome
* Prior Country Manager, GM, or equivalent role where they were the most senior person on the ground in the Middle East, operating with limited HQ support and genuine P&L ownership
* Existing relationships within the UAE and KSA fintech and banking ecosystem — regulators, banking partners, enterprise clients, and platform partners
* Experience closing or overseeing significant enterprise commercial deals in the region, ideally in financial services, B2B payments, or SaaS
* Arabic language proficiency a strong advantage; deep cultural fluency in GCC business norms required regardless
* Has stayed long enough in a previous market-building role to see it through multiple stages of growth — from zero to scaled — demonstrating resilience and follow-through beyond the initial build phase

**Applicant Safety Policy: Fraud and Third-Party Recruiters**
*To protect you from recruitment scams, please be aware that Airwallex will not ask for bank details, sensitive ID numbers (i.e. passport), or any form of payment during the application or interview process. All official communication will come from an @*
*airwallex.com*
*email address. Please apply only through*
*careers.airwallex.com*
*or our official LinkedIn page.*
*Airwallex does not accept unsolicited resumes from search firms/recruiters. Airwallex will not pay any fees to search firms/recruiters if a candidate is submitted by a search firm/recruiter unless an agreement has been entered into with respect to specific open position(s). Search firms/recruiters submitting resumes to Airwallex on an unsolicited basis shall be deemed to accept this condition, regardless of any other provision to the contrary.*
**Equal opportunity**
Airwallex is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We value diversity and anyone seeking employment at Airwallex is considered based on merit, qualifications, competence and talent. We don’t regard color, religion, race, national origin, sexual orientation, ancestry, citizenship, sex, marital or family status, disability, gender, or any other legally protected status when making our hiring decisions. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know.

data.title: Head of Platform Growth and Monetization
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Summary**
The Head of Platform Growth & Monetisation is responsible for driving sustainable user and revenue growth across the Astra Tech & Botim ecosystem by unlocking value from the platform’s communication, fintech, and digital services portfolio. The role serves as the custodian of platfo
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
The Head of Platform Growth & Monetisation is responsible for driving sustainable user and revenue growth across the Astra Tech & Botim ecosystem by unlocking value from the platform’s communication, fintech, and digital services portfolio. The role serves as the custodian of platform economics, ensuring alignment between user growth, engagement, and monetisation strategies across the platform’s services. This leader will define scalable growth frameworks, leverage data-driven experimentation, and optimize monetisation opportunities across Astra Tech & Botim's expanding digital ecosystem.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**2. Platform Monetisation**
**3. Portfolio Performance Ownership.**
**4. Data-Driven Growth**

* Platform Growth Strategy
* Define and execute Astra Tech & Botim platform growth roadmap across communication, fintech, and digital services.
* Drive strategies to increase user acquisition, engagement, and retention across the platform.
* Design scalable growth loops across product, marketing, and lifecycle channels.
* Develop monetisation frameworks that maximize the value of Astra Tech & Botim's large user base. Identify opportunities across: - Fintech services - Payments and remittances - Digital services - Value-added offerings
* Optimize revenue per active user through pricing, bundles, and user lifecycle strategies.
* Act as the business performance owner for the platform services portfolio, ensuring each service contributes to overall growth and monetization goals.
* Monitor service performance through clear metrics around adoption, engagement, and revenue contribution.
* Prioritize initiatives based on data insights and business impact.

Establish and scale a culture of experimentation and measurable growth across the platform. Implement frameworks for: - A/B testing - cohort analysis - lifecycle optimization - Translate user behaviour insights into actionable growth strategies.
**6. Cross-Functional Leadership**

* Ecosystem Development
* Collaborate with internal teams to expand the range of services available on the platform.
* Support the integration of new services and offerings that enhance the platform’s value proposition. Ensure new services align with platform growth and monetisation objectives.
* Work closely with Product, Marketing, Data, and Commercial teams to drive growth initiatives.
* Align stakeholders around platform growth priorities and monetisation opportunities.
* Ensure consistent execution of growth strategies across different services

**Requirements**

* 8+ years of experience in consumer technology, fintech, or digital platforms.
* Demonstrated experience driving growth and monetisation in large-scale digital products.
* Strong background in user lifecycle growth, engagement strategy, and revenue optimization.
* Experience working with multi-service platforms or digital ecosystems.
* Strong analytical mindset with experience leveraging data to inform growth decisions.
* Exposure to emerging markets and digital financial services is highly valued.
* Ability to optimize growth across a portfolio of services rather than a single product.
* Growth Orientation: Deep understanding of user acquisition, engagement, retention, and monetization levers.
* Commercial Acumen: Strong instinct for identifying scalable revenue opportunities within large digital user bases.
* Data Fluency: Ability to translate analytics and experimentation into strategic decision-making.
* Collaborative Leadership: Comfort working across product, marketing, data, and commercial teams to deliver platform-wide growth.

data.title: Head of Product Design
data.raw_snippet: 1inch is the DeFi ecosystem building financial freedom for everyone. 1inch products help users and builders trade, hold and track digital assets - with the self-custody, comprehensive security and the intuitive user experience they need to unlock the potential of true crypto ownership. 1inch protoco
data.jd_text:
1inch is the DeFi ecosystem building financial freedom for everyone. 1inch products help users and builders trade, hold and track digital assets - with the self-custody, comprehensive security and the intuitive user experience they need to unlock the potential of true crypto ownership. 1inch protocols and APIs provide core infrastructure across the DeFi industry and beyond.
  
  
So if you’re someone who thinks big, moves fast and wants to make an impact right from day one, then get ready to join our industry-changing team.
  
  
*Location: We prioritise candidates who are based in Dubai then consider those working remotely in one of our European Hub Locations (UK, Spain or Germany).*
As Head of Product Design, you will shape the future of user experience at 1inch by driving the vision, strategy, and execution of design across all our products in crypto, blockchain, and DeFi. You are a key leader aligning design with business goals and technology innovation, influencing product roadmaps at the executive level and inspiring teams to deliver world-class, user-centered experiences.
  
  
You will ensure validated, end-to-end UX flows are delivered ahead of launch milestones, using data, experimentation, and user insight to reduce late-stage UX changes and accelerate delivery. Design under your leadership directly supports revenue growth through higher trading conversion, improved retention, and a cohesive, scalable product experience. By strengthening design systems and cross-functional collaboration, you help reduce UX-related support tickets and raise the overall quality bar across platforms.
  
  
This role requires a strategic mindset, strong leadership, deep Web3 and crypto UX expertise, and the ability to operate seamlessly across product, engineering, marketing, and business teams.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead long-term UX planning across 1inch products, defining a multi-year design direction while delivering fast, incremental improvements that balance innovation, scalability, and reliable execution
* Own UX readiness for product launches, ensuring validated end-to-end user flows are delivered ahead of engineering milestones and late-stage UX changes are minimised
* Ensure a cohesive, user-centric product experience at scale through strong design system adoption
* Oversee the evolution of the design system, brand consistency, and accessibility standards across all platforms
* Manage and grow a team of Product Designers, including hiring, mentorship, performance management, and long-term career development

**Requirements**

* 7+ years of progressive experience in UX/UI/Product Design leadership roles, ideally in crypto, fintech, or complex tech ecosystems
* Proven track record of managing and scaling design teams delivering cross-platform products (web, iOS, Android)
* Proven ownership of design systems and scalable UX foundations across multiple products
* Demonstrated ability to drive measurable business outcomes (conversion, retention, revenue) through design
* Deep understanding of UX principles, interaction design, accessibility, and branding within blockchain/Web3 context
* Strong strategic thinking with the ability to balance visionary leadership and operational execution
* Excellent communication and storytelling skills for diverse audiences, including executives and technical teams
* Fluent English communication skills (written and spoken), with the ability to clearly articulate complex design concepts to executive and technical audiences

**Nice to Have**

* Background in cryptocurrency DeFi and blockchain ecosystems
* UX or product design certifications (e.g. Nielsen Norman Group) are a plus

**Why work for us?**

* Join a young, creative team in a fast-paced and supportive environment
* We’re open to new ideas — if you’ve got a vision, pitch it and make it happen
* Enjoy competitive pay that matches your skills and experience
* Be part of a company that’s shaping the future of DeFi
* Take time when you need it — we offer unlimited vacation days
* Get fully compensated for your work gear — we’ll set you up for success

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.title: Manager Crew Training Digital Learning
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**Job Purpose**
Our cabin crew community is comprised of staff from all around the world! At Emirates, we are committed to providing our cabin crew with best-in-class training. Our recruits undergo seven and a half weeks of training in our state-of-the-art facility in Dubai cover
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Job Purpose**
Our cabin crew community is comprised of staff from all around the world! At Emirates, we are committed to providing our cabin crew with best-in-class training. Our recruits undergo seven and a half weeks of training in our state-of-the-art facility in Dubai covering topics such as safety, medical, security and hospitality. Our cabin crew are enthusiastic and prepared. They are an integral part of our brand and they work diligently to ensure that our customers ?Fly Better?!
  
  
**About The Role**
Reporting to the Divisional Vice President of Cabin Crew Training, the Manager Crew Training Digital Learning Operations will be responsible for overseeing the development, implementation, and management of digital learning platforms and initiatives for crew members within Cabin Crew Training College, ensuring they align with business objectives, regulatory requirements, and industry standards. The role will collaborate with internal stakeholders, subject matter experts, and technology teams to design innovative learning experiences, monitor performance metrics, and optimize digital tools and platforms.
  
  
**What You Will Do**

* Immersive Technology & VR/IXR Development: Oversee the development, deployment, and maintenance of VR/IXR training simulations and immersive reality experiences tailored to crew training needs. Ensure that immersive learning modules align with organizational training goals and meet industry safety and compliance standards. Identify emerging trends in VR/AR technologies and propose innovations to enhance crew training effectiveness.
* Digital Learning Strategy & Leadership: Develop and implement the strategic vision for digital learning solutions, integrating VR/Immersive Reality technologies for crew training. Lead and manage the team responsible for the implementation and continuous improvement of immersive training capability and training platforms/hardware.
* Hardware Management: Oversee the maintenance and readiness of digital learning hardware, including VR systems, servers, and workstations. Collaborate with SD Business Support and IT teams to ensure seamless setup, troubleshooting, and timely upgrades to meet training needs.
* Content Development & Optimization: Lead a team in the design, development, and customization of IXR/VR training modules, ensuring content is relevant, accurate, and aligned with training objectives. Collaborate with subject matter experts in the design and produce high-quality immersive training experiences. Continuously evaluate and improve digital learning content based on feedback from trainees, instructors, and performance data.
* Training Delivery & Support: Oversee the delivery of immersive crew training sessions, ensuring smooth operations and high levels of user engagement and effectiveness.
* Project Management: Lead cross-functional teams in the successful execution of VR/IXR projects, ensuring timelines, budgets, and performance targets are met. Manage relationships with external vendors, including hardware suppliers and software developers, ensuring deliverables are met on schedule and within scope. Ensure that all projects are compliant with regulatory requirements and industry standards.
* Budget & Resource Management: Oversee the budgeting and allocation of resources for the digital learning operations, including hardware procurement, software development, and training staff. Lead the transformation of cabin crew training through cutting-edge digital platforms, including e-learning and virtual simulations, to enhance learning effectiveness and scalability. Spearhead the design and implementation of innovative training solutions, leveraging technology to drive continuous improvement.

Qualification
  
  
**To be considered for the role, you must meet the below requirements:**

* Completed Degree or Honors (12+3 equivalent) in Business Administration, Management, Engineering, Computer science, or a related discipline and/or any other relevant field of study.
* 10+ years of experience in In-flight services / In-flight administration / Training & Development, with expertise in IT and digital innovation.
* Proven experience in managing complex projects.
* Experience in introducing new capabilities and supporting organisational change.
* Experience in process improvement and design.
* Experience in managing a cross-functional team.
* Proven ability to build trusted relationships and communicate and collaborate effectively with different stakeholders.
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to inspire and motivate teams, drive consensus, and resolve conflicts effectively.
* Proven ability to effectively work in an agile environment and ability to handle uncertainty.
* Proficiency in project management methodologies with experience using project management
* Software tools for planning, tracking, and reporting.
* Creative mindset with a passion for pushing the boundaries of and driving change.

At Emirates, were committed to providing our employees with opportunities to grow and develop in their careers. So, if you are looking for a challenging and rewarding opportunity, apply today and join the Cabin Crew Training team!
  
  
Salary & benefits
  
  
Join us in a management role and enjoy an attractive tax-free salary. On top of our generous travel benefits, including discounted flights and hotel stays around the world, this managerial role also has an excellent leave and healthcare package. That?s on top of transport benefits, life insurance and more. Find out what it?s like to live and work in our fast-paced, cosmopolitan home city in the Dubai Lifestyle section of our website www.emirates.com/careers
  
  
Job Details
  
  
Role Level: Director Work Type: Full-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Dubai Company Website: http://www.emirates.com Job Function: Human Resources (HR) Company Industry/
  
  
Sector: Airlines and Aviation
  
  
What We Offer
  
  
**About The Company**
Searching, interviewing and hiring are all part of the professional life. The TALENTMATE Portal idea is to fill and help professionals doing one of them by bringing together the requisites under One Roof. Whether you're hunting for your Next Job Opportunity or Looking for Potential Employers, we're here to lend you a Helping Hand.
  
  
Report
  
  
Disclaimer: talentmate.com is only a platform to bring jobseekers & employers together. Applicants are advised to research the bonafides of the prospective employer independently. We do NOT endorse any requests for money payments and strictly advice against sharing personal or bank related information. We also recommend you visit Security Advice for more information. If you suspect any fraud or malpractice, email us at abuse@talentmate.com.

data.raw_snippet:

Compliance Director - Business Advisory

Dubai

**About the Company**

Our client is a fast-growing, regulated financial services business based in Dubai. The organisation is continuing to scale its operations and is investing in strengthening its governance and control func
data.jd_text:
**Title:**
Compliance Director - Business Advisory

**Location:**
Dubai

**About the Company**

Our client is a fast-growing, regulated financial services business based in Dubai. The organisation is continuing to scale its operations and is investing in strengthening its governance and control functions to support long-term, sustainable growth.

**The Role**

This position partners closely with stakeholders across the business to provide clear, practical compliance guidance. Reporting to the Head of Compliance, the role focuses on supporting the business in meeting regulatory expectations while contributing to the ongoing development and enhancement of the overall compliance framework.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Act as a trusted compliance advisor to the business, providing practical guidance on regulatory requirements, conduct, and data protection matters
* Partner with product, technology, and commercial teams to ensure compliance is embedded into new initiatives, change programmes and customer journeys
* Interpret and apply regulatory expectations and internal policies across a range of business activities
* Support the development and enhancement of a risk-based compliance framework, including monitoring and assurance activities
* Provide constructive challenge on business decisions where regulatory or conduct risks arise
* Assist in identifying, assessing, and escalating compliance risks, issues, and breaches where appropriate
* Support regulatory engagement activities, including submissions, queries, and supervisory interactions
* Contribute to the development of compliance policies, procedures, and governance standards
* Promote a strong culture of compliance, ethics, and accountability across the organisation

**Requirements**

* Minimum of 10 years compliance experience within financial services, ideally in advisory or business-facing roles
* Experience in fintech, digital banking, payments, or similarly regulated environments is highly desirable
* Strong understanding of regulatory frameworks, conduct risk, and data protection requirements
* Proven ability to engage and influence senior stakeholders across business and technology teams
* Experience supporting or developing compliance frameworks, controls, and governance structures
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate regulatory requirements into practical, business-friendly guidance
* Comfortable operating in fast-paced, evolving, and high-growth environments

data.title: Director, Legal Counsel - MEA
data.raw_snippet:
**The Company**
PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the gl
data.jd_text:
**The Company**
PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
  
  
We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
  
  
We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
  
  
Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
  
  
**Job Summary:**
This position will lead our legal function in the Middle East and Africa and is based in Dubai.
  
  
The position involves working closely with the business to support key strategic initiatives across MEA in particular advising on the launch of new products, relevant law and regulation that impacts the PayPal business and its products and supporting disputes and litigation, data privacy and commercial negotiations. In addition, the role will provide governance support to relevant legal entities across the region.
  
  
**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**

* Provide strategic legal advice and support to senior management, influencing business strategy an decision making.
* Anticipate regulatory and legal risks, and proactively design strategies to manage them.
* Perform legal and regulatory compliance risk assessments, propose creative solutions where applicable, and help advance business objectives.
* Manage escalations, collaborate across other teams and develop solutions to enable business partners to achieve their goals.
* Develop a strong rapport and working relationship with business counterparts across the enterprise to help drive the delivery of effective legal services.
* Ensure compliance with relevant laws and regulations, leading the adoption of cutting-edge legal technologies and best practices.
* Manage legal risks and safeguard PayPal's legal interests, developing forward-looking risk management strategies.
* Provide key inputs as an industry leader and expert, staying ahead of legal trends and influencing industry standards.

**Minimum Qualifications:**

* 10+ years relevant experience and a Juris doctorate degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.

**Additional Responsibilities & Preferred Qualifications:**
**Core Responsibilities**

* Working with the PayPal business teams to advise on the development and implementation of new products and services, including the regulatory and business risk implications across the MEA.
* Dealing with regulatory issues and advising on the impact of new and existing laws and regulations and local governance matters.
* Advising on and negotiating agreements with key partners, payment processors and financial institutions to further the expansion of the PayPal business.
* Helping to develop and build the wider, non-legal team’s understanding of relevant laws and regulations to encourage a culture of compliance and responsibility.

The ideal candidate will be an accomplished senior lawyer with strong interpersonal and organizational skills and a demonstrated ability to effectively and proactively provide sound legal advice, exercise good business judgment, work with senior management and execute on a cross-functional basis in a fast paced environment.
  
  
To succeed in this challenging role, candidates should be mature, self-motivated and well-organised with excellent communication and problem solving skills. Candidates should also be flexible with a global outlook and collaborative working style.
  
  
An ability to work in a matrixed environment with multiple stakeholders is essential. PayPal is a global company and the successful candidate will need to have flexibility to work with and occasionally accommodate colleagues in different time zones.
  
  
**Job Requirements:**

* Admitted as a lawyer with at least 6 year’s post-admission experience gained in a law firm or as in-house counsel
* Experience in banking, payments, financial services or fintech would be desirable
* Ability to collaborate with senior management and cross functional stakeholders
* Accomplished senior lawyer with a keen attention for detail and an ability to manage multiple tasks and projects simultaneously.
* Creative thinker with strong problem-solving skills and the ability to stay calm under challenging circumstances
* Ability to handle multiple assignments simultaneously, with effective resolution of conflicting priorities
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, changing environment and matrixed organisation
* Flexibility to work with colleagues in Europe, the United States and Asia and accommodate calls and deadlines aligned to their time zones

**Subsidiary:**
PayPal
  
  
**Travel Percent:**
0
  
  
PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. When making an application directly, we will never ask you to share passwords, one-time passcodes (OTP), or verification codes. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. All communication regarding your application will come from official PayPal email domains. If you suspect fraudulent activity, please report it immediately. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
  
  
For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
  
  
**Our Benefits:**
At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer comprehensive, choice-based programs, to support all aspects of personal wellbeing—physical, emotional, and financial—delivering meaningful value where it matters most. We strive to create a flexible, balanced work culture with a holistic approach to benefits, including generous paid time off, healthcare coverage for you and your family, and resources to create financial security and support your mental health.
  
  
**Who We Are:**
Click Here to learn more about our culture and community.
  
  
**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
  
  
**Belonging at PayPal:**
Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
  
  
Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
  
  
We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.

data.title: Director of Fintech
data.raw_snippet: HungerStation is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt
data.jd_text:
HungerStation is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.
  
  
**Job Description**
**To lead and oversee HS’s efforts to use technology, in order to drive the development and implementation of financial technology solutions to enhance financial processes, customer transactions, and overall business efficiency.**
**Fintech**

* Develop and execute Hungerstation’s financial technology strategy in alignment with business growth, digital transformation, and customer experience objectives.
* Lead the design and implementation of scalable fintech solutions to support high-volume transactions across customers, merchants, riders, and internal finance operations.
* Drive innovation in payment systems, digital wallets, refunds, settlements, and reconciliation processes to ensure speed, accuracy, and reliability.
* Partner closely with Product, Engineering, Data, Operations, and Finance teams to embed fintech solutions seamlessly into Hungerstation’s platform and operational workflows.
* Ensure full compliance with Saudi regulatory requirements (SAMA, ZATCA, VAT, data protection) and Delivery Hero group policies, while proactively managing fintech-related risks and controls.
* Oversee fraud detection, transaction monitoring, and cybersecurity measures related to financial systems and digital payments.
* Own and manage the fintech budget, ensuring cost efficiency, ROI optimization, and sustainable investment in new technologies and partnerships.
* Analyze financial and transaction data to identify trends, revenue opportunities, cost optimization areas, and system performance improvements.
* Prepare executive-level financial technology reports and dashboards, providing insights on transaction performance, risk exposure, and innovation impact.
* Lead and develop a high-performing fintech team, fostering a culture of ownership, innovation, and continuous improvement in line with Hungerstation’s leadership principles.
* Stay ahead of emerging fintech trends (open banking, embedded finance, BNPL, digital wallets, AI-driven fraud prevention) and assess their relevance to Hungerstation’s ecosystem.
* Build and manage strategic relationships with banks, payment providers, fintech startups, and regulatory bodies to strengthen Hungerstation’s financial infrastructure.
* Support business expansion initiatives by enabling new financial products and services for merchants and customers (e.g., faster settlements, flexible payment options, and value-added financial tools).

**Strategy & Planning**

* Contribute to the development and execution of the Division’s ABCs and OKRs, while ensuring alignment with other Functions' heads.
* Make critical decisions that support the Division's strategic and tactical direction.
* Establish the plans for the respective functions/teams and provide inputs that support the Division’s goals and objectives.
* Distribute tactical responsibilities effectively to potential leaders in the Division, to improve the succession readiness of the organization over time.
* Measure and track relevant OKRs and metrics to ensure the achievement of goals and take corrective actions when necessary.

**Governance and Resilience**

* Follow all relevant policies, procedures, and processes for the daily work to be carried out in a controlled and consistent manner.
* Contribute to the identification of opportunities for continuous improvement of processes and practices to enhance effectiveness.
* Uphold a high-performance working environment and promote HS’s Values.

**People Management**

* Set performance objectives, provide necessary support, evaluate direct reports, and provide regular feedback on performance.
* Participate in the identification and recruitment of key talents for the function.
* Provide clear direction, prioritize tasks, assign and delegate responsibility, and monitor the workflow.
* Provide opportunities for team members to suggest, participate in, and contribute to improvement, innovation, and knowledge-sharing initiatives.

**Budget Management**

* Manage and own the budgeting cycle and provide input to the budgeting process.
* Ensure effective utilization of the function's budget, and report accurately on progress and challenges.
* Investigate and propose implementing strategies that result in a positive financial impact for HS.
* Manage the reporting departments effectively within budget, and report accurately on progress made and challenges encountered.
* Formulate strategies that result in a positive financial impact for HS and aim to mitigate financial and operational risks.

**Qualifications**
**Knowledge and Experience**

* 10 - 12 years of relevant experience.

**Education and Certifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in finance, Fintech, or a related field.
* Master’s degree is Preferred.

data.title: Marketing Product Manager, KSA (Hybrid)
data.raw_snippet: Insulet started in 2000 with an idea and a mission to enable our customers to enjoy simplicity, freedom and healthier lives through the use of our Omnipod® product platform. In the last two decades we have improved the lives of hundreds of thousands of patients by using innovative technology that is
data.jd_text:
Insulet started in 2000 with an idea and a mission to enable our customers to enjoy simplicity, freedom and healthier lives through the use of our Omnipod® product platform. In the last two decades we have improved the lives of hundreds of thousands of patients by using innovative technology that is wearable, waterproof, and lifestyle accommodating.
  
  
We are looking for highly motivated, performance driven individuals to be a part of our expanding team. We do this by hiring amazing people guided by shared values who exceed customer expectations. Our continued success depends on it!
  
  
Insulet Corporation is one of the fastest growing medical device companies thanks to the global success of the Omnipod® Insulin Management System in reducing the daily burden for people living with diabetes.
  
  
The Product Manager – Saudi Arabia, will be responsible for working with the country manager and the regional marketing head to develop & implement marketing programs that drive awareness & interest for Omnipod Insulin Management System, amongst people living with diabetes & drive lead conversion & customer retention in Saudi Arabia market.
  
  
A key objective of the role is supporting the growth in the customer base through helping drive both; new prescribers (HCPs) and patients (end users) starting on Omnipod & minimizing user attrition. This position will work very closely with other regional functions (Marketing, Medical, Regulatory, Market Access, Commercial operations, Legal and Compliance) as well as country distributor teams.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Drive brand growth and visibility within the franchise and support brand engagement initiatives.
* Collaborate on and execute regional marketing strategies with internal teams to boost Omnipod® awareness, drive lead conversion, and retain customers.
* Own the implementation of marketing campaigns and future portfolio launches in line with the agreed marketing plans, and support field teams for seamless execution.
* Create and localize engaging marketing content for healthcare providers and patients, working with and managing external agencies and internal partners for approval.
* Drive KOLs engagement initiatives and work closely with medical affairs on KOL development program for Saudi Arabia market.
* Collaborate with marketing and commercial teams on HCP and patient leads generation campaign initiatives, and support implementation of international segmentation.
* Plan and coordinate brand participation in medical conferences and manage asset approvals and distribution.
* Track and assess marketing performance, leveraging insights to enhance campaign effectiveness.
* Support international launches by coordinating and executing launch activities and maintaining brand identity consistency.

**Preferred Skills & Competencies**

* Project management, communication, and collaboration skills with a track record of timely project completion.
* Experience in Saudi healthcare sector is must, with considerable period spent in HCP marketing.
* Consumer marketing, with understanding of digital marketing is a plus
* Ability to influence without authority.
* Ability to deliver quality job with attention to details.
* Strong cross-functional teamwork, with customer focused and growth mindset.
* Creative approach, regulatory understanding, data analysis capabilities, and ability to prioritize high-impact areas.

**Education And Experience**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in healthcare or business field (additional qualification in digital marketing can be a plus).
* Demonstrated experience in consumer and healthcare marketing; consumer social media is a plus.
* Experience in regulated environments like pharmaceuticals or medical devices, regional experience is preferred.
* Arabic fluency and English proficiency required.

**Travel**
Periodic travel will be required – this will be to attend meetings in key markets, attend tradeshows/conferences, join sales teams on HCP visits.
  
  
NOTE: This position is eligible for hybrid working arrangements (requires on-site work from an Insulet office at least 1x/week; may work remotely other days). -1

data.title: Associate Director, Public Affairs
data.raw_snippet:
The Opportunity
  
We are seeking an Account Director with expertise in public affairs, government relations, and strategic communications. This professional will have a strong background in policy advocacy, issues management, stakeholder engagement, and project leadership. The successful candidate
data.jd_text:
The Opportunity
  
We are seeking an Account Director with expertise in public affairs, government relations, and strategic communications. This professional will have a strong background in policy advocacy, issues management, stakeholder engagement, and project leadership. The successful candidate will join our growing Public Affairs practice in Riyadh, contributing to high-profile campaigns that align with Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030 and other national priorities
  
  
What we’re looking for:
  
We are seeking a proactive, high‑performing Public Affairs professional who can operate confidently as both a leader and a team player, a balance widely recognized as essential for effective performance and for driving collective success. You bring the ability to lead with purpose while collaborating seamlessly within a broader team environment, reflecting modern leadership expectations where leaders also act as active players when needed.
  
You have a strong track record in public affairs, issues management, and strategic communications, with a deep understanding of Saudi Arabia’s regulatory and policy landscape. You excel at building trusted relationships with government stakeholders, clients, and partners, and you bring the judgment and agility required to navigate complex, fast‑moving policy environments. You inspire confidence, elevate team performance, and deliver high‑impact results while growing across sectors and communication channels.
  
Responsibilities:
  
- Design and Lead strategic public affairs programs that shape policy conversations and advance organizational priorities, aligning with the core PA function of directing information and stakeholder engagement.
  
  
- Monitor, analyze, and interpret regulatory and policy developments in Saudi Arabia to provide clear, actionable insights aligned with strategic communication goals
  
  
- Build and maintain trusted relationships with government entities, industry stakeholders, and partners to support effective issue management and influence public perception.
  
  
- Develop integrated communication strategies across traditional media, digital platforms, and stakeholder channels to support credibility and reputation management, consistent with Public Affairs Officer roles.
  
  
- Provide strategic counsel on emerging issues, risks, and opportunities, supporting leadership decision‑making and enhancing the organization’s public positioning
  
  
- Collaborate closely with cross‑regional teams to ensure alignment between global and regional public affairs priorities, reflecting modern PA team structures and leadership expectations.
  
  
- Prepare and oversee the development of briefing materials, policy positions, and stakeholder engagement plans to ensure consistent high‑quality outputs that strengthen the organization’s narrative.
  
  
- Support multi‑stakeholder initiatives, events, and advocacy efforts that advance business objectives and reinforce organizational credibility across key audiences.
  
  
Qualifications
  
- Experience: 10+ years in public affairs, government relations, policy advocacy, or strategic communications, with strong preference for experience navigating Saudi Arabia’s policy and regulatory environment.
  
  
- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Public Policy, Political Science, Communications, International Relations, or a related field.
  
  
- Language Skills: Full professional fluency in Arabic and English (written and spoken).
  
  
- Policy & Cultural Insight: Deep understanding of Saudi Arabia’s political ecosystem, policymaking processes, government stakeholders, and national initiatives such as Vision 2030.
  
  
- Policy Writing & Analysis: Strong ability to craft policy positions, briefing notes, and advocacy messaging, backed by sharp analytical skills and the ability to simplify complex issues.
  
  
- Leadership: Proven track record leading public affairs teams, managing multi‑market workstreams, and guiding stakeholder engagement strategies.
  
  
- Stakeholder & Media Engagement: Experience engaging with government ministries, regulators, industry bodies, and media; comfortable drafting public statements, managing narratives, and supporting issue management.
  
  
- Project & Issue Management: Ability to manage fast‑moving policy files, coordinate cross‑functional inputs, and deliver high‑quality outputs under pressure.
  
  
- Industry Knowledge: Experience working across sectors such as healthcare, technology, energy, transportation, or government sectors is a plus.
  
  
  
Careers at APCO
  
Through our recruitment, hiring and retention efforts, APCO is committed to building teams to bring the best possible expertise and robust perspectives to our clients. We embrace differences in experience, viewpoint and ideas, starting with our values and extending to our behaviors, policies and practices. We aim to create a positive work experience and welcoming environment where everyone feels they belong and can thrive.

data.title: Sales Director - Integrated Services
data.raw_snippet: Bayut is the number one property portal in the Kingdom, connecting millions of users across the country. We are committed to delivering the best online search experience. As part of Dubizzle Group, Bayut is alongside some of the strongest classifieds brands in the market. With a collective strength
data.jd_text:
Bayut is the number one property portal in the Kingdom, connecting millions of users across the country. We are committed to delivering the best online search experience. As part of Dubizzle Group, Bayut is alongside some of the strongest classifieds brands in the market. With a collective strength of 5 brands, we have more than 123 million monthly users that trust in our dedication to providing them with the best platform for their needs.

As a Sales Director you will spearhead our revenue growth, drive market expansion, and lead a high-performing sales organisation. You will lead, mentor, and inspire a team of sales professionals to achieve ambitious targets while ensuring customer satisfaction and long-term business success.

**In this role, you will:**

**Strategic Sales Leadership**

* Develop and execute a high-impact sales and business growth strategy aligned with the company's ambitious growth plans.
* Identify and capitalise on new market opportunities, forging partnerships that drive business expansion and revenue growth
* Lead and optimise end-to-end sales operations, ensuring high performance, efficiency, and scalability

**Revenue Growth**

* Drive large-scale deal negotiations and secure high-value commercial agreements with key stakeholders, enterprises, and institutional clients
* Establish and nurture relationships with high-level decision-makers, including developers, investors, and government entities
* Develop a robust pipeline for new business opportunities and oversee deal closures that directly contribute to the company's top-line growth

**Sales Team Management & Leadership**

* Inspire, mentor, and lead a large, high-performing sales organisation (200+ team members)
* Build a sales culture of excellence, accountability, and motivation, ensuring teams are aligned with business objectives and revenue targets
* Recruit, train, and retain top sales talent, fostering a high-energy, results-driven environment

**Collaboration with Leadership & Market Expansion**

* Work closely with the business strategy teams and the top management (including the CEO) to shape the company's expansion roadmap and navigate new market entry strategies
* Provide data-driven insights and recommendations to refine product-market fit, sales models, and go-to-market strategies
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including marketing, operations, and finance, to ensure seamless execution of sales initiatives

**Market Development & Competitive Strategy**

* Analyse regional market trends, customer needs, and competitive landscapes to refine sales strategies and identify emerging opportunities
* Develop localised sales playbooks, tailoring approaches based on cultural, economic, and regulatory dynamics
* Encourage innovation and leverage technology to enhance sales performance, customer engagement, and deal conversion rates
  
  

**Requirements**

* 10+ years of progressive sales leadership experience, preferably in real estate, PropTech, SaaS, fintech, or high-growth industries
* Extensive experience in working with CRMs to manage teams
* Proven track record of scaling sales operations, driving revenue growth, and securing large enterprise deals
* Experience leading and managing large sales teams
* Experience in managing P&L and optimising sales performance through data-driven decision-making (Preferred)
* Deep understanding of the Saudi and MENA markets, with experience in business expansion, market entry strategies, and competitive positioning
* Strong network and relationships within the real estate, finance, and government sectors in the MENA region (Preferred)
* Strong commercial acumen and deal-making expertise, with the ability to negotiate and close complex, high-value contracts
* Entrepreneurial mindset with a passion for innovation, execution, and scaling businesses in dynamic environments
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, high-growth environment with a hands-on approach
  
  

**Benefits**

* High-performing and fast-paced work environment

* Comprehensive Health Insurance
* Rewards and recognition

* Learning & Development

Bayut is an equal-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

#KSABayut

Sanofi is an R&D-driven, AI-powered biopharma company committed
data.jd_text:
**Job Title: Greater Gulf Medical Head, General Medicines**

* Grade: 5.1
* Location: Riyadh (Saudi Arabia) or Dubai (UAE)
* Manager’s name: Alan DIVANOVIC
* Manager’s title: Key Markets Medical Head, General Medicines

**About Sanofi**
Sanofi is an R&D-driven, AI-powered biopharma company committed to improving people's lives and delivering compelling growth. We apply our deep understanding of the immune system to invent medicines and vaccines that treat and protect millions of people around the world, with an innovative pipeline that could benefit millions more. Our team is guided by one purpose: we chase the miracles of science to improve people's lives; this inspires us to drive progress and deliver positive impact for our people and the communities we serve, by addressing the most urgent healthcare, environmental, and societal challenges of our time.
  
  
Sanofi General Medicines Global Business Unit Is Dedicated To Delivering Standard-of-care Medicines That Help People Manage Their Health And Relieve Pressure On Healthcare Systems. It Is Continuously Evolving To Stay Relevant To Customers With The Following Strategies
  
  

* Launching transformative therapies in the areas of autoimmune Type 1 Diabetes (aT1D) and Transplant.
* Growing core assets and increasing their reach with new digital health and AI-driven business models.
* Coupling technology with clinical expertise to better understand patient needs, empowering them to manage chronic conditions.
* Rebuilding pipeline through internal and external innovation.
* Boosting omnichannel strategy for customers and patients, using data and Artificial Intelligence to personalize the engagements.

The General Medicines Medical is primarily focused on aT1D and Transplant as core innovative areas, while continuing to maintain efforts on improving the day-to-day health of millions of patients with chronic conditions such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease.
  
  
Greater Gulf (GG) is a Multi Country Organization (MCO) that includes Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman and Bahrein. It is one of Sanofi's eight Key Markets globally. Key Markets designate a select group of priority geographies that represent major business opportunity and growth potential for the organization. This designation reflects the strategic importance of the Greater Gulf region within the broader Sanofi enterprise.
  
  
**About The Job**
As a member of both the Sanofi Greater Gulf General Medicines Leadership Team and Key Markets Medical Leadership Team, the GG Medical Head will develop and execute medical strategy and operational plans for innovations in aT1D and Transplant. This position requires aligning global strategy with local business needs while serving as an inspirational leader and catalyst for transformation in the rapidly evolving healthcare landscape.
  
  
The role demands a forward-thinking pioneer who combines deep scientific expertise with digital fluency, leveraging AI-powered analytics, real-world evidence platforms, and emerging technologies to transform medical insights into breakthrough strategies to accelerate patient impact and redefine healthcare possibilities.
  
  
This leader will inspire and empower a high-performing team while fostering a culture of continuous learning, technological curiosity, and adaptive thinking. Building the next-generation capabilities - from AI-assisted medical affairs to digital stakeholder engagement – while maintaining the highest ethical standards and proactive compliance, ensuring that every scientific and technology advancement ultimately serves the purpose of improving people's lives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Shape the Future of Medicine in GG: architect the medical strategy, planning, and resourcing framework to ensure flawless, high-impact launches of transformative therapies in autoimmune Type 1 Diabetes (aT1D) and Transplant — setting a new benchmark for what medical excellence looks like across Greater Gulf.
* Orchestrate Best in Class Product Launches: Define and execute bold medical strategies across the full product lifecycle — from pre-launch through post-launch — ensuring transformative therapies reach patients faster, smarter, and with maximum impact. Drive optimal lifecycle management across both innovative and established portfolios.
* Champion a Bold GLocal Vision: Craft and own a compelling, future-forward vision for Medical Affairs across Greater Gulf, seamlessly bridging global strategy with local realities. Be the architect of a GLocal model that is agile, patient-centric, and built for the speed of tomorrow's healthcare landscape.
* Lead with Strategic Influence: Drive strategic leadership for the Medical across Greater Gulf, co-creating integrated action plans with cross-functional partners that combine scientific rigor, business acumen, and an unwavering focus on patient outcomes.
* Build a Thriving Scientific Ecosystem: Cultivate a dynamic, future-ready scientific ecosystem across Greater Gulf — forging powerful alliances with KOLs, external experts, HTA bodies, and health authorities — to cement Sanofi's position as the trusted scientific partner of choice in aT1D and Transplant.
* Catalyze Cross-Functional Excellence: Lead the optimization and execution of affiliate medical plans that unlock full product value. Act as a unifying force across commercial, market access, public affairs, regulatory, safety, clinical operations, and R&D — driving integrated, data-rich plans that span publications, health authority submissions, and scientific congresses.
* Inspire, Develop & Future-Proof Your Team: Lead a high-performing, agile medical organization built on a customer-first mindset. Champion talent development, build a robust pipeline of future leaders, and foster a culture of bold thinking, continuous learning, and seamless collaboration with global Go-to-Market Capabilities.
* Harness AI, Digital & Real-World Evidence: Be at the forefront of the digital health revolution — leveraging real-world data, artificial intelligence, and cutting-edge digital enablers to generate breakthrough evidence and insights. Transform data into decisions that accelerate medical affairs performance and, most importantly, improve patient outcomes.
* Drive Smart, Responsible Resource Stewardship: Manage the country medical budget with strategic foresight and entrepreneurial discipline — identifying synergies, optimizing resource allocation, and ensuring every investment delivers meaningful impact for patients and the business.
* Set the Gold Standard for Ethical Leadership: Champion a culture of proactive compliance and uncompromising integrity — establishing the highest ethical standards for the medical function and ensuring every decision is grounded in patient-centered risk/benefit principles.

**About You**
Education & Credentials
  
  

* Advanced scientific degree: MD, PhD, or PharmD (Medical Degree preferred)

Experience & Expertise
  
  

* 10+ years of progressive medical affairs experience with proven impact
* Demonstrated success developing and executing medical strategy across Greater Gulf markets, with substantial experience leading high-performing medical teams
* Established network of key opinion leaders and scientific influencers throughout Greater Gulf
* Track record of cross-functional collaboration with R&D, Commercial, Market Access, Public Affairs, Patient Safety, and Regulatory teams
* Deep understanding of Greater Gulf's evolving healthcare ecosystem and regulatory environment
* Thrives in complex, matrixed global organizations with ability to navigate ambiguity
* Hands-on experience deploying AI, digital tools, and data analytics to transform medical operations
* Strong commercial acumen with ability to connect medical strategy to business outcomes

Leadership Capabilities
  
  

* Visionary strategist who thinks boldly, acts decisively, and focuses relentlessly on impact over activity
* Transformational leader who creates compelling visions, inspires teams, and drives change in dynamic environments
* High-energy self-starter who contributes beyond functional boundaries and challenges the status quo
* Relationship architect who builds trust and credibility across diverse stakeholders—internal teams, senior leadership, and external partners
* Influential communicator who shapes thinking, drives alignment, and mobilizes action at all organizational levels
* Collaborative, open-minded, and adaptable with unwavering patient-centricity
* Lead by uncompromising integrity and ethics principles in all decisions

**Exemplifie The One Sanofi Culture And Values**

* Aim Higher: Focus on what matters, set high standards and move with urgency, learning from setbacks as we go to achieve higher performance.
* Act for Patients: Never compromise on integrity, eliminate barriers and partner with others to go faster and further for patients.
* Be Bold: Take thoughtful risks, seize opportunities and think beyond what's possible to accelerate our science and drive compelling growth.
* Lead Together: Build trust and collaborate openly on our shared goals, celebrate collective wins and foster a sense of belonging.

**Language Skills**
Oral and written fluency in English. Arabic is a plus.
  
  
Pursue progress, discover extraordinary
  
  
Better is out there. Better medications, better outcomes, better science. But progress doesn’t happen without people – people from different backgrounds, in different locations, doing different roles, all united by one thing: a desire to make miracles happen. So, let’s be those people.
  
  
At Sanofi, we provide equal opportunities to all regardless of race, colour, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, or gender identity.
  
  
Watch our ALL IN video and check out our Diversity Equity and Inclusion actions at sanofi.com!
