As the face of Emirates, you’ll be the person customers turn to for help and direction when they fly with us, so
data.search_title: "Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
A personality that shines, the ability to adapt to any situation and make people feel at ease. These are a few of the qualities we’re looking for in our cabin crew.
  
  
As the face of Emirates, you’ll be the person customers turn to for help and direction when they fly with us, so you need to be friendly, observant and able to provide the right support.
  
  
Being a member of the cabin crew is so much more than a service role – safety is our highest priority. You’ll need to lead confidently and take control when it comes to managing aircraft services, security, and safety procedures. This comes from the world-class learning experience our crew receive at our state-of-the-art facility in Dubai.
  
  
Qualification
  
  
Here are some other things we look for in our cabin crew:
  
  

* You’ve had more than a year’s experience in hospitality/customer service
* You have a positive attitude and the natural ability to provide excellent service in a team environment, dealing with people from many cultures
* Your minimum qualification is high school graduate (Grade 12)
* You need to be fluent in written and spoken English
* You’re at least 160cm tall and can reach 212 cm while standing on tiptoes, to enable you to reach emergency equipment on all aircraft types
* No visible tattoos while you’re in Emirates cabin crew uniform (without covering them with bandages or cosmetics)
* As Emirates cabin crew, you’ll be based in Dubai and will need to meet the UAE's employment visa requirements

Aside from the requirements of the role, you should be determined to always perform to the highest standards, focus on being solution oriented, and be able to manage a demanding work schedule. You should have the ability to deliver an authentic experience to our customers. You’ll be culturally aware and reflect the Emirates personality – professional, empathetic, progressive, visionary and cosmopolitan.
  
  
Before clicking the Apply button, please keep the following documents ready to submit with your application:
  
  

* Recent CV in English
* Recent photo

Salary & benefits
  
  
Tax free salary
  
  
Starting Salary & Flying Pay - Your pay is made up of three components: a fixed basic salary, an hourly pay for operated flights and an overseas meal allowance.
  
  
Basic salary = AED 4,980 / month,
  
  
Flying Pay = AED 69.60 / hour based on avg. 80-100 hours / month,
  
  
Average Total Pay = AED 11,244 / month (~USD 3,100, EUR 2,600 or GBP 2,280).
  
  

* These are approximate numbers for Grade II (Economy Class). Meal allowances for night stops are credited to the salary in arrears the following month. Hotel accommodation as well as transport to and from the airport is provided by the company.

data.jd_text:
Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub – a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations.
  
  
**About The Role**
After showcasing our iconic cabin fashion on the global stage at Paris Fashion Week, we’re now offering you the opportunity to be a part of it. Ready to take flight with us? We’re searching for exceptional individuals to join our world-class Cabin Crew team.
  
  
As the face of Riyadh Air, our passengers will rely on you not only for a safe journey but for creating memorable moments that make them feel valued and cared for. We will provide comprehensive training to equip you with the skills needed to handle any situation confidently, always putting safety and customer care first.
  
  
Driven by a passion for service excellence and a commitment to safety, you will make a real difference in the experience of every passenger on board. Whether it's assisting with their needs or ensuring a smooth and safe journey, you’ll be at the forefront of ensuring the well-being of our guests.
  
  
Every day presents a new adventure, as you travel the world and represent Riyadh Air. And, of course, you’ll be part of a team that gets to wear our stylish, Paris-inspired cabin fashion—so you’ll look as amazing as you feel!
  
  
Are you ready to elevate your career and make a lasting impact? Join us and become part of a team that’s dedicated to safety, service, and the thrill of adventure.
  
  
**About You**
**What we’re looking for?**

* A natural communicator with a passion for providing top-tier service while keeping our passengers safe and sound throughout their journey.
* Someone who’s ready to wear their smile and bring that " Hafawa " hospitality magic while ensuring everyone feels safe and secure, no matter where the journey takes you.
* An adventurer at heart, team player, excited to be the face of Riyadh Air, take on new experiences and ready to embrace the thrill of travel all while making sure your passengers are in safe hands from takeoff to landing.

**Do you have what it takes to fly with us?**
✔
**Fluent in English?**
Great! Speak other languages? Even better! Communication is key when welcoming guests from around the world.
  
  
✔
**Height & Reach:**
At least 160 cm tall with an arm reach of 212 cm —just enough to reach those overhead bins and quickly access emergency equipment when needed. It’s all about keeping our guests safe while staying efficient and prepared!
  
  
✔
**Age requirement:**
You must be at least 21 years old to join our crew — because great adventures start at the right time!
  
  
✔
**Swimming skills:**
Safety first! Confidence in water is a must—you should be able to swim with a flotation device in case of an emergency.
  
  
✔
**Professional appearance:**
No visible tattoos or piercings in uniform—we take pride in a polished and professional look.
  
  
✔
**Visa & relocation:**
You must meet Saudi employment visa requirements and be open to relocating to Riyadh, your new home.
  
  
✔
**Education:**
A high school certificate or higher is required—because Knowledge and Personality go hand in hand.
  
  
✔
**Customer service experience:**
At least one year in hospitality or a customer-facing role— because a warm smile goes a long way! You’ll be the heart of the Riyadh Air experience.
  
  
If you’re ready to take your career to new heights with a team that champions
**safety, service, and adventure**
, this is your moment. Apply now, and let’s turn your dream job into reality—one flight at a time!
  
  
Click
**"Apply"**
to submit your application! Our Talent Acquisition team will be reviewing applications soon, and we can’t wait to connect with you.

data.jd_text:
Purpose of Job
  
  
تتضمن الأنشطة التشغيلية البسيطة التي يقومون بها على المشاركة في تقييمات الدخل/ السجلات المالية للمنشآت وفحص السجلات الضريبية التاريخية المستخدمة لتحديد الالتزامات الضريبية بدقة مع ضمان الامتثال لأنظمة الضرائب في المملكة وإجراءات التدقيق والقواعد الإدارية. والتواصل مع المكلفين للحصول على توضيحات بشأن الإقرارات.
  
  
Job Responsibilities
  
  

* توحيد وتصنيف وتحديد أولويات جداول تدقيق ضريبة القيمة المضافة للمنشآت ، والفرز حسب نوع الصناعة/ الضريبة والتأكد من الإرسال إلى فرق التدقيق ذات الصلة للتقييم والمراجعة
* إجراء تدقيقات ضريبية كاملة على معاملات ضريبة القيمة المضافة داخل المملكة، وفحص صحة الوثائق القانونية المقدمة من قبل المنشآت، والتحقق من الإقرارات والسجلات المقدمة والتأكد من اكتمال الوثائق المطلوبة قبل تقييم المسؤولية الضريبية وتقييمها
* البحث في الأخبار العامة، والمقالات، وقواعد البيانات، والقنوات المشتركة، وما إلى ذلك للتحقيق وفهم نشاط المنشآت التجاري بما في ذلك الهيكل والحجم والسلطات القضائية، إلخ.
* دراسة وتقييم الوضع المالي وإقرارات الدخل وتدفقات الإيرادات للمنشآت للمقارنة مع المعايير والصناعات المماثلة واتخاذ قرار بشأن نهج التقييم (التقييمات الفعلية، المقدرة، المخفضة)
* فحص إقرارات المكلفين، وتحديد القضايا عالية المخاطر، واكتشاف الحالات غير المتوافقة والتواصل مع أصحاب المصلحة الداخليين لتجنب المخاطر المحتملة بما في ذلك التهرب الضريبي
* مراجعة ملفات التدقيق الحالية ونتائج التدقيق السابقة للتحقق من صحة حسابات المبيعات وحسابات القبض والواردات والمخزون والحسابات الأخرى ذات الصلة
* إجراء زيارات تدقيق ميداني ومقابلة ممثلي المنشآت للتحقيق في السجلات والأنظمة المحاسبية والاستثناءات والمعاملات المشكوك فيها وما إلى ذلك، وتقديم المشورة إلى المنشآت بشأن المتطلبات والالتزامات والعقوبات والحقوق
* التحقق من دقة تقارير المنشآت وإدخالات الإقرارات، وتتبع المعاملات من السجلات المحاسبية إلى وثائق المصدر، والفواتير، والإيصالات، والواردات، وما إلى ذلك، والتشاور مع فريق التدقيق بشأن التناقضات المحددة
* توحيد الملاحظات القانونية والمالية، ودراستها وتقييمها وفقًا لمعايير الأهلية والمتطلبات الضريبية المعتمدة مسبقًا للتوصية بالالتزام الضريبي وصياغة تقرير التدقيق بما يتماشى مع السياسات والإجراءات المعمول بها

Education
  
  
بكالوريوس في المحاسبة أو ما يعادلها
  
  
**Experience**
ما لا يقل عن 3 سنوات خبرة في مجال التدقيق

data.search_title: "Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Purpose**
This position will take a strategic and operational role to support the continuing growth of the market through attracting and acquiring top talent. In addition the role participates to Employer Branding to further enhance our positioning as an employer of choice. This will be achieved through collaboration with the regional talent acquisition team, HRM and the Internal&corporate communication and business leaders.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Work closely with the local HR Lead and functional leaders to understand the business needs to ensure optimal alignment of strategy and resources.
* Contributes to Build winning TA strategy by taking information gathered from HR & the business and staying ahead of business needs to proactively search for a diverse pool of top industry talent using various recruiting methods (direct sourcing, internal recruitment, web-based, print media, social media, etc.).
* Highlights trends and themes discovered by working with internal customers, talking to candidates and staying on top of market trends.
* Identify key metrics to measure ROI, influence future decisions and resource allocation; leverage these metrics to monitor and ensure customer and candidate satisfaction.
* Drive the strategy and execution of employer branding for TA and social recruiting in close collaboration with HR team.
* Accountable for executing recruitment excellence standards & initiatives, reinforce recruiting principles, recommend and implement process improvements.
* In alligment with HRM, supports workforce planning activities to better understand strategic direction of the business and how this will translate into future hiring in order to proactively build candidate pipeline.
* Qualifies candidates by conducting phone, video conference and in-person interviews. Provides coaching and advice to candidates and hiring managers throughout the interview process
* Performs reference/background checks and initiates the relocation requirements when appropriate.
* Stays current on latest recruiting and industry trends to continuously evolve candidate pipeline and service levels.

**Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**

* Customer focused-must be extremely customer service oriented to provide hiring managers, HR managers and candidates, with the highest level of recruiting excellence.
* Action oriented and proactive approach to working with hiring managers and HR teams.
* Strong end to end recruitment experience at a variety of levels, including senior management.
* Ability to handle constant change with ease and flexibility
* In-depth knowledge of Saudization regulations
* Passionate about recruiting top talent demonstrated by high level of energy, positive & upbeat attitude.
* Proven ability to use behavioral interviewing techniques.
* Ability to communicate effectively in English and Arabic, both written and oral.
* Ability to exercise good judgment and decision making skills. Able to manage confidential and sensitive information and use appropriately.
* Excellent interpersonal, verbal and written communication skills.
* Strong organization, multi-tasking and follow-up skills in order to manager high volume recruitment.
* Advanced MS Office skills and experience in applicant tracking systems

**Requisite Education And Experience / Minimum Qualifications**

* University Degree in HR or related field
* Minimum of 5 years experience in recruitment field at all levels – with at least 1-2 years inhouse experience is a prerequisite.
* Inhouse generalist HR experience in addition to recruitment is a plus.

data.raw_snippet:
Purpose of Job

data.search_title: "Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
Purpose of Job
  
  
Jobholders at this level are capable of operating with minimal supervision. They work within guidelines and procedures in order to prepare more complex, specialized or ad hoc reports to their related field. They undertake operational activities including performing complete tax audits on refundsâ requests including examination and desk audits on large accounts in order to identify non-compliance within applicable policies and procedures.
  
  
Job Responsibilities
  
  
Refund Planning
  
  

* Review and study refund policies to remain current on refund limit utilization, refund risk control authorizations and applicable margins and ensure adherence ZATCA’s rules, regulations, policies and procedures
* Develop and update assessment templates and audit tools in accordance with operational procedures and policies to facilitate customer request analysis and safeguard timely evaluation
* Keep abreast of the latest developments, news and updates by industry type and sector (business and insurance, telecommunication, consumer goods, etc.) to ensure awareness of new tax practices adopted by taxpayers and businesses to incorporate in assessments and audit reviews
* Maintain and update refunds’ manuals, eligibility criteria, legal requirements and supporting documents by taxpayer type, integrate in computer-aided audit tools to facilitate audit assessment and review

Refund Operations
  
  

* Consolidate, categorize and prioritize refunds’ requests and schedules, sort by tax/industry type and ensure dispatch to relevant audit teams for assessment and review
* Review refunds’ applications and requests, examine the validity of legal documents presented by taxpayers, and ensure completeness of supporting documents prior to case assessment and evaluation
* Gather needed data to perform desk audits activities, communicate with relevant stakeholders (account managers, taxpayers, banks, audit bureau, government entities, etc.) to obtain needed information and clarifications and communicate with legal function for contractual structures to safeguard legitimacy of applicants
* Research public news, articles, databases, shared channels, etc. to investigate and understand taxpayers’ business activity including structure, size, process, jurisdictions, etc.
* Study and assess taxpayers’ financial status, income statements, financial strength and capabilities, and revenue streams to compare with benchmarks and similar industries and decide on assessment approach (actual, estimated, reduced assessments)
* Inspect and investigate taxpayers’ declarations, pinpoint high-risk and speculative issues, detect non-compliant cases and communicate with internal stakeholders to avoid potential risks including tax evasion
* Consolidate legal and financial observations, study and evaluate against pre-approved eligibility criteria and refund requirements to recommend approval/ rejection decisions in line with applicable policies and procedures
* Manage the development of audit reports including tax assessments (actual / reduced / estimated assessments) to identify taxpayers’ refunds’ amount
* Develop lists of compliant taxpayers accepted refunds with related amounts, submit to internal committees to secure needed approvals for payments’ release/transfer
* Monitor taxpayer objections and appeals and ensure coordination with Legal Affairs or AMANA to resolve disputes and support in key testimonies by providing clarifications on final audit findings and results
* Maintain and update refund operations related systems and databases, ensure that all audit findings are administered and stored in a preserved manner in order to facilitate data exchange with internal stakeholders and other government agencies

Reporting and Support
  
  

* Draft refunds’ audit reports to highlight recommendations and conclusions along with relevant evidence, proofs and supporting documents and escalate for revision and verification

Job Details
  
  
Communication and Contacs
  
  
Education
  
  
Bachelor’s degree Business Administration or equivalent is required
  
  
**Experience**
A minimum of 4 years of relevant experience
  
  
Competencies
  
  
Negotiation and Influence - Developing
  
  
Collection Planning and Assessment - Developing
  
  
Collaboration and Communication - Developing
  
  
Professionalism - Developing
  
  
Fact Based Recommendations - Proficient
  
  
Results Oriented - Developing
  
  
Customer Focus - Developing
  
  
Quality Management - Developing
  
  
Collection Techniques - Proficient
  
  
Enablement of Change and Innovation - Developing

data.jd_text:
**:هدف الوظيفة**
يشمل هذا المستوى شاغلي الوظائف من المهنيين ذوي الخبرة القادرين على القيام بالعمل من خلال الاستعانة بالتوجيهات العامة والرئيسية، حيث أنهم معنيين بشكل أساسي بإيجاد حلول للتحديات التي تتطلب بعض التحليل من أجل فهم وحل ومعالجة المشاكل التي تم تصعيدها من المستويات الأقل خبرة.
  
  
تتضمن الأنشطة التشغيلية المعقدة التي يقومون بها على تحديد المؤشرات لقياس ملاحظات العملاء، والإشراف على عملية تصميم استبيانات قياس مستوى الرضا عن الخدمات وتحليل وتحليل استطلاعات رضا العملاء وتقديم التوصيات ، وإعداد البرامج التوعوية، وخطط الحملات الإعلامية والرقمية، بما يشمل المنتجات والمنصات المتنوعة (فعاليات – مؤتمرات – ورش عمل- أخبار صحفية ..) وإدارة حسابات مع منصات وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي، مع الإشراف والمشاركة في عملية إعداد وتصميم المحتوى المخصص للنشر عبر منتجات التوعية والإعلام المتعددة، والإشراف على المراجعة الدورية لسلامة المحتوى المنشور عبر الموقع الإلكتروني وحسابات التواصل للتحقق من تحديثه وفق ما يلزم وموائمته للأعمال والمهام، والتنسيق مع مقدمي الخدمات الخارجيين وأصحاب المصلحة الخارجيين لتوحيد الجهود في مجال التوعية الإعلامية والنشر وفق السياسات المتبعة.
  
  
**المهام والمسؤوليات:**

* مواكبة التوجهات والممارسات الحديثة لإعداد وجهات النظر لكل من رحلات العملاء الحالية والمستقبلية
* مواءمة الاستراتيجيات مع توجيهات تجربة العملاء بالتنسيق مع جميع الإدارات ذات الصلة
* إعداد وتوزيع وجمع وتحليل استطلاعات رضا العملاء لقياس رضا العملاء وتحديد مجالات التحسين المحتملة
* تقديم الدعم في تحديد المقاييس متعددة الإدارات لقياس ذكاء العملاء وردود الفعل وإعداد التقارير الخاصة بها بشكل مستمر
* إعداد خطة شاملة ونوعية لتحسين تجربة العملاء بناءً على تحليل نقاط الضعف الحالية وأوجه القصور والثغرات
* التوصية بمعايير قياس جودة الخدمات المقدمة من قبل الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية وفروعها
* تحديد طرق تحديث الخدمات عبر المنصة الالكترونية الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية بالتنسيق مع ممثلي الإدارات
* العمل مع الفرق المرنة لتنسيق مبادرات التحسين المتعلقة بتجربة العملاء متعددة الإدارات
* تحديد الشركات الخارجية التي تقدم أفضل الأسعار والخدمات من أجل تلبية أهداف التوعية والتواصل المؤسسي وتقليل التكاليف ومتابعة نتائجها
* إعداد برامج توعية لزيادة الوعي العام بأعمال ومهام الأمانة العامة واللجان وحقوق والتزامات جميع الأطراف المعنية
* صناعة وإعداد سياسة النشر بما يتفق مع السياسات والأنظمة العامة وبالتنسيق مع الجهات الخارجية المعنية، والعمل على تحديثها ونشرها بشكل دوري
* صناعة وإعداد منهجيات التواصل الخارجي / الداخلي بما يتفق مع السياسات والأنظمة العامة وبالتنسيق مع الجهات الخارجية المعنية، والعمل على تحديثها ونشرها بشكل دوري
* إعداد وتنفيذ خطة توعية وتواصل سنوية، وتزويد رئيس مدير الإدارة ومدير عام الإدارة بتقارير دورية حول مستوى الأداء وأية ملاحظات رصدت خلالها وآلية المعالجة وما تم بشأنها
* إعداد والحفاظ على العلاقات مع الصحافة ومختلف الشركاء الإعلاميين لدعم خطط اتصالات الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية، وإعداد ونشر المقالات والأخبار الصحفية
* صناعة وإعداد وتصميم المحتوى المخصص للنشر عبر منتجات التوعية والإعلام المتعددة، والتأكد من ملاءمتها
* بناء وتصميم المنتجات التوعوية حسب خطط النشر المستهدفة وبما يتلاءم مع البرنامج المستهدف (فعاليات – مؤتمرات – ورش عمل – أخبار صحفية ..)
* تولي الأمور المتعلقة بحملات التوعية والتأكد من أنها تعكس رسالة الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية
* نشر الوعي من خلال حسابات وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي (مثل Twitter و LinkedIn) والموقع الإلكتروني بطريقة مستمرة والتعامل مع الحسابات ذات الصلة
* ضمان ملاءمة المحتوى المنشور والمعد للنشر والمراجعة الدورية لضمان التزامه بسياسات النشر المعتمدة في الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية المتعلقة بقنوات التواصل الاجتماعي (من حيث ملاءمة المحتوى للجمهور المستهدف، ونوع الموقع
    
    
  المؤهلات والمتطلبات الوظيفية:
    
  ما لا يقل عن 4 سنوات من الخبرة في المجال.
    
  بكالوريوس في الاتصالات أو التسويق أو الإدارة العامة.

data.raw_snippet:

Apple Retail is where the best of Apple comes together. We bring our expertise to help people do what they love, delivering an only-at-Apple experience. We believe inclusion is a shared responsibility and we work together to foster a culture where everyone belongs and is inspired to do t
data.search_title: "Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Summary**
Apple Retail is where the best of Apple comes together. We bring our expertise to help people do what they love, delivering an only-at-Apple experience. We believe inclusion is a shared responsibility and we work together to foster a culture where everyone belongs and is inspired to do their best work.
  
  
You will build brand loyalty and create owners of Apple products and services. You’re dedicated to selling and delivering a customer service experience that is unlike any other. You are curious — you ask questions to learn about our customers’ needs, customizing recommendations to enrich their lives.
  
  
Please note: This is a part-time opportunity (20 hours per week) based in our retail stores. We’re hiring for multiple roles. You'll receive the same benefits as a full-time employee, alongside competitive pay.
  
  
**Description**
Deliver excellent service to Apple customers by seeking to understand their needs, identifying ownership opportunities, presenting products and services, and educating customers on relevant ways to buy products.
  
  
Understand and proactively stay up to date on Apple’s products, services, purchase options, and Product Zone sales processes.
  
  
Support your peers throughout the store as needed by sharing knowledge about Apple’s products, services, and purchase options, and assist in offering ownership opportunities.
  
  
Maintain accuracy and follow guidance.
  
  
Perform other tasks as needed, including but not limited to providing customer service and support in other areas of the store.
  
  
Contribute to an inclusive environment by respecting each other’s differences and having the curiosity to learn.
  
  
Demonstrate Apple’s values of inclusion and diversity in daily activities.
  
  
**Minimum Qualifications**

* This will be a part time opportunity (20 hours a week) working in our retail stores
* You should have availability to work a schedule based on business needs that may include nights, weekends, and public holidays in the retail store, and reliably attend work as scheduled, in line with local laws and subject to any approved accommodations.
* You should also be proficient in the local language, both written and spoken.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* You can:
* Demonstrate knowledge of Apple products and services.
* Personalize solutions based on customer needs, and effectively communicate them.
* Work in a fast-paced environment, often supporting multiple customers at the same time.
* Work in a team environment, demonstrating shared responsibility and accountability with other team members.
* Be curious and open to learning from others and helping each other grow.
* Learn about and deepen your understanding of Apple products and services, and third-party products, to enhance the customer experience.
* Be trusted with sensitive or confidential information, keeping with Apple’s core values.

At Apple, we’re not all the same. And that’s our greatest strength. We draw on the differences in who we are, what we’ve experienced, and how we think. Because to create products that serve everyone, we believe in including everyone. Therefore, we are committed to treating all applicants fairly and equally. We will work with applicants to make any reasonable accommodations.

data.search_title: "Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**About Us**

Tamara is the leading fintech platform in Saudi Arabia and the wider GCC region with a mission to help people make their dreams come true by building the most customer-centric financial super-app on earth. The company serves millions of users in the region and partners with leading global and regional brands such as SHEIN, Jarir, noon, IKEA and Amazon, as well as small and medium businesses.

Tamara is Saudi Arabia’s first fintech unicorn and is backed by Sanabil Investments, a wholly owned company by the Public Investment Fund (PIF), SNB Capital, Checkout.com, amongst others. The company operates from its headquarters in Riyadh, with additional regional and global support offices.

**Your role**

We're seeking a Customer Care Associate for our Customer Experience team. In this role, you will be crucial in providing answers to customers queries through website and live chat related to Tamara’s services. This role will be
**based onsite in our Riyadh Office.**

Drawing on your proficiency in managing interaction with customers on a daily basis, you will be responsible for delivering exceptional customer service through accurate information and tailored solutions that address their needs to create unique experiences only Tamara can provide.

With a proven track record of leveraging strong communication skills (written & verbal) to effectively solve customer issues and find solutions quickly, even in a fast-paced environment, and ultimately revolutionize the way millions of users shop, pay, and bank.

You are a driven, determined, curious team player, knowing that collective strength means we all win. With a positive outlook, you are solution-oriented–persevering regardless of circumstances, always finding a way through, no matter the challenges.

You will effectively find a way to work with everyone through empathy and respect. You will be driven and comfortable with responding quickly with urgency, with the ability to change course without losing momentum and energy, resulting in great success.

**Your Responsibilities**

* Answer inbound Emails and respond to live chats in an efficient manner.
* Identify customer questions, concerns, and overall needs.
* Provide accurate answers and solutions to customer queries.
* Reviewing customer accounts and transactions while resolving issues.
* Giving detailed explanations of services.
* Understanding and striving to meet support metrics while providing excellent customer service, and follow communication “scripts” when handling different topics.
* Reviewing customer accounts and transactions while resolving issues.
* Giving detailed explanations of services.

**Your expertise**

* Previous customer service experience is a must (min 1-2 years)
* Native Arabic speaker. Due to human resource regulations we can only consider saudi nationals in this role.
* Previous experience in handling customer escalations is a plus
* Fluency in English Language, B1 profile.
* Ability to use computers.
* Ability to use internet applications.
* University degree holder
* Great verbal & written communication skills.
* Ability to handle customers’ issues.
* Ability to solve problems in a short period of time.
* Flexibility with rotational working hours/days.

All qualified individuals are encouraged to apply.

data.search_title: "Mediclinic Middle East" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**

To manage and lead the Supply Department, ensuring the timely and cost-effective procurement of materials in alignment with HBKU Procurement Policies and Procedures.

**Key Result Areas:**

* Lead the development and enforcement of supplies and delivery procedures to ensure compliance, reduce risk, and enhance operational efficiency
* Manage and supervise the supply team by assigning tasks, monitoring performance, and ensuring the timely delivery of materials and services
* Set annual goals and objectives for the department; establish KPIs and monitor performance to achieve desired outcomes
* Build and maintain effective working relationships with user departments and key suppliers to support departmental objectives
* Oversee service level compliance for supply operations, identifying gaps and implementing corrective actions where needed
* Establish contractor performance evaluation systems for outsourced supply functions, ensuring adherence to service contracts and delivery KPIs
* Lead supply-focused projects including surplus material disposal, auction and system enhancements to support departmental objectives
* Recruit, develop, and motivate staff; conduct performance evaluations and provide necessary training and recognition
* Mentor and guide the team to foster a positive work environment and implement succession planning for business continuity

**Minimum Knowledge, Skills & Experience:**

* Bachelor's degree in business administration or a relevant field; CIPS certification preferred
* 8-10 years of Procurement and Supply experience, 3 years of which in a senior supervisory role
* Exceptional analytical skills with the ability to compile and interpret complex technical information, navigate abstract concepts, and adapt to non-standard or evolving situations when making decisions affecting specifications and proposals.
* Strong project and time management skills, with the ability to efficiently oversee multiple tasks and meet deadlines
* Excellent interpersonal, communication, negotiation, and conflict resolution skills
* Excellent writing skills with the ability to draft and edit a variety of written reports and communications and to articulate ideas clearly and concisely; Arabic proficiency is an advantage
* Proficiency in MS Office applications and ERP systems

data.search_title: "Mediclinic Middle East" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**الأهداف الوظيفية**
**:**
تقديم خدمات الإرشاد والدعم النفسي لطلبة المعهد بما يعزز صحتهم النفسية ويدعم حُسن حالهم ويسهم إيجاباً في تحسين أدائهم الأكاديمي وانخراطهم في الحياة الجامعية، وذلك من خلال خدمات إرشاد نفسي مباشرة، وبرامج وقائية وتوعوية، والتنسيق مع الجهات المختصة بالصحة النفسية داخل المعهد وفي دولة قطر.
  
  
**المسؤوليات الرئيسية**
**:**
الخدمات الإرشادية والعلاجية
  
  

* تقديم جلسات إرشاد نفسي فردية للطلاب وفق المعايير المهنية والأخلاقية التي تحكم عمل الإرشاد النفسي.
* التعامل مع الحالات الطارئة والأزمات النفسية وتقديم التدخل المناسب أو الإحالة عند الحاجة.
* تقييم الاحتياجات النفسية للطلاب ووضع خطط دعم مناسبة لهم.
* متابعة الحالات المحالة إلى جهات علاجية خارجية وضمان استمرارية تقديم الرعاية المناسبة لهم.

الإحالات والتنسيق
  
  

* بناء شبكة إحالة فعّالة مع المؤسسات المتخصصة في مجالات الصحة النفسية في دولة قطر.
* توجيه الطلاب إلى الخدمات المناسبة ومتابعة تقدمهم بالتنسيق مع الجهات المعنية.
* التعاون مع الكليات وأعضاء هيئة التدريس في معالجة الظواهر المرتبطة بالتعثر الأكاديمي ذات البعد النفسي.
* التنسيق مع إدارة الأمن والسلامة في وضع خطط التعامل مع الحالات النفسية الطارئة.

الدعم الأكاديمي والتكيّف الطلابي
  
  

* الإشراف على طلبات الإجازات أو وقف القيد لأسباب متعلقة بالصحة النفسية وإعداد الرأي في أهلية الطلاب للاستمرار في الدراسة.
* دعم طلبات التسهيلات الأكاديمية للحالات المتعلقة بالصحة النفسية بالتنسيق مع الكليات وقسم التسجيل.
* تصميم برامج دعم خاصة لمساعدة الطلاب على التكيف مع الضغط النفسي الناتج عن المتطلبات الأكاديمية أو غيرها من الضغوط التي تنشأ في البيئة الجامعية.

التوعية والوقاية
  
  

* إعداد وتنفيذ برامج وورش توعوية في مجالات الصحة النفسية وحسن الحال والتكيف الطلابي.
* تنظيم حملات تثقيفية وإنتاج مواد توعوية ورقية وإلكترونية.
* المساهمة في بناء بيئة جامعية داعمة للصحة النفسية.

السياسات والجودة المؤسسية
  
  

* إعداد التقارير الدورية وخطط العمل السنوية المتعلقة بخدمات الإرشاد النفسي.
* المساهمة في توفير البيانات والتقارير المطلوبة لأغراض الاعتماد وضمان الجودة المتعلقة بخدمات الطلاب في مجال الارشاد النفسي.
* اقتراح السياسات والأنظمة المرتبطة بالصحة النفسية وحسن الحال.
* تقييم فعالية البرامج والمبادرات الخاصة بالصحة النفسية بالتعاون مع إدارة الفعالية المؤسسية.
* المساهمة في إعداد المحتوى المتعلق بالصحة النفسية في المنشورات الجامعية الخاصة بشؤون الطلاب.

مهام أخرى
  
  

* القيام بأي مهام إضافية يكلف بها من قبل عمادة شؤون الطلاب ضمن نطاق الاختصاص.

**المؤهلات والخبرات والمهارات**
**:**
**المؤهل التعليمي:**
**درجة الماجستير على الأقل في علم النفس الإكلينيكي، أو الإرشاد النفسي، أو الخدمة الاجتماعية الإكلينيكية، أو مجال ذي صلة.**
**الخبرات**
**:**

* خبرة لا تقل عن سنتين في مجال الإرشاد أو الدعم النفسي، ويفضل أن تكون في مؤسسات تعليمية أو جامعية.
* تُعطى الأولوية للمرشحين الحاصلين على تراخيص مهنية سارية أو اعتماد من هيئات دولية معترف بها في مجال الصحة النفسية.

**المهارات**
**:**

* مهارات تواصل عالية والقدرة على بناء علاقة مهنية داعمة مع الطلاب.
* القدرة على التعامل مع الحالات الحساسة واتخاذ قرارات مهنية تضمن سلامة الطالب والمؤسسة.
* فهم عميق لخصوصية العمل مع فئة الشباب الجامعي.
* معرفة بالخدمات المتعلقة بالصحة النفسية المتاحة في دولة قطر.
* الاطلاع على القوانين واللوائح المنظمة للعمل في مجالات الصحة النفسية.
* القدرة على العمل ضمن فريق والتنسيق مع جهات متعددة داخل وخارج المعهد.
* مهارات تنظيمية وإدارية جيدة في إعداد التقارير وإدارة الحالات.

* Register all cash receipts and pa
data.search_title: "Mediclinic Middle East" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
This position is responsible for the integrity of the student fee revenue cash collection process relevant to tuition fees and/or any other activities at the school with cash handling involved, such as school trips, admission procedures.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Register all cash receipts and payment transactions by using the prescribed format and transfer them to the prescribed cash statement.
* Check the book balance and tally it with the physical cash.
* Prepare cash statement daily and tally it with the physical cash.
* Maintain receipt documents, bills, statements and other documents since they are deemed to be in his custody.
* Write, and fill in the receipt and cash vouchers completely and systematically including date and sequence number.
* Deposit the surplus money into the bank and maintain the supporting deposit papers.
* Shall not pay any money either instalments or bills settlement unless they are approved.
* In case any cash or receipt voucher is cancelled the original copy as well as other copies should be kept and their numbers be entered in proper sequence in the cash statement, but they should be mentioned in the appropriate box as cancelled.
* Assist in the bank statement reconciliation process.
* Invoice segregation per class per room for PUE Schools, place them in envelopes and deliver them to school secretaries.
* Receive payments and issue receipts.
* Follow up outstanding amounts and prepare statements for PUE Schools.
* Deposit cash and checks in bank and reconcile credit card usage on daily basis.
* Enter all receipts issued on ERP on daily basis.
* Update the excel file receivables with details of receipts on daily basis.
* Other reasonable tasks as assigned by supervisor

data.search_title: "Mediclinic Middle East" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary:**

Role holders at this level will head production plants comprised of various levels of team and shift leadership directing the activities of operational staff charged with monitoring and controlling production plants. The key contribution is to ensure operational targets are met through the optimization of production processes and cost-effective operations and that team members have the tools to realize potential and make significant contributions.

The role is heavily oriented towards operational problem solving through the application of analytical and innovative problem solving. Safety, Quality and Environment are paramount concern, and the role holder has a major role in responding to, and act as incident commander in case of emergency situations.

To prepare short- and long-term strategic plan for the section in accordance with department strategic plan.

**Key Accountabilities:**

* Plan, lead and manage Operations teams to ensure operational targets are met through the optimization of processes and cost-effective operations and that staff are motivated to realize potential and make significant contributions.
* Keep superior informed on operating conditions to enable monitoring of production progress and for the co-ordination of overall production activities.
* Develop and gain approval for production and expenditure budgets, ensuring adequate provision has been made for the planned activities. Continually monitor progress and priorities and make necessary adjustments to ensure effective cost control.
* Develops and gains agreement to organization structures, manning levels and resources needed for the achievement of production targets.
* Manage all short- and medium-term plant operational and planning activities, including close co-ordination with the maintenance function to ensure equipment and systems are in optimum operating condition and that downtime is kept to a minimum.
* Reviews and approves recommendations for the development of new or enhanced plant-specific procedures and processes that will deliver improved effectiveness and efficiency of production operations.
* Establishes and maintains effective working relationships with process and equipment suppliers/licenser to ensure QAFCO is kept informed of latest developments.
* Act as source of technical expertise in diagnosing and troubleshooting complex problems to obtain desired result and develop operators’ capabilities.
* Develops trains and appraises all plant staff in order that they maximize their contribution and fulfil personal development needs.
* Assume the role of incident commander during emergencies to assess and contain situation until normal operations can be resumed. Participate in subsequent incident investigations to determine causes and recommend remedial action.

**Desired Candidate Profile:**

* Bachelor’s degree in chemical engineering or relevant discipline.
* Minimum of 10 years’ relevant experience, with at least 5 years in management of production within the Fertilizer, Petrochemicals or Oil & Gas Industry.

data.jd_text:
The Business Planning Officer /Specialist reports to the Strategy and Business Planning Manager. He/she plays a pivotal role in developing, overseeing, and refining MCQ‘s annual business planning process. Ensures that business plans are aligned with the overall strategic goals of the company. Monitors business plan implementation, facilitates strategic initiatives, and provides data-driven insights that enable informed decision-making at the management level.

**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES:**

**Business Planning & Modelling**

* Develop and oversee annual business plans and ensure alignment with organizational goals.
* Facilitate internal discussions to align departmental goals with the broader company vision and strategy and review and harmonize business plans.
* Coordinate with the Strategy & Data Analyst development and delivery of data-driven insights and recommendations that support decision-making throughout the planning and execution process.
* Identify potential risks to business plans and collaborate with Department Directors to develop and implement risk mitigation strategies to safeguard the achievement of business objectives
* Liaise with PMO on project progress, and evaluate and reflect changes in business plan when needed.
* Assist on financial forecasts and budgets based on market analysis and business goals.
* Contribute to monitoring financial performance against budgets.
* Create and maintain business models to support strategic planning and decision-making.
* Evaluate business initiatives and investments for alignment with long-term objectives.
* Recommend and implement process improvements to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.
* Stay abreast of industry trends and best practices in business planning and strategic management.

**Strategic initiative and project management**

* Support with overseeing and coordination of all ongoing/planned MCQ projects assigned to the strategy team
* Develop project scopes, objectives, and schedules for corresponding initiatives and projects
* Assign project tasks and milestones
* Identify project risks and implement appropriate mitigation strategies

**Stakeholder Engagement & Risk Mitigation**

* Collaborate with internal stakeholders to gather input and ensure alignment of business plans.
* Present strategic plans and business cases to senior management and key stakeholders.
* Identify potential risks and uncertainties that may impact business plans.
* Develop risk mitigation strategies and contingency plans to ensure business continuity

**Policies, Systems, Processes & Procedures**

* Follow all relevant departmental policies, processes, standard operating procedures, and instructions so that work is carried out in a controlled and consistent manner.

**Continuous Improvement**

* Contribute to the identification of opportunities for continuous improvement and sustainability of systems and processes, considering global standards, productivity improvement and cost reduction.

**Continuous Improvement**

* Contribute to the identification of opportunities for continuous improvement and sustainability of systems and processes, considering global standards, productivity improvement and cost reduction.

**QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCE, & SKILLS:**

**Minimum Qualifications:**

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Statistics, or a similar discipline from a reputable university. Master’s degree or MBA is a plus.

**Minimum Experience:**

* Minimum of 3 years of strong experience in business planning, strategy development, or project management within a corporate environment
* Proven experience working with senior leadership and cross-functional teams to drive strategic initiatives and business planning processes

**Required Competencies**

**Functional Competencies**

* Excellent understanding of strategic planning and business modeling.
* Proficient in business planning and project management software, as well as Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)
* Strong ability to analyze business data and trends, and translate them into actionable insights and strategic recommendations
* Advanced skills in financial analysis and budgeting
* Strong business acumen and industry-specific knowledge
* Effective project management skills
* Strong presentation skills and ability to tailor communication to different audiences

**Behavioural Competencies**

* Strong ability to think strategically and align day-to-day activities with long-term business goals
* Good critical thinking and strong attention to detail and accuracy
* Ability to work across teams and departments, fostering collaboration and aligning business functions with strategic goals
* Strong organizational skills
* Good ability to identify, summarize, and communicate key insights and messages
* Proactive, flexible, adaptable and able to work under pressure

If you believe that you have the skills and competencies required for the role and wish to advance your application one step forward, please take the AI interview which is the first step of our interview process. Once ready, copy and paste the following link to start the interview.

https://mediacityqatar.intervu.ai/public/o2e6b

data.title: Commercial Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Overview:**

As the Commercial Manager, you will lead the economic evaluation, commercial structuring, and value optimisation of UCC Holding's upstream oil and gas portfolio. You will provide critical economic, fiscal, and commercial insights that inform and guide investment decisions across
data.search_title: "Mediclinic Middle East" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Role Overview:**

As the Commercial Manager, you will lead the economic evaluation, commercial structuring, and value optimisation of UCC Holding's upstream oil and gas portfolio. You will provide critical economic, fiscal, and commercial insights that inform and guide investment decisions across exploration, development, M&A, and portfolio management.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead economic assessments for exploration, development, and producing assets, building and maintaining economic models such as NPV, IRR, breakeven, and cash flow.
* Conduct scenario, risk, and uncertainty analysis to support key internal investment milestones.
* Align economic assumptions with corporate price decks and capital allocation frameworks.
* Evaluate fiscal regimes, PSCs, royalties, tax structures, and identify fiscal optimisation opportunities.
* Support negotiations with governments, regulators, and partners on fiscal terms.
* Benchmark global fiscal regimes and assess competitiveness.
* Provide support for portfolio screening, ranking, and capital prioritisation.
* Identify portfolio optimisation opportunities such as divestments, farm-ins/-outs, and acquisitions.
* Provide commercial insights for long-term planning and strategy.
* Lead the commercial structuring of joint ventures, farm-in/farm-out deals, and strategic partnerships.
* Assess risk allocation and design commercial frameworks for developments and asset transactions.
* Contribute to partner negotiations, joint operating agreements (JOAs), and contract drafting.
* Ensure commercial agreements deliver value and maintain compliance.
* Track global upstream trends, M&A activity, pricing, cost drivers, and competitor strategies.
* Provide strategic insights on emerging risks, opportunities, and market conditions.
* Support the evaluation of new acreage, exploration opportunities, and potential acquisitions.
* Advise senior leadership on economic and commercial matters for key investment decisions.
* Lead and mentor a team of analysts.
* Collaborate with subsurface, development, finance, and business development teams.
* Present investment cases, portfolio recommendations, and commercial strategies to executives and boards.

**Qualifications & Experience:**

* Degree in Economics, Finance, Petroleum Engineering, Geoscience, or related field.
* 10+ years of experience in upstream commercial, economics, or strategy roles, with expertise in exploration, development, and producing assets.
* Proven expertise in upstream commercial structures and supporting investment committees and major project sanctions.

**Technical Skills:**

* Advanced economic modelling, valuation, and project development economics.
* Portfolio optimisation and investment screening expertise.
* Strong capabilities in risk and uncertainty analysis.
* Strong commercial negotiation skills.
* Advanced Excel modelling and use of industry datasets (e.g., Wood Mackenzie).

data.jd_text:
**Position Snapshot**

* Position Title: Government Relation Officer
* Location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
* Department: HR
* Reports To: Government Relation Manager
* Employment Type: Full-Time

**Position Summary**
Nestlé Waters is the global leader in bottled water, proudly producing Al Manhal and Nestlé Pure Life in Saudi Arabia.
  
  
As part of our commercial expansion, we are seeking a Government Relations Officer who will be responsible for managing and coordinating all government-related transactions and official documentation for the company, ensuring full compliance with local labor laws, regulatory requirements, and company policies. The role supports smooth business operations by handling government portals, employee official records, permits, and regulatory approvals in a timely and accurate manner.
  
  
**A DAY IN THE LIFE …**

* Handle all government-related transactions through relevant portals and authorities such as Qiwa, Muqeem, GOSI, Mudad, Chamber of Commerce, and other official platforms.
* Process and renew employee-related official documents including Iqamas, work permits, visas, medical insurance, and other government requirements.
* Coordinate with internal stakeholders to ensure timely completion of regulatory and legal documentation.
* Maintain accurate records of employees’ legal and official documents and monitor expiration dates.
* Ensure compliance with Saudi labor law, Saudization requirements, and company regulations.
* Liaise with government entities and external service providers for approvals, attestations, and official submissions.
* Support onboarding and offboarding processes from a government relations perspective.
* Prepare periodic reports related to government transactions, compliance status, and document validity.
* Resolve issues related to employee documentation, residency status, and official registrations.
* Stay updated on changes in governmental regulations and communicate relevant updates internally.
* Uphold Nestlé’s standards of quality, safety, and ethical business practices in all field operations.

**What Will Make You Successful…**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Human Resources, Public Administration, or related field.
* Minimum of 2 years of experience in Government Relations or a similar role.
* Strong knowledge of Saudi government portals and labor-related regulations.

**What We Offer At Nestlé**
When you join Nestlé Waters, you become part of a team committed to excellence, integrity, and customer trust.
  
  
We value performance, collaboration, and continuous improvement empowering our people to deliver results that make a difference.
  
  
**We Offer**

* Exciting opportunities to develop your career your way
* A culture of respect, with diversity, equity and inclusion at its core
* A dynamic international environment empowering you to learn, develop and grow
* The opportunity to represent globally trusted brands with local impact.

At Nestlé, we want to help shape a better and healthier world, inspire people to live healthier lives and deliver impact at a scale and pace that makes a difference. We do this by fostering a diverse, friendly, supportive, and collaborative environment, that creates positive disruption, embraces innovation, and empowers people and teams to win. We aim to hire friendly, respectful, inspiring people who care about the people’s lives that we touch every single day.
  
  
Be a force for good. Join Nestlé and visit us on www.nestle.com.

**EVAI Sr. Business Development Managers**
are always hungry for more.
  
  
They are always curious, innovative & creative, looking for opportunities to develop & stretch profitability with limited resources. They are savvy relationship builders, with a keen business acumen. They are able to adapt their style to suit the situation -- sometimes they are hard negotiators, other times they are working in parallel with their external counterparts to achieve winning solutions for EVI. They are excellent strategist, able pick & focus on their must-win battles. At the same time, they are ready to roll up their sleeves & get their hands dirty to ensure they exceed targets set. By the way, did we mention that our BDMs are generally over-achievers?
  
  
With great power comes great responsibilities. Are you ready to push yourself to BREAKTHROUGH?
  
  
The role of the Sr. Business Development Manager is to manage distributors of the allocated market(s).
  
  
He/she is a key contributor to the topline and bottom-line growth of the zone and the CBU
  
  
He/she is responsible for building the joint business plan with the Distributor & pilot the excellence in execution. They are also responsible to work hand in hand with the distributor through to the customer level to maximize our business

BDM’s from other FMCG companies

►Result oriented pragmatic, flexible, business quick understanding
  
  
►Strong Organization skills be able to prepare, present and follow-up Business plan with the partner

English and Arabic fluent. Other languages are welcome
  
  
**About Us**
Evian Volvic Alpro International (EVAI) is the international business unit behind the worldwide success of evian, Volvic, and Alpro, bringing premium healthy hydration and plant-based nutrition to more than 90 markets across the globe. Operating in 13 locations and powered by a culturally diverse team of more than 30 nationalities, EVAI offers an international playground.
  
  
We are creating, nurturing and scaling up business geographies leveraging a large distributor network, powered by a sales & marketing force that activates locally, with a high level of autonomy, excellence in execution and entrepreneurial thinking.
  
  
As part of Danone, we combine the agility of a lean organisation with the scale and purpose of a global group - offering broad opportunities for growth, leadership exposure, and meaningful impact supported by functional teams acting as strong business partners.
  
  
Join EVAI and shape the future of iconic brands in a business where your voice matters, your potential is nurtured, and your impact is real.

data.jd_text:
We are IMETA
  
  
ROPU IMETA is a Regional Operating Unit consisting of 6 mid-sized Operating Units: India, Turkey, Southern Africa (South Africa & Sub Sahara Africa) Northeast & West Africa, Near East & UAE, Saudi Arabia, Gulf & East Africa (SAGEA).
  
  
IMETA is home to more than 47 nationalities. We are a myriad of color and culture and embracing this diversity is one of our greatest opportunities.
  
  
We are a powerhouse of talent, and we work together to ensure that we grow, nurture, and retain our talent. Uniting and working together is the key to our success.
  
  
**The Position:**
We are hiring the Head of Finance & Administration for the Saudi Arabia, Gulf and East Africa (SAGEA) Operating Unit. The role provides strategic leadership, strong governance, and operational excellence across Finance & Controlling, Purchasing, IS, Supply Chain Management, and EHS, operating within both direct and matrix leadership structures.
  
  
This role requires a senior leader who combines strategic finance expertise, and a proven ability to lead leaders and influence decision-making in a complex, regulated environment.
  
  
The position is based in Riyadh, KSA, reporting directly to the General Manager SAGEA, with matrix reporting to the Head of Finance & Administration IMETA.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Provide the leadership team with financial insight and strategic guidance to support informed decision-making.
* Drive sustainable growth and profitability by influencing, supporting, and constructively challenging business leaders.
* Lead financial planning, controlling, forecasting, and performance management activities for the operating unit.
* Oversee Finance operations, including Accounting, Taxation, Treasury, and statutory reporting.
* Safeguard the financial stability of the legal entities through cash flow management, balance sheet oversight, funding governance, and compliance.
* Drive effective sourcing, procurement, and vendor management to deliver measurable value.
* Ensure local implementation of global IS programs and projects in partnership with regional and corporate teams.
* Partner with Supply Chain and regional operations to manage Demand Planning and Logistics, and oversee local responsibilities for Product Quality, Infrastructure, and EHS.
* Lead, develop, and engage a multi-disciplinary team, driving performance, talent development, and succession planning.
* Ensure full compliance with corporate standards, internal controls, and local regulatory requirements.

**Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree required; MBA, Master’s degree is an advantage.
* 8+ years’ experience in Finance & Controlling, with exposure to Purchasing, IS, or Supply Chain in a multinational organization, preferably within KSA.
* Experience working in corporate, regional, or global matrix environments.
* 4+ years of people leadership experience, preferably leading managers.

**Skills & Competencies**

* Strong enterprise leadership capability with cultural awareness and integrity.
* Proven ability to collaborate cross-functionally and influence without authority.
* Strong business acumen with the ability to engage confidently with senior business leaders.
* Solid project and change management skills.
* Analytical, results-oriented, and able to think critically and conceptually.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills, including simplifying complex financial topics.
* Team-oriented, and able to integrate diverse perspectives to build high-performing teams.

**What happens Next?**
We are looking forward to receiving your application! We will then have a look at your CV. If we see a match, we will invite you for a screening interview.
  
  
**SPL Screening:**
In order to comply with applicable export control laws, Boehringer Ingelheim periodically screens business relations (including job applicants) against sanctioned party lists (“SPL”). These checks may be performed by Boehringer Ingelheim or by any of its Affiliates. You acknowledge that Boehringer Ingelheim and/or its Affiliates will screen you against SPL and that for this purpose your personal data may be processed in relevant databases, including databases of third-party vendors that perform SPL screening for or on behalf of Boehringer Ingelheim or its Affiliates which may be located or accessible outside the EU. Boehringer Ingelheim is committed to ensuring an adequate level of protection of your personal data.
  
  
Our Company
  
  
**Why Boehringer Ingelheim?**
With us, you can develop your own path in a company with a culture that knows our differences are our strengths - and break new ground in the drive to make millions of lives better.
  
  
Here, your development is our priority. Supporting you to build a career as part of a workplace that is independent, authentic and bold, while tackling challenging work in a respectful and friendly environment where everyone is valued and welcomed.
  
  
Alongside, you have access to programs and groups that ensure your health and wellbeing are looked after - as we make major investments to drive global accessibility to healthcare. By being part of a team that is constantly innovating, you'll be helping to transform lives for generations.
  
  
Want to learn more? Visit https://www.boehringer-ingelheim.com

data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**

The Application Developer builds and maintains internal tools, automation solutions, and AI-powered applications to enhance operational efficiency across the Bank.

He/She develops scalable, secure, and user-centric applications using open-source technologies and modern development practices. The Application Developer reduces reliance on vendor systems by delivering internal solutions aligned with the Bank’s technology standards and governance frameworks.

**Key Accountabilities:**

* Develops internal web applications, utilities, and automation tools using open-source frameworks and modern programming languages.
* Designs and implements AI-powered solutions, including document processors, chatbots, data extractors, and workflow automation tools.
* Integrates developed applications with the Bank’s ecosystem, including M365, ServiceDesk platforms, and core banking systems where applicable.
* Applies DevSecOps practices and adheres to internal development policies and governance standards.
* Collaborates with business units to gather requirements and identify automation and digitalization opportunities.
* Translates business requirements into technical designs, scalable solutions, and working applications.
* Maintains source code repositories, version control practices, and deployment pipelines.
* Develops and maintains technical documentation, user guides, and solution architectures.
* Supports testing activities, including unit testing, UAT, and production deployments.
* Monitors application performance and resolves defects, bugs, and performance issues.
* Stays updated with emerging technologies, AI capabilities, and development best practices and applies relevant innovations.

**Qualifications and Experience:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or Software Engineering will be given first preference. Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology will be considered if no candidates from the first category meet the criteria.
* Strong foundation in at least one programming language, preferably Python or JavaScript/TypeScript.
* Good understanding of web development fundamentals, including HTML, CSS, REST APIs, and databases.
* Demonstrated interest in AI and machine learning through projects, coursework, or certifications.
* Basic knowledge of version control systems such as Git.
* Good communication skills in English and Arabic.

**\*\* Candidates meeting the criteria will be contacted.**

**\*\* Candidates residing in Muscat will be given first priority.**

**\*\* Applications will be accepted until 22-April-2026 at 2:00 P.M. Submissions received after this date and time will not be considered \*\***

**🚀 Welcome to Your Next Adventure!**
We are looking for an

who will ensure seamless transition of new partners onto our platform. This role is critical in ensuring that every brand "Go-Live" is executed with precision—guaranteeing that merchant offerings are perfectly structured, visually accurate, and fully optimized across both Arabic & English interfaces. You will be the final gatekeeper of quality, identifying potential hurdles proactively to ensure a flawless first impression for our customers
  
  
**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**

* Own the end-to-end activation process, ensuring merchants are set "Live" only when all platform requirements and quality benchmarks are met.
* Perform rigorous quality checks on merchant listings, ensuring covers, tags, and product descriptions are accurate, high-resolution, and culturally relevant for our audience.
* Ensure that every listing meets our platform's aesthetic and informational guidelines to maintain a premium user experience.
* Proactively flag potential blockers to the Account Management teams to prevent delays.
* Maintain and execute a high-standard onboarding checklist, ensuring no brand launches with missing data or broken user flows

**🧙‍♂️ The Magic You Bring**

* .Ability to work on a custom schedule with flexible weekend days off.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* effectively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
* Proactive problem-solving skills with a focus on process improvements.
* Attention to detail and ability to think strategically.

**✨ Bonus Points If You Have**

* Native Arabic language required, fluency in local dialect is a plus.
* Bachelor’s degree in Translation, Linguistics, Marketing or equivalent experience.
* 2-5 years of experience in onboarding, translation, or e-commerce.
* Demonstrated experience in using analytics tools and content management platforms.

To be the first Qatari Ultra App that propels the region and its community through innovation and technology. We have global ambitions where what we do surpasses norms and limitations every time.

To radically transform how people live by leveraging technology to connect them with endless possibilities.
  
  
**Our Everyday Superpowers**

: “Focus on the customer and all else will follow.”
  
  
**💪 Act with Integrity:**
“We are honest, ethical, and trustworthy in everything we do.”

: “You can do more by doing less, better, and faster.”

Take Ownership of a Long-Life Underground Operation

This is a rare opportunity to elevate maintenance standards on a multi-year underground copper project and protect high-value mining assets worth millions. You will shape reliability performance across a 40-strong team with full operational visibility.

Package & Benefits

* Tax-free income
* Strong base + performance-linked bonus potential
* Housing allowance
* Flight allowance
* Family relocation support

Why This Business

A globally respected underground engineering specialist with over 40 years of operation across the GCC. * Drive preventive and reliability-centred maintenance strategy to achieve 90%+ equipment availability

Who This Suits

**Company Description**

Integrated Systems LLC, established in 1996 in the Sultanate of Oman, is a locally owned, multi-division company specializing in IT solutions. The organization is led by a professional team dedicated to meeting the technical and IT infrastructure needs of government, industrial, and commercial sectors in Oman. Renowned for delivering turn-key solutions, Integrated Systems LLC focuses on areas such as Data Centers, Networking, and Data Security. The company has strategic partnerships with industry leaders like Dell Technologies, VMware, Acronis, and VEEAM, ensuring access to cutting-edge technologies and services.

**Role Description**

This is a full-time, on-site role for an Information Technology Project Coordinator based in Muscat. The Project Coordinator will oversee and manage IT projects from initiation to completion, ensuring timelines are met and deliverables are achieved. Responsibilities include coordinating between teams, allocating resources, tracking progress, troubleshooting project challenges, and communicating updates to stakeholders. The role also involves maintaining project documentation and ensuring that all compliance and technical standards are adhered to.

**Qualifications**

* Strong Project Coordination and Project Management skills to ensure seamless execution and delivery of IT projects
* Solid foundation in Information Technology, with knowledge of IT infrastructure, Data Centers, Networking, and Data Security
* Highly developed Analytical Skills to solve problems and analyze project performance
* Effective Communication skills to manage stakeholders, provide updates, and facilitate team collaboration
* Prior experience in coordinating IT projects or similar roles is advantageous
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Systems Management, or related field
* Familiarity with software tools for project management and collaboration and Microsoft Project
* Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment

**About Gradiant**
