data.jd_text:
At the world market leader in energy technology, you will contribute to keeping the energy supply stable in the future. With our intelligent digital and analogue solutions, you will help shape the implementation of the energy transition. In a global team of 5.000 committed colleagues, which is characterized by the unique cohesion of our family-run group of companies. Reinhausen - where Power meets Passion.
  
  
**What Awaits You**

* You translate business goals into a coherent Hub People Strategy along the entire HR value chain
* You take full responsibility for day-to-day HR operations in your local entity, including hire-to-retire processes and labor relations
* You act as a strategic HR business partner for top management within the MEIA region as well as sparring partner for managers and employees in your local entity
* You lead and develop local HR teams within your hub and drive HR synergies with a strong focus on operational excellence
* You ensure high-quality HR data, derive insights and support data-based decision-making across the hub
* You represent your hub in global HR initiatives and implement global HR standards, policies and projects locally

**What You Bring To The Table**

* You hold a university degree in Human Resources, Business Administration or a comparable field with an HR focus
* You bring deep operational HR experience and socializazion in the MEIA region as well as profound knowledge of local labor laws
* You have a strong hands-on mindset and proven experience in managing day-to-day HR operations, including hire-to-retire processes and employee relations
* You have senior-level HR generalist experience in an international, matrix-driven organization
* You have proven leadership experience and are confident in consulting and coaching senior business leaders
* You combine strategic thinking with a solution-oriented mindset and strong implementation capability
* You communicate fluently in English and act with integrity, professionalism and confidentiality

**Our Benefits**
**Hover over our benefit icons and learn more about your benefits with us!**
**Annual Bonus & Service Rewards**
We recognize employee dedication through an annual performance bonus and end-of-service benefits in line with UAE labor laws—rewarding both your achievements and long-term commitment.
  
  
**Comprehensive Health, Safety and Wellness Coverage**
We care for your physical and mental well-being through international health insurance (including dental & optical), travel and workmen insurance, fitness programs, and psychological support—from your first day to retirement.
  
  
**Empowered Culture & Global Collaboration**
We offer flexible working models, sabbaticals and a strong focus on work-life balance. Our culture thrives on community, learning and sustainability. Networking events, mentoring and a digital learning platform. Employees experience a working environment that encourages international collaboration and professional development.
  
  
**Family Support**
We care about your family as much as you do. Our benefits include annual flight tickets to your home country, school tuition fee support for your children, and a dependant package covering UAE residency, health insurance, and family travel—all designed to support your family’s well-being and stability.
  
  
**Housing And Transportation Benefits**
We offer a housing allowance to support comfortable living, along with flexible mobility options including a company car or transportation allowance, covering fuel, tolls, parking, and a Careem corporate account for local travel.

Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.

**About The Role**
As a Key Account Manager, you will be responsible for managing and growing strategic partnerships with top restaurant brands in Dubai. Your role will focus on driving order growth, optimizing operational performance, and maximizing partner engagement through data-driven insights and tailored marketing strategies. You will collaborate cross-functionally to enhance the partner experience, negotiate commercial agreements, and implement initiatives that drive revenue and profitability. Success in this role requires strong relationship management, analytical skills, and a results-driven mindset.
  
  
**What You'll Do**

* Account Management – Take full ownership of assigned accounts, acting as the primary point of contact for partners.
* Growth & Strategy – Develop and execute business growth plans, leveraging advertising, promotions, and strategic initiatives to increase partner performance.
* Partner Experience & Satisfaction – Use data-driven decision-making to analyze performance, drive operational excellence, and enhance the overall merchant and user experience. Work closely with merchants and internal teams to identify and address pain points, improving satisfaction and retention.
* Cross-functional Collaboration – Partner with internal teams including Supply, Finance, Marketing, and Business Development to align on growth objectives and ensure seamless execution

**What You'll Need**

* 3-4+ years of experience in account management, sales, or partnerships, preferably in food tech, food delivery, or FMCG sectors
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to interpret complex data
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with a client-first mindset
* Proven experience managing senior stakeholders and driving commercial outcomes
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced, high-growth environment
* Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field

data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**This is Adyen**
Adyen provides payments, data, and financial products in a single solution for customers like Careem, Noon, Al Shaya and Ziina - making us the financial technology platform of choice. At Adyen, everything we do is engineered for ambition.
  
  
For our teams, we create an environment with opportunities for our people to succeed, backed by the culture and support to ensure they are enabled to truly own their careers. We are motivated individuals who tackle unique technical challenges at scale and solve them as a team. Together, we deliver innovative and ethical solutions that help businesses achieve their ambitions faster.
  
  
**Why you should join the Adyen Account Management team**
At Adyen, the Account Management team is critical to the growth and success of our business, as well as expanding the Adyen brand across the globe. Being part of our Account Management team, you?ll manage relationships with innovative international merchants, covering multiple industries and channels. You?ll have the opportunity to work on cross-functional initiatives and projects in a fast-paced, highly entrepreneurial environment with high autonomy. You?ll become an expert in the global payments landscape and level up your skills through our AM Academy.
  
  
We are looking for a proactive and adaptable Account Manager to join our team in Dubai. The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker with a hands-on mentality; someone who is eager to help the region?s biggest brands grow while changing an industry. You are excited to work with a global, multicultural team in a collaborative manner and help your team succeed. Your focus will be on delivering an outstanding customer experience, finding and closing new opportunities, and driving mutual success for Adyen and our customers.
  
  
**Account Manager, Enterprise**
As an Account Manager, you will be responsible for developing strong relationships by earning trust with our customers, and providing impactful payments insights to help them grow. Our Account Managers are empowered to own the customer relationship and provide best-in-class service to our customers. In this role, you?ll contribute to our ongoing momentum by understanding the unique customer need and identifying commercial opportunities, including expansion opportunities and the addition of value adding products. Self-motivated and resourceful, you?ll bring a strategic mindset and commercial approach to the role.
  
  
**What You?ll Do**

* Relationship management- Build strong customer relationships and navigate their organizations to align the right external and internal stakeholders. Develop a global network of people within Adyen and work collaboratively across cultures and time zones
* Commercial acumen- Drive commercial discussions with customers, while meeting strategic and financial targets for assigned accounts
* Strategic consultation- Act as the human dimension of Adyen?s product, delivering expertise, education, and payment guidance to customers. Position Adyen as a trusted partner and use data to tell compelling stories
* Project management- Prioritize and execute on short and long term projects with varying timelines across multiple accounts
* Feedback- Be the voice and champion for your customer internally and serve as a feedback loop

**Who You Are**

* We are looking for an experienced candidate with minimum 5 years experience in an account management / partner management role or complex enterprise software, technical infrastructure or financial services (specifically payments) role
* Enjoy engaging others and developing strong working relationships at all levels of management
* Passionate about leading strategic payments conversations, presenting business reviews, and coordinating high level technical discussions
* Skilled in leveraging your business acumen and analytical abilities to strategically assess and help reach client goals
* Comfortable synthesizing complex data sets and using data to tell a story
* Excited to prioritize and manage multiple projects across different departments, while motivating and collaborating with others to achieve results

**Additional Skills**

* This role is based out of our Dubai office. We have a hybrid workplace and value in-person collaboration; we do not offer remote-only roles.
* Some domestic and international travel required

**Our Diversity, Equity and Inclusion commitments**
Our unique approach is a product of our diverse perspectives. This diversity of backgrounds and cultures is essential in helping us maintain our momentum. Our business and technical challenges are unique, and we need as many different voices as possible to join us in solving them - voices like yours. No matter who you are or where you?re from, we welcome you to be your true self at Adyen.
  
  
Studies show that women and members of underrepresented communities apply for jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Does this sound like you? If so, Adyen encourages you to reconsider and apply. We look forward to your application!
  
  
**What?s next?**
Ensuring a smooth and enjoyable candidate experience is critical for us. We aim to get back to you regarding your application within 5 business days. Our interview process tends to take about 4 weeks to complete, but may fluctuate depending on the role. Learn more about our hiring process here. Don?t be afraid to let us know if you need more flexibility.
  
  
This role is based out of our Dubai office. We are an office-first company and value in-person collaboration; we do not offer remote-only roles.
  
  
**Ready to meet us?**
If you are excited about this role, apply by clicking the link below. We can?t wait to meet you!
  
  
Job Details
  
  
Role Level: Mid-Level Work Type: Full-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Dubai Company Website: https://www.adyen.com Job Function: Information Technology (IT) Company Industry/
  
  
Sector: Financial Services
  
  
What We Offer
  
  
**About The Company**
Searching, interviewing and hiring are all part of the professional life. The TALENTMATE Portal idea is to fill and help professionals doing one of them by bringing together the requisites under One Roof. Whether you're hunting for your Next Job Opportunity or Looking for Potential Employers, we're here to lend you a Helping Hand.
  
  
Report
  
  
Disclaimer: talentmate.com is only a platform to bring jobseekers & employers together. Applicants are advised to research the bonafides of the prospective employer independently. We do NOT endorse any requests for money payments and strictly advice against sharing personal or bank related information. We also recommend you visit Security Advice for more information. If you suspect any fraud or malpractice, email us at abuse@talentmate.com.

data.jd_text:
**About the Role**

We are seeking an exceptional Logistics & Ordering Manager to join our team. This position will oversee the complete process of vehicle ordering, customisation, and delivery. The ideal candidate is detail‑oriented, proactive, and experienced in managing supplier relationships, coordinating logistics, and ensuring timely fulfilment of customer orders.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Manage the Sales ordering process for vehicles from manufacturers and suppliers
* Coordinate product customisation requests to meet customer specifications
* Oversee logistics operations, including shipping, inventory management, and delivery scheduling
* Maintain strong communication with suppliers, shipping partners, and internal teams
* Monitor order status and proactively resolve delays or issues
* Ensure compliance with import/export regulations and dealership standards
* Prepare reports on ordering trends, logistics performance, and inventory levels

**Qualification**

* Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related field
* Proven experience in logistics, ordering, or supply chain management (automotive industry is a must)
* Strong organisational and problem-solving skills
* Excellent communication and negotiation abilities
* Familiarity with international trade regulations and automotive customisation processes
* Proficiency in ERP or inventory management systems is a plus

**What We Offer**

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Opportunity to work with leading Japanese and Chinese automotive brands
* A collaborative and growth-oriented work environment

data.jd_text:
General Information
  
  
**Ref #**
232953
  
  
**Location:**
Qatar-Doha
  
  
**Job family:**
Corporate & Commercial
  
  
**Closing Date:**
2026-04-25
  
  
**Description**
Support Employee Experience and internal stakeholders by creating high‑quality, creative, and engaging written and visual communication outputs that bring the company’s people initiatives to life. The role is responsible for developing compelling copy, contributing creative concepts, and delivering basic graphic design outcomes using approved templates to support internal communications, marketing campaigns, and employer branding initiatives. The position requires exceptional English writing capability, strong creative thinking, and the ability to translate ideas, insights, and concepts into clear, on‑brand content tailored to different employee personas, while ensuring consistency with brand tone of voice and communication guidelines.
  
  
**Your Duties Would Include**

* Develop creative, engaging, and accurate written content for internal communications, marketing campaigns, employee engagement initiatives, and employer branding activities.
* Contribute to creative ideation by developing communication concepts, campaign themes, messaging frameworks, and storytelling approaches in collaboration with stakeholders and agencies.
* Write, edit, and proofread a wide range of content formats including creative copy, campaign messaging, scripts, press releases, newsletters, internal announcements, reports, and long‑form editorial content.
* Manage and execute internal marketing and communication campaigns end‑to‑end, from concept development and content creation to rollout and post‑campaign review.
* Coordinate the distribution of communications and marketing campaigns across all relevant internal and external channels, ensuring consistency, accuracy, and timely delivery.
* Support campaign execution by working with internal teams and external agencies, including briefing, reviewing and finalising storyboards, proofreading scripts, and aligning messaging across channels.
* Initiate and manage internal communications activities, including drafting content, managing approval workflows, publishing across internal platforms, and ensuring full coverage of available channels and resources.
* Adapt messaging for different employee personas, demonstrating empathy, cultural awareness, and a clear understanding of audience needs and communication objectives.
* Analyse data, insights, and campaign performance metrics to measure effectiveness and ROI, identifying opportunities to optimise and improve future campaigns.
* Support basic graphic design execution by populating approved templates (presentations, posters, banners, internal assets, digital visuals) in line with brand guidelines.
* Collaborate closely with marketing, HR, Employee Experience teams, designers, and agencies to ensure quality, alignment, and timely delivery of outputs.
* Ensure all written and visual materials comply with corporate branding, EVP, tone of voice, and communication standards.
* Basic graphic design skills with working knowledge of Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, and Photoshop are required; proficiency in PowerPoint is considered a plus.

**Be part of an extraordinary story.**
Your skills. Your imagination. Your ambition. Here, there are no boundaries to your potential and the impact you can make. You’ll find infinite opportunities to grow and work on the biggest, most rewarding challenges that will build your skills and experience. You have the chance to be a part of our future, and build the life you want while being part of an international community.
  
  
Our best is here and still to come. To us, impossible is only a challenge. Join us as we dare to achieve what’s never been done before.
  
  
Together, everything is possible.
  
  
Qualification
  
  
We Are Looking For a Passionate And Experienced Professional To Join Our Employee Experience Team. To Be Successful The Candidate Must Have
  
  

* Bachelor’s Degree or Equivalent with Minimum 4 years of job-related experience
* Qualifications in Marketing, Communication, Graphic and Digital Design or Equivalent.
* Relevant field related experience.
* Excellent time management skills to deliver quality marketing materials on time, and handling multiple projects at the same time.
* Proficient in using Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, etc
* Exceptional English writing, editing, and proofreading skills with strong attention to detail.
* Strong creative writing and copywriting capability, including storytelling, scriptwriting, and campaign messaging.
* Ability to conceptualise ideas and translate them into clear written and visual communication outputs.
* High level of literacy and confidence working across short form and long form content.
* Strong understanding of brand tone of voice and ability to adapt content for different personas and audiences.
* Ability to analyse data and insights and communicate them through engaging, accessible content.
* Willingness and ability to execute basic graphic design tasks using templates; openness to learning design tools and processes.
* Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple deliverables and deadlines.
* Effective stakeholder communication and collaboration skills.
* Creative mindset combined with structure, accuracy, and quality focus.

**About Qatar Airways Group**
Our story started with four aircraft. Today, we deliver excellence across 12 different businesses coming together as one. We’ve grown fast, broken records and set trends that others follow. We don’t slow down by the fear of failure. Instead, we dare to achieve what’s never been done before. So, whether you’re creating a unique experience for our customers or innovating behind the scenes, every person contributes to our proud story. A story of spectacular growth and determination. Now is the time to bring your best ideas and passion to a place where your ambition will know no boundaries, and be part of a truly global community.
  
  
**How To Apply**
If you are interested to submit your application and feel you are a good fit for this role, please complete our application form and upload your CV for our review and consideration.
  
  
https://aa115.taleo.net/careersection/QA\_External\_CS/jobapply.ftl?lang=en&job=232953

data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary & Purpose:**

The Merchandise Officer is responsible for leading, strategizing, monitoring, and reporting on category performance, including sales, margins, stock holding, and market share. This role operates under the guidance of the Category Head or Merchandising Manager.

**Key Perf
data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary & Purpose:**

The Merchandise Officer is responsible for leading, strategizing, monitoring, and reporting on category performance, including sales, margins, stock holding, and market share. This role operates under the guidance of the Category Head or Merchandising Manager.

**Key Performance Areas (KPAs) & Principal Accountabilities:**

**1 \*\*Sales and Margin Management\*\***

• Develop annual budgets and forecasts for assigned categories.

• Monitor sales performance against targets and adjust strategies as needed.

• Implement promotional strategies to drive sales and enhance margins.

**2 \*\*Supplier Negotiations\*\* -**

• Lead discussions on contract terms to optimize pricing and margins.

• Establish and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) for supplier performance.

• Cultivate strong relationships with suppliers for better collaboration.

**3 \*\*Inventory Management\*\***
-

• Maintain optimal inventory levels across all stores to meet demand.

• Utilize open-to-buy (OTB) management to control working capital.

• Conduct regular stock assessments to identify slow-moving or aging products.

**4 \*\*Market Awareness and Competitor Analysis\*\* -**

• Analyze market trends to identify new product opportunities. –

• Monitor competitor offerings and pricing strategies for strategic insights.

• Adapt category strategies in response to market changes and competitor actions.

**5 \*\*Cross-Departmental Collaboration\*\* -**

• Work closely with store teams for accurate inventory and sales reporting.

• Collaborate with marketing to develop effective promotional campaigns.

• Ensure coordination with finance for timely reconciliations and reporting.

**6 \*\*Promotional Planning and Execution\*\* -**

• Develop weekly and monthly promotional plans for the category.

• Work with marketing to execute successful in-store promotions.

• Analyze promotional performance and adjust future strategies based on outcomes.

**7 \*\*Training and Development\*\* -**

• Identify training needs for staff regarding new products.

• Coordinate with suppliers to provide comprehensive training sessions.

• Monitor training effectiveness and make adjustments as needed to improve team performance.

**Qualifications**

* Experience (Yrs & Field) 3 years + in Category Management in Retail Industry preferably in Electronics industry
* Educational Qualification Post Graduate
* Professional Certifications MBA in Sales and Marketing is Desirable
* Skills & Abilities:

Strong planning and organizing skills, analytical and problem-solving skills, effective communication, negotiation, and presentation abilities.

data.jd_text:
Lactalis Group, is a family-owned company with over 85,000 pragmatic and ambitious individuals around the world, we are a leading player in the dairy industry, committed to delivering high-quality products to consumers across the globe.

Living our key values of AMBITION, ENGAGEMENT, and SIMPLICITY is at the centre of everything we do at Lactalis.

If you want a one-of-a-kind experience with a company that offers trusted brands, professional expertise, and a dynamic work atmosphere that encourages entrepreneurial spirit, hands-on responsibility, and real opportunities for career growth and development, we'd like to hear from you!

As part of our expanding operations in the Middle East region, we are seeking an
**Assistant Purchasing Manager**
to join our dynamic team. Based in Dammam, Saudi Arabia.

**Job Brief:**

This role manages sourcing, supplier coordination, and inventory planning to support daily operations and cost optimisation in a fast‑growing F&B company. It offers hands‑on procurement exposure, cross‑team collaboration, and flexible start/end working hours.

**Responsibilities:**

* Manage direct and procurement activities to meet cost, quality, and delivery requirements across the business.
* Source cost‑effective products and services while maintaining consistent quality standards.
* Develop, manage, and strengthen supplier relationships, including contracts and commercial terms.
* Review and manage weekly and monthly purchasing plans and costing.
* Maintain a controlled and up‑to‑date supplier base and documentation.
* Achieve cost‑saving targets through effective negotiation and alternative sourcing strategies.

**Requirements & Skills:**

* Minimum 5 years of procurement experience, Managing direct spend.
* Manufacturing industry exposure is highly preferred.
* Proven negotiation skills with experience sourcing alternative products or suppliers.
* Strong analytical capability with confidence working on costing and inventory data.
* Proactive, hands‑on approach with strong problem‑solving skills.
* Solid understanding of procurement and supply chain fundamentals.

Why Join Us:

* Be a key contributor to a globally recognized player in the dairy industry with a strong commitment to innovation and excellence.
* Engage with a diverse team of professionals and build relationships across international markets.
* Benefit from ongoing professional development opportunities and the chance to broaden your expertise.
* Enjoy a competitive compensation package that rewards your skills, experience, and dedication.
* If you are an accomplished individual with a passion for the dairy industry and a desire to thrive in a challenging international setting, we invite you to join us on this exciting journey.

data.jd_text:
**Be Part of a Legacy Bigger Than the Game**

At
**Al-Qadsiah Club**
we create more than teams! We’re crafting a legacy that goes beyond the game, making an impact both on and off the field. Driven by ambition, synergy, and innovation, we aim to inspire generations while shaping the future of Saudi sports.

This is more than just a job! It’s an opportunity to be part of something larger than yourself. At Al-Qadsiah, you’ll play a key role in shaping our legacy, contributing to the nation’s sports vision, and making history every step of the way.

**Job Purpose:**
To ensure the smooth operation of the Sporting Director’s office by maintaining records, coordinating meetings and travel logistics, and assisting with HR and finance administrative tasks.
  
  
  

**Job Responsibilities:**

**Administrative and Clerical Support**

* Assist the Sporting Director’s Office Manager with managing schedules, meetings, and travel logistics
* Handle document filing, record-keeping, and data entry for staff contracts, reports and meeting records.
* Maintain and update databases related to all first-team staff and service level agreements.
* Serve as a point of contact for internal departments needing basic assistance from the Sporting Director’s Office
* Serve as a point of contact for staff professional development requests and track and record all requests, attendance and certifications
* Manage routine email correspondence and inquiries
    
  **Meetings and Communications**
* Provide support to arrange meetings, agendas, take minutes, and distribute meeting summaries and actions
* Maintain and update the Sporting Director’s office calendar

**HR, Procurement and Finance Support**

* Assist in tracking expenses, purchasing, processing invoices, and ensuring all financial, procurement and HR processes are carried out in a timely manner
* Ensure financial, procurement and HR documents/reports are properly signed, recorded and tracked over time

**Office Operations & Supplies Management**

* Ensure the Sporting Directors office is always organised and professional.
* Maintain office supplies, ensuring smooth daily operations.
* Assist in IT support requests and equipment management

**Other:**

* Deputise for the Sporting Director’s Office Manager as and when needs
* Ensure all continuous professional development and training courses are up to date and the minimum professional standards of the role are met.
* Any other duties as requested by the line manager or Sporting Director

Requirements
  
  
**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Sports Management, Business Administration or related field
* Level 3 (A Level) Qualification or equivalent experience

**Skills, Knowledge and Experience:**

* Experience in executive-level administrative support, preferably in sports or a high-performance environment.
* Strong organisational and communication skills with attention to detail.
* Agile and adaptable with the ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced football environment sometimes outside of normal office hours.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, and project management tools.
* Ability to handle sensitive football-related information with professionalism.
* Passion for football and an understanding of the operational dynamics of a high-level professional Football Club.
* Experience in working closely with executives, managers, or senior technical staff.
* Ability to plan and execute meetings and complex travel logistics efficiently.
* Passion for football and an understanding of the operational dynamics of a high-level professional Football Club.
* Experience in working closely with executives, managers, or senior technical staff.
* Ability to plan and execute meetings and complex travel logistics efficiently.
* Experience within a professional club in the Middle East.
* Multilingual skills, particularly English, Spanish and Arabic.

Benefits
  
  

**Why Join Al-Qadsiah?**

* **Be Part of the Legacy:**
  Join a club that’s redefining the future of Saudi sports, striving to lead the competition and set new standards of excellence.
* **Experience the Culture:**
  Thrive in an environment that values
  **quality, accountability, diversity, synergy, innovation, and ambition, while embracing harmony.**
  This is the Qadsiah Way.

data.raw_snippet: We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Investment Analyst to support the day-to-day investment activities of a small, professionally managed family office. This role is ideal for a candidate with a strong foundation in finance or accounting who is passionate about investments and enjoys
data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Investment Analyst to support the day-to-day investment activities of a small, professionally managed family office. This role is ideal for a candidate with a strong foundation in finance or accounting who is passionate about investments and enjoys conducting in-depth research and analysis. You will play a key role in supporting investment decisions, monitoring portfolio performance, and ensuring accurate reporting across asset classes.
  
  
**Main Responsibilities**

* Conduct research and analysis on investment opportunities across asset classes including equities, fixed income, funds, and alternative investments
* Assist in monitoring and tracking portfolio performance, including returns, risk metrics, and market developments
* Prepare periodic investment reports (weekly, monthly, quarterly) summarizing portfolio performance, market insights, and key updates
* Support due diligence processes on new investment opportunities, including reviewing financial statements, market trends, and manager performance
* Maintain up-to-date records of investments, transactions, valuations, and supporting documentation
* Coordinate with external asset managers, banks, brokers, and advisors to obtain reports and relevant investment information
* Assist in preparing investment memos, presentations, and summaries for internal decision-making
* Monitor global and regional financial markets, economic trends, and relevant news impacting the portfolio
* Support reconciliation of investment records with bank and broker statements where required
* Provide ad-hoc analysis and research support to senior management on strategic investment decisions

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field
* 0-3 years of experience in investments, asset management, corporate finance, audit, or a related field
* Strong interest in financial markets and investment analysis, with the ability to conduct structured research
* Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets, including financial analysis and data organization
* Solid understanding of financial concepts such as valuation, financial statements, and portfolio performance metrics
* Strong analytical thinking with high attention to detail
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in both English and Arabic
* Arabic speaker is required
* Ability to handle sensitive financial information with discretion and professionalism
* Based in Bahrain

data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Overview:**

The Support Operations Expert is responsible for overseeing the daily operations of customer support functions, including the Call Center and Level 1 (L1) Technical Support teams. This role ensures efficient handling of customer inquiries, incidents, and service requests while maintaining high levels of service quality, customer satisfaction, and operational performance. The position plays a critical role in managing team performance, ensuring SLA compliance, and driving continuous improvement across support operations.

**Key Responsibilities:**

•Supervise day-to-day activities of the Call Center and L1 Technical Support teams.

•Ensure timely and effective handling of customer inquiries, incidents, and service requests.

•Monitor service queues, workload distribution, and resource allocation to optimize efficiency.

•Ensure adherence to defined processes, procedures, and service standards.

•Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance service quality and operational efficiency.

•Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction through effective service delivery and issue resolution.

•Act as the first point of escalation for complex or high-priority customer issues.

•Ensure proper documentation, tracking, and timely resolution of incidents.

•Collaborate with internal stakeholders including Operations/NOC, Engineering, and Customer Success teams.

•Provide regular updates on service performance, major incidents, and operational challenges.

•Support cross-functional initiatives to enhance customer experience and service delivery.

•Prepare and present operational reports, including KPIs, SLAs, incident trends, and performance insights.

•Monitor compliance with internal policies, procedures, and quality standards.

•Ensure accurate documentation and maintenance of support records and knowledge base materials.

**Qualifications:**

Education:

•Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Business Administration, or a related field.

•Relevant certifications in IT Service Management (e.g., ITIL) or Customer Support/Call Center operations are preferred.

Experience:

•8-12 years of experience in customer support, service desk, or call center operations.

•Proven experience working in SLA-driven environments with exposure to incident and escalation management.

•Experience in industries such as telecommunications, technology, or managed services is preferred.

Skills & Competencies:

•Strong customer service orientation with a focus on delivering high-quality support.

•Solid understanding of service operations, incident management, and support workflows.

•Familiarity with ticketing systems, CRM platforms, and call center technologies.

Customer Success & Planning Dhahran
